title: Credit Repair Specialist (Experience Required)
description:
We're looking for a credit repair specialist who already knows the game. You're not here to learn the basics — you're here to execute.

What you need to have:

Real credit repair experience. You know how the dispute process works, you understand FCRA, and you've been in the trenches. Specifically:

You MUST have working experience with Credit Repair Cloud and GoHighLevel. These are non-negotiable. If you don't know these platforms, this isn't the role for you.

You need to know how to submit CFPB complaints on your own — and you need to have your own method for doing it without requiring client text codes or verification access every time. We're not going to teach you what a CFPB is or how to file one. You should already have a reliable process for getting that done independently.

Same goes for FTC reports — when they're needed, you handle it. No asking how, no asking where. You just do it.

What we provide — and why this role is easy for the right person:

We're not throwing you into chaos. Our dispute system is fully built out. We're talking a complete 12-month attack flow already mapped — every round, every angle, every escalation path is planned. The dispute letter templates are written and ready. Your job is to review the client file, add the finishing touches to the letter, send it out, and follow through with CFPB submissions and FTC reports as needed.

For the right person, this is pushing buttons. The strategy is done. The letters are done. You're executing a system that's already been built and proven. We train you on our specific process and how we handle things internally — but we're training you on our system, not teaching you fundamentals. Big difference.

This is the easiest credit repair job you'll find if you actually know what you're doing.

What will get you filtered out immediately:

Saying you "know credit repair" but can't explain your CFPB submission process. Not knowing what Credit Repair Cloud or GoHighLevel is. Sending a generic copy-paste application. Asking us to train you on basics.

Growth opportunity:

This role starts with execution but it doesn't stay there. Once you're locked in on the credit repair side, there's opportunity to learn business funding and personal funding. Long-term, we want someone who can eventually help train new tea
mbers and move into a leadership role. Promotions are real here — but they're earned through performance, not time.

How to apply:

Your application MUST start with "Paper Route [Your First and Last Name]". No exceptions. If it's not there, we don't read it.

In your application, answer these three things:



Describe your experience with credit repair — how long, what you've done, what kind of volume you've handled.

Walk us through how YOU submit a CFPB complaint without needing direct client access for verification codes. Be specific.

Confirm your experience level with Credit Repair Cloud and GoHighLevel — what have you used them for and for how long?



Keep it brief, keep it real. We'll know within the first few sentences if you're the right fit.

title: Virtual Patient Care Coordinator (Remote)
description:
Company: Willow Park Health

Hours: Full-Time | Monday–Friday | U.S. Eastern Time

About Willow Park Health



Willow Park Health is a growing healthcare organization that provides psychiatric care to seniors living in assisted living communities across New York. Our clinicians work closely with facility staff and families to support residents experiencing depression, anxiety, dementia-related behaviors, and other mental health conditions.



We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Patient Care Coordinator to help manage scheduling, communication with assisted living facilities, and patient coordination.

• Schedule psychiatric visits for our clinicians across assisted living communities

• Coordinate with facilities that we support (nursing staff and wellness directors regarding patient appointments)

• Maintain and update resident schedules and patient lists

• Communicate professionally with healthcare staff, families, and providers

• Help ensure providers’ daily schedules run smoothly

• Answer incoming calls and respond to messages from facility staff

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable speaking with healthcare professionals

• Able to manage multiple tasks and schedules

• Professional and courteous on the phone

• Dependable and able to work independently



Qualifications



• Previous experience in healthcare scheduling, medical office administration, or care coordination preferred

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Experience with EMR systems or scheduling platforms is a plus

• Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

• Ability to work during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



Why Join Our Team



• Stable full-time remote position

• Supportive and respectful work culture

• Opportunity to grow with a growing healthcare organization

• Consistent schedule with long-term employment opportunity



How to Apply



Please send:



• Your resume

• A short paragraph describing your experience with healthcare scheduling or patient coordination

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
***WE WILL ONLY ACCEPT APPLICANTS WITH PRIOR CUSTOMER SUPPORT EXPERIENCE IN THE SAAS INDUSTRY.***



About the Role

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you will serve as the first line of support for our customers, helping them navigate the platform, resolve issues, and ensure they have a smooth experience using our software.



You will handle support tickets, troubleshoot basic issues, and work closely with internal teams to resolve more complex requests. This role also involves identifying recurring issues, improving support resources, and helping enhance the overall customer support experience as our company continues to grow.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage day-to-day customer support inquiries, providing timely, accurate, and professional assistance to customers.



• Address and resolve customer concerns, escalating more complex issues to the appropriate internal teams when necessary.



• Track and organize support requests to help identify trends and opportunities for improving customer support processes.



• Assist in maintaining and updating support documentation and internal resources.



• Support testing and feedback for product updates or improvements when needed.



• Contribute to team initiatives and assist with additional tasks to support overall team success.



Requirements

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) — this is a must.



• Experience supporting customers in a technology, software, or service-based environment, preferably in a fast-paced and growing company — this is a must.



• Previous experience using modern ticketing systems.



• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to identify patterns and trends in customer issues.



• A proactive and resourceful approach to resolving customer concerns.



• Highly organized and able to manage multiple tasks and priorities.



• A collaborative team player who can coordinate effectively with different teams.



Work Schedule

• This is a full-time job in a permanent work from home setup. You will be working 8 hours a day, 5 days a week.





TO APPLY FOR THIS POSITION, FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS BELOW:

• INCLUDE A SHORT COVER LETTER INTRODUCING YOURSELF

title: Media Buyer (Facebook Ads | Dropshiping)
description:
We are a fast-growing 7-figure European e-commerce company operating multiple Shopify and Funnelish stores in Sweden, Norway, Finland, Netherlands, Germany, Austria, and the UK.

We advertise multiple health & beauty products (anti-aging, wellness, pain-relief, etc.) and we scale based strictly on profit, not vanity metrics.



We are now looking for a Media Buyer who can analyze data, make smart scaling decisions, and work closely with our internal team (Ads Launcher + Creative Strategist).



This is not a campaign-launching job — we already have a launcher.

Your task is to analyze data and help us scale profitably.



What You Will Do

Review daily Meta Ads performance across multiple stores

Make basic scaling and de-scaling decisions based on real net profit



Calculate:



Breakeven ROAS

Breakeven CPA

Net profit per ad set

Margin impact when COGS changes

Identify which creatives and audiences perform best

Give simple, clear creative feedback (hooks, angles, variations)

Maintain clean tracking sheets (ROAS, CPA, COGS, fees, profit)

Communicate with our supplier when we need updated prices



Provide daily summaries of performance & next steps



Who We Are Looking For



You do not need to be a “senior” media buyer.

But you must understand Meta ads + data + profit logic.



Requirements:



-Experience running Meta ads for e-commerce (any niche is OK)

-Understanding of breakeven ROAS, COGS, and profit calculation

-Ability to analyze performance and make decisions from data

-Good communication skills

-Comfortable working with spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets)

-Reliable and responsible with daily reporting



Bonus (but not required):

-Experience with Shopify or Funnelish

-Experience in health/beauty products

-Experience working with a creative team



What We Offer



-Stable long-term full-time position

-Growth opportunities

Training on our internal systems

-Supportive and friendly international team

-Competitive salary (based on experience)

-Performance bonuses after the trial period



How to Apply



Please send your application directly here on OnlineJobs.ph with the following:



Years of experience with Meta ads

The highest monthly ad spend you managed

Short explanation: how do you d
 if a campaign is profitable?

How do you deicde when to scale/descale/kill ?

Expected monthly salary (trial month + after trial)

Short Loom/video introduction (2–3 minutes)

title: Marketing Assistant (IG/ Video Focus)
description:
Position: Marketing Assistant 

I.MOVE. Health and Performance 

Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST 

Salary range: USD
per month depending on experience and proficiency

Location: Remote



About Us:

I.MOVE. Health and Performance is a healthcare and movement-focused brand driven by a passion for helping people move better, feel better, and live better. We're growing fast and looking for a creative, driven, and self-motivated Marketing Assistant to join our remote team and support our social media presence on Instagram.



We are a mission and vision driven company whose values reflect a commitment to embracing a “person first, patient/client second” approach in all that we do. We strongly believe that life is about building relationships and continuing to evolve into the best versions of ourselves. We prioritize instilling optimism in an environment that promotes continuous learning with a growth mindset.



I.MOVE. Health and Performance is a non-traditional chiropractic clinic that treats the active population, specifically weightlifters, struggling with chronic pain and activity restrictions. We have the biggest impact in helping people feel, move, and play better – both in the gym and in life!



We opened our practice in July 2023 and have quickly grown since then! 

 

This is an extremely important position. Unlike most medical offices, we take a lot of time to nurture and educate prospective clients who inquire about our services. Many of our patients have been let down before with other healthcare providers and often come to us having lived with pain for many years.



Our mission: “helping active people achieve their health and fitness goals without pain restrictions”

Our vision: “creating a community of people who are strong, resilient, and educated living the pain free lives they dream of”





Our core values are:



Resilient Adaptability

Ethical Excellence

Daily Growth

Own Your Life

Better Than Before



These values are what we stand for and the beliefs and principles that drive what we do.



About the Role



This is a creative, hands-on marketing support role that focuses on content creation, video editing, and outbound messaging on Instagram. You'll help grow and engage our audience by crafting compelling short-form content and reaching out to potential clients or followers daily.

Training and weekly meetings and communication is very highly valued and utilized. You can expect to work 1:1 Dann, business owner, to refine messaging, skillset, and to be an involved in a collaborative remote marketing assistant job. 



Key Responsibilities

- create 7 reels and 7 static posts a week

- track metrics

- send outbound messages



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

- You have excellent organization and planning skills – you know how to manage your schedule and re-prioritize your time so that you can focus on key priorities – without the need for micromanagement.

- You communicate proficiently in writing and work creatively and innovatively.

- You follow through on commitments. You live up to verbal and written agreements without constant reminders.

- You are resourceful and able to problem solve small tasks on your own.

- You have the ability to quickly and proficiently absorb new information.

- You’re proactive and resourceful. You bring new ideas to the company, are self-driven, and can quickly shift and course-correct when things don’t go according to plan – in a positive manner and without focusing on the negative.

- You’re coachable, love to learn, and have a fail-forward attitude. You take constructive criticism well and enjoy getting regular feedback that will optimize your skills and performance.

- You’re thoughtful and thorough, can potentially hold meaningful conversations with people you don’t know for longer than 20 minutes, and can answer people’s questions in a way that increases the likelihood of them becoming a client.

- You are informed on industry trends, marketing best practices, and new technologies.

Who You Are

- Strong communicator with great interpersonal skills

- Passionate about healthcare, movement, or wellness industries

- Able to work independently, problem-solve, and think critically

title: Senior Customer Support Specialist – DTC Subscription Brands (Zendesk / Shopify / Loop)
description:
We Don't Need to Train You. We Need You to Train Us.



We run 5 health & wellness supplement brands on Shopify, and we're looking for ONE senior customer support specialist who has genuinely been doing this work for years.



I'm not going to sugarcoat it: I've hired good people before, but most needed months of hand-holding on things like subscription flows, chargeback procedures, legal escalations, and multi-store management. That's not what I need anymore.



I need someone who already knows this world inside-out — someone who's managed Loop Subscriptions, Seal Subscriptions, or Checkout Champ and can step in on Day 1 with zero ramp-up on the fundamentals.



If that's you, I genuinely want to work with you — and I'll make sure it's worth your time.





WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY LOOKS LIKE DAY-TO-DAY:



• Handle 40–60+ Zendesk tickets per shift using pre-built macros and Notion-based multi-step flows

• Manage subscriptions across Loop Subscriptions and Seal Subscriptions — cancellations, pauses, skips, reactivations, and billing changes

• Look up orders across 5 Shopify stores (if you can't find someone in one store, you check the others — this should be second nature to you)

• Always check full customer history (name +
) in Zendesk before responding — never start a flow from scratch if a conversation is already in progress

• Handle chargebacks correctly: recognize "Important: Your Recent Chargeback" tickets, create new tickets with screenshots, and cancel subscriptions immediately

• Identify legal threat keywords (attorney, FTC, lawsuit, trading standards, court, sue, consumer protection) and follow the legal flow instantly — without being told

• Confirm subscriptions are ACTUALLY cancelled before telling the customer they are — this is critical and has cost us real money when missed

• De-escalate frustrated customers with genuine warmth and empathy — not robotic copy-paste

• Work independently with minimal oversight — I shouldn't need to review your tickets daily





WHAT YOU MUST HAVE (NON-NEGOTIABLE):



Please only apply if every single one of these is true:



? 5–6+ years of hands-on customer support experience with Zendesk + Shopify

? Direct, real-world experience managing subscriptions in Loop Subscriptions, Seal Subscriptions, and/or Checkout Champ

? Experience supporting DTC subscription brands — health, wellness, supplements, or similar recurring-order products

? You know what Zendesk macros are, how to use them, and how to follow multi-step retention flows without skipping steps

? You understand chargeback handling, legal escalation triggers, and subscription lifecycle management

? Strong written English — warm, professional, and clear (not stiff or robotic)

? Reliable internet + available during US business hours (CT timezone)





PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF:



? You have never used Zendesk, Loop Subscriptions, Seal Subscriptions, or Checkout Champ in a real paid role

? Your experience is general VA work and you're hoping to "learn on the job"

? You've only done live chat or phone support — this is
-based Zendesk ticket support

? You have under 5 years of experience in this exact type of work



I say this with respect — I've spent months training people who weren't quite ready, and it wasn't fair to them or to us. I'd rather find the right match and build something great together.





PAY, SCHEDULE & GROWTH:



• Starting rate: $6/hour USD — willing to go higher for truly senior candidates with provable track records

• Schedule: Starts at 1 hour/day during a short paid trial, then scales to 4–6+ hours/day (up to full-time) based on performance

• Bonuses: Performance-based bonuses for consistently high accuracy and ticket volume

• Paid weekly via PayPal (every Tuesday, fees covered by us)

• Long-term position: I'm building a team I can count on for years. If you're looking for a quick gig, this isn't it. If you want a home — it is.





WHY PEOPLE LIKE WORKING WITH US:



I'm a hands-on founder who genuinely cares about my team. Here's what you can expect:



• Clear documentation — all flows, macros, and processes are already built out in Notion and Zendesk. You're not building from scratch.

• Direct communication — you work with me directly on WhatsApp. No layers of management. If something's unclear, you ask, I answer.

• Respect for your expertise — I'm not looking to micromanage. I want a partner who can own customer support and help me improve it.

• A real path to full-time — multiple tea
mbers have grown from 1 hour/day to full weekly salaries. I want the same for you.

• Feedback, not criticism — when I give notes, it's because I want you to succeed. I believe in building people up.





HOW TO APPLY (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY):



To stand out and show me you're the right fit, please include ALL of the following:



1. Your resume / CV highlighting Zendesk, Shopify, and subscription management experience

2. A short note (3–5 sentences): which subscription app(s) you've used (Loop, Seal, Checkout Champ), how many years, and which DTC brands you supported

3. Answer this question: "A customer says 'I want to cancel.' Their Zendesk history shows another agent already sent Step 1 and Step 2 of the subscription retention flow. What do you do next?"

4. A screenshot of your internet speed test

5. Your PayPal
 (so I know you're ready to start)



If this question makes perfect sense to you, you're exactly who I'm looking for.



---



Applications without specific Zendesk + subscription app experience will not be reviewed. I know that sounds strict, but it's how I make sure the right person gets the respect, pay, and stability they deserve.



If you've read this far and you're thinking "This is literally what I do every day" — I can't wait to hear from you.



Let's build something great together.

description:

We are seeking a reliable, motivated Telemarketing Specialist/Virtual Assistant to support our outbound sales efforts.



The primary responsibility of this role is to contact potential clients, introduce our services, qualify prospects, and schedule appointments for the sales team.



This is a long-term remote position for someone who is organized, confident on the phone, and comfortable speaking with business professionals. The role focuses on outbound calling, prospect follow-up, and appointment setting using a CRM system.



The ideal candidate has experience with telemarketing, outbound sales calls, or appointment setting.



Responsibilities



• Conduct outbound phone calls to potential business clients

• Introduce services and briefly explain the value offered

• Identify decision-makers and qualify potential clients

• Ask basic qualification questions regarding services and needs

• Schedule appointments or walkthrough meetings for the sales team

• Record call outcomes and notes inside the CRM system

• Follow up with prospects via phone and
 when needed

• Maintain organized records of prospects and conversations

• Achieve daily call targets and appointment-setting goals

• Provide feedback on lead quality and outreach results



Requirements



• Strong English communication skills (clear speaking and writing)

• Previous experience in telemarketing, cold calling, or appointment setting

• Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Professional phone presence and confident communication style

• Ability to work independently and stay organized

• Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

• Basic experience using CRM systems (HubSpot or similar preferred)



Skills Required



• Telemarketing

• Outbound Calls

• Appointment Setting

• Lead Generation

• CRM Management

• English Communication



Compensation



• Base Pay: $3 – $6 per hour, depending on experience

• Performance Bonuses: Based on activity and quality of leads

• Commission: Paid for qualified appointments that convert into clients

• Opportunity for increased hours and long-term work based on performance



Application Instructions



To apply, please include the following:



Application Instructions: To apply, please include the following in your application: 1. Your resume (PDF or Google Drive link) 2. A voice or video recording link (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself 3. A brief explanation of your telemarketing or outbound calling experience. Please make sure the recording is accessible via a public link (Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube unlisted). Applications without a resume and recording link may not be considered. In your recording, please answer the following: • Introduce yourself • Describe your telemarketing or outbound calling experience • Explain why you are interested in this role.

title: Marketing Operations Assistant
description:
About the Company

We are a fast-growing healthcare practice based in the United States focused on helping patients improve mobility, reduce pain, and live healthier lives. Our business generates a high volume of inbound marketing leads through digital channels, and our marketing efforts are driven by proven strategies focused on measurable results.



We are now looking for a Marketing Operations Assistant to support the execution side of our marketing efforts. This role works directly with the business owner and focuses on implementing marketing campaigns, managing advertising tasks, tracking performance data, and supporting lead follow-up workflows.



This is not a creative strategy role. Instead, it is ideal for someone who enjoys structured, detail-oriented execution work and wants to support a results-driven marketing operation.





The Role

The Marketing Operations Assistant will be responsible for supporting the day-to-day execution of digital marketing campaigns and lead engagement processes.



You will help ensure that advertising campaigns are properly posted, marketing data is accurately tracked and reported, and inbound leads receive timely follow-up communication.



This role requires someone who is organized, data and analytical, and is experienced with learning new softwares and programs. This role will primarily follow established processes and instructions, however there will be some expectations of creating/ outlining new processes. 



Key Responsibilities

-Marketing Campaign Execution

-Data reporting from marketing efforts and advertising

-GoHighLevel (CRM) back end support

-Post and manage advertising campaigns on platforms such as Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads - not strategy

-Outbound lead outreach via messaging platforms?

-Marketing Data & Reporting



Track and report key marketing metrics such as:?

-Lead volume?

-Cost per lead?

-Campaign performance?

-Maintain organized reporting spreadsheets or dashboards?

-Compile performance summaries for the business owner?

-Lead Follow-Up Support

-Send outbound messages to new leads using prepared scripts and templates?

-Marketing Systems & Operations

-Assist with organizing marketing assets, reports, and campaign documentation?

-Support operational marketing tasks as directed by the business owner?



Requirements

Experience

-1–3+ years of experience in marketing support, digital marketing operations, or administrative marketing roles - this is not a creating marketing role such as content creation?

-Experience working with Meta Ads Manager is strongly preferred?

-Experience with GoHighLevel (high encouraged)?



Skills

-Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes?

-Comfortable working with marketing platforms and campaign data?

-Strong written English communication skills?

-Highly organized and reliable?

-Comfortable performing repetitive execution tasks accurately?



Must have strong English fluency?

-Must be available for significant overlap with PST business hours?

-Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment required?



Ideal Candidate Profile

The ideal candidate is someone who:

-Enjoys execution-focused work rather than creative strategy?

-Is comfortable following clear systems and instructions?

-Is detail-oriented and cares about accuracy in data and reporting?

-Communicates clearly and responds quickly?

-Takes ownership of tasks and consistently meets deadlines?

-This role is perfect for someone who wants to build deeper experience in marketing operations while supporting a growing business with measurable marketing results.



Why This Role

Work directly with the business owner and gain hands-on exposure to real marketing campaigns?

Be part of a results-driven healthcare practice focused on growth?

Develop deeper experience with marketing platforms and campaign operations?

Fully remote role with long-term stability potential?

 with subject - MARKETING ASSISTANT

include a resume, previous work you've done, and a reason why you think you'd be the best fit for this job

title: SEO Specialist
description:
SEO SPECIALIST DEFINED

The mission of an SEO (Search Engine Optimization) Specialist is to maximize the volume of inbound organic traffic from search engines to a website. This is accomplished through a combination of on-page and off-page techniques, including link-building, social media strategy, viral marketing, metadata sculpting, site speed optimization, content strategy, information architecture, and more.



As a result of the daily changes in the search algorithms of Google, Bing, Yahoo, and other leaders in search, an SEO expert works in a dynamic environment that requires them to be continually learning, fine-tuning their skills, and experimenting to discover how the industry is shifting.



ESSENTIAL SKILLS

- Experience with Google and Bing’s services, including Analytics and Webmaster Tools

- Extensive experience with Ahrefs or similar software

- A functional understanding of HTML and CSS

- The ability to work with back-end SEO elements such as .htaccess, robots.txt, metadata, site speed optimization, and related skills

- Proven success in link building and viral strategies

- The ability to deploy an effective local and long-tail search strategy

- A deep understanding of mobile strategy and how it relates to SEO

- A solid grasp of how blogging, press releases, social media, and related strategies go hand-in-hand with SEO

- Experience in building inbound organic search traffic and improving SERPs

- A background in creating reports showing web analytics data and site evaluations

- An up-to-date, working knowledge of current, past, and projected trends in the SEO industry

- Familiarity with the best tools in the trade



ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES

- Develop optimization strategies that increase the company's website search engine results rankings

- Work with editorial and marketing teams to drive SEO in content creation and content marketing

- Research and implement search engine optimization recommendations

- Create and execute a link-building strategy

- Determine measurable goals that demonstrate improvement in marketing efforts

- Create actionable SEO outlines for our writers to create compelling and high-quality website content, including blog posts and page descriptions to improve website search results



DAY-TO-DAY TASKS

- Conduct page optimization for search engine marketing

- Monitor daily performance metrics with SEO tools such as Google analytics to understand SEO strategy performance

- Collaborate with others within the marketing department to manage SEO strategy

- Perform ongoing keyword research, discovery and optimization for new SEO keywords to use throughout client websites and marketing materials

- Closely collaborate with web development team to ensure SEO best practices are properly followed throughout website content

- Change website architecture, content, linking and other factors to improve SEO positions for target keywords



** Submit your application with “SEO Specialist for Growing Digital Agency” in the subject line **



A bit about us: we are a growing digital agency based out of the Boston area in the United States. We specialize in managed marketing services for small, growth-driven businesses. This job requires outstanding communication and patience with the ability to think and act on one’s own—all while keeping the client’s (and company’s) best interest at heart!



At our agency, we treat each other like family. We have the utmost respect for our clients and for each other. We value communication, honesty and open-mindedness above all else.



Thanks for taking the time to read about this position. We are excited to meet you!

title: Real Estate Acquisitions (VA)
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

description:

We are hiring motivated Virtual Assistants to manage customer communication and support sales for our e-commerce business.

title: Conveyancing Compliance Officer
description:
PropZap — Help Build the Compliance Backbone of a Company Scaling Across North America



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We’re not building just another brokerage.



We’re building a modern real estate company powered by strong systems, disciplined operations, intelligent workflows, and long-term vision.



Every real estate transaction carries legal, financial, and regulatory responsibility.



Behind every successful closing is a file that is complete, organized, and defensible.



As we scale, maintaining that level of operational integrity becomes even more important.



That’s why we’re looking for someone who takes pride in building order, protecting compliance, and ensuring every transaction file stands up to scrutiny.



This role helps protect the integrity of the entire brokerage.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Conveyancing Compliance Officer

Location: Remote

Role Type: Full-Time / Long-Term

Compensation: 50,000 PHP+ (Negotiable)



We believe exceptional operators deserve exceptional compensation. As PropZap grows, we are willing to pay premium for people who consistently deliver high-quality work, protect compliance standards, and help strengthen the systems that allow the company to scale confidently.



Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is Important



Every real estate transaction produces a complex set of documents, approvals, and compliance requirements.



If those records are incomplete, inconsistent, or poorly documented, the brokerage is exposed to unnecessary risk.



This role ensures our transaction files are clean, complete, and defensible from acceptance through closing — particularly during the critical firm-to-close conveyancing phase.



You will also support brokerage compliance operations by ensuring documentation standards are followed and potential risks are identified early.



This role sits at the center of:



• Conveyancing readiness

• Compliance oversight

• Documentation integrity

• Operational coordination



If you enjoy bringing clarity and structure to complex documentation, this role will feel meaningful and impactful.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities



Transaction File Compliance Review



You will review buyer and seller transaction files to ensure they are complete, accurate, and audit-ready.



This includes:



• Reviewing transaction files in SkySlope (system of record)

• Ensuring required documents are present

• Confirming documents are legible and properly executed

• Verifying files are named and stored correctly

• Ensuring amendments, waivers, and supporting documents match the executed contract set

• Checking deposits, dates, and contract details for consistency



Your goal is to ensure each file clearly reflects what occurred during the transaction and maintains a clean documentation trail.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Pre-Close Conveyancing Readiness



You will conduct pre-close readiness checks to ensure files are properly prepared before entering the final stages of conveyancing.



This includes:



• Identifying missing or inconsistent documents early

• Creating clear lists of outstanding items and responsible parties

• Re-checking files once corrections are submitted

• Monitoring for late-stage issues such as:

Missing signatures

Name mismatches

Missing waivers

Incomplete deposit documentation

Missing lawyer details

Conflicting dates



Your work helps prevent last-minute issues that could delay closing.



--------------------------------------------------------------



FINTRAC Oversight (AML / Client Identification)



You will enforce PropZap’s FINTRAC standards with a strict compliance approach.



Responsibilities include:



• Verifying identification requirements for all parties

• Confirming ID documents are clear and valid

• Ensuring names on ID match contract names exactly

• Confirming required information such as occupation and employer

• Ensuring FINTRAC references are properly recorded internally



You will also manage complex cases such as:



• Corporate parties

• Foreign buyers or sellers

• Name discrepancies

• Missing or unclear identification

• Time-sensitive transactions



Any suspicious or high-risk information must be escalated promptly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



External Law Office Coordination (When Required)



You may assist with coordination related to the conveyancing phase, including:



• Confirming lawyer contact information is recorded correctly

• Ensuring the correct contract set is available for closing

• Verifying key transaction information is consistent

• Assisting internal teams in resolving missing documentation requested by lawyers



Exact interaction with law offices may vary depending on internal workflow.



--------------------------------------------------------------



MLS & Listing Compliance (When Applicable)



You may also assist with brokerage compliance checks related to listings and marketing documentation.



This may include:



• Confirming listing documentation is properly stored

• Reviewing listing records for completeness

• Supporting brokerage documentation standards tied to listings

• Identifying potential compliance issues related to listing or marketing records



The scope of MLS or advertising compliance responsibilities may evolve as the brokerage grows.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Documentation Standards & File Hygiene



At PropZap, documentation matters.



If something affects:



• money

• deadlines

• conditions

• approvals

• compliance obligations



…it must be clearly documented in the system of record.



You will:



• Provide clear feedback when documentation standards are not met

• Request corrections when necessary

• Follow up to ensure gaps are resolved



Clean files allow teams to understand transaction status and risk quickly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Escalations & Risk Monitoring



You will identify scenarios that require escalation, including:



• Missing FINTRAC documentation

• Money or trust-related ambiguity

• Potential misrepresentation or conflicting information

• Situations requiring legal interpretation

• Clients threatening complaints or legal action



Escalations should include a clear summary of the issue and supporting documentation.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Compliance Audits & Quality Assurance



You may periodically review files to maintain compliance standards.



This may include:



• Performing internal file audits

• Identifying recurring documentation issues

• Monitoring patterns of missing information

• Flagging operational risks early



These reviews help keep the brokerage compliant and defensible.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Process Improvement



You will also help strengthen operational systems by identifying patterns and inefficiencies.



This includes:



• Tracking recurring compliance gaps

• Suggesting improvements to checklists and templates

• Supporting updates to internal SOPs

• Helping teams maintain consistent documentation standards



Your insights help the company improve how transactions are handled as we scale.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who This Role Is Great For



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, detail, and keeping complex documentation organized.



Strong candidates often have experience in:



• Real estate conveyancing

• Transaction coordination

• Brokerage compliance

• Legal or documentation-heavy administrative roles



Key strengths include:



• Exceptional attention to detail

• Strong organizational skills

• Clear written communication

• Comfort working with sensitive personal information

• Good judgment when escalating regulated issues



--------------------------------------------------------------



Tools & Systems



You will primarily work with:



• SkySlope (transaction file system)

• Slack (internal communication)

• Notion (Task tracking, SOPs and documentation)



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You Gain



• Long-term role inside a growing real estate platform

• Direct collaboration with operations and brokerage leadership

• Opportunity to strengthen systems that support company growth

• A role where your work protects the integrity of real estate transactions



As the company expands across markets, the importance of strong compliance and documentation systems grows — and the people who build those systems grow with it.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume

• Portfolio (if applicable — examples of conveyancing, compliance, or documentation work)

• Summary of relevant conveyancing or compliance experience

• Expected monthly compensation

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result (if available)

• Intro video (optional but strongly preferred)



Subject Line: Conveyancing Compliance Officer – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------



If you want to help build the compliance backbone of a real estate platform that is scaling across North America — and grow with a company that values operational excellence — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Record Label Music & Sales Manager (Remote)



Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

title: Cold Calling and Virtual Assistant
description:

mber to help us grow!

title: Credit Repair Business and Personal Funding
description:
We are seeking an experienced, detail-driven Virtual Assistant with strong knowledge in personal credit repair, business credit building, funding preparation, and business structuring to support our growing financial services brand.



This role is for a serious professional who understands compliance, accuracy, and client communication.



?



Responsibilities



Credit Repair Support

 • Draft and process dispute letters (personal credit)

 • Upload and track disputes in CRM

 • Monitor credit reports and update client files

 • Organize documentation and proof

 • Track deletions, updates, and results



Business Credit & Structuring

 • Assist with EIN setup, DUNS, and business profiles

 • Verify business compliance structure (address, phone,
, NAICS, etc.)

 • Prepare vendor and tradeline applications

 • Maintain business credit tracking sheets



Funding Support

 • Prepare client profiles for funding readiness

 • Assist with lender application packages

 • Track funding applications and outcomes

 • Organize funding pipelines



Client Communication

 • Handle inbound and outbound calls, texts, and
s

 • Book consultations and follow up with leads

 • Provide professional updates to clients

 • Maintain confidentiality and compliance



Administrative Support

 • CRM updates

 • File organization

 • Task tracking

 • Reporting



?



Required Skills

 • Proven experience in credit repair or business credit

 • Strong understanding of dispute processes

 • Excellent English communication (written & spoken)

 • Professional phone presence

 • Experience with CRM systems

 • Attention to detail

 • Ability to handle sensitive financial information

 • Organized, reliable, and proactive



?



Preferred Experience

 • Credit Repair Cloud, Client Dispute Manager, or similar

 • Business credit vendors & tradeline familiarity

 • Funding platform experience

 • GoHighLevel CRM

 • Compliance knowledge (CROA basics)



?



Position Details

 • Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

 • Schedule: Full-time or Part-time

 • Pay: Competitive based on experience

 • Long-term growth opportunity

 • Performance bonuses available

title: Sales Manager
description:
Record Label Music & Sales Manager (Remote)



Pex Life Records LLC: Our Vision for Transformative Music



Pex Life Records is an independent label where urban music meets personal development. Founded by Wilmarck, we create high-quality tracks that resonate with the motivation of Tony Robbins, blended with the commercial sound of artists like Kanye West and Drake. Our music is purpose-driven, focusing on critical life areas: health, financial literacy, peak performance, and spirituality.



You will be joining a brand with a strong, engaged audience of over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers. Your work will directly contribute to inspiring and uplifting thousands through music.-----The Role: Drive Revenue, Build a Team, Shape a Brand



We are seeking a highly motivated Music Manager to lead our sales, operations, and team development. This is a pivotal role for a professional ready to commit to a 45-50 hour/week position that offers substantial commission potential and a clear path to high earnings.



Key Areas of Impact:

Sales & Business Development: Lead client acquisition by pitching proposals to songwriting job boards and driving profits to achieve ambitious sales targets.

Team Leadership: Recruit, hire, train, and inspire contractors and staff to ensure stellar performance and successful new releases.

Operations & Finance: Manage contracts, maintain essential financial records (bookkeeping), and ensure compliance and seamless communication across all stakeholders.

Customer Experience: Be the face of the company, creating memorable customer experiences, explaining product/service prices, and handling key inquiries.



Compensation & Uncapped Earning Potential



This is a performance-driven role with a clear path to significant monthly income through our incentive program.

Base & Growth: The hourly rate starts at $2.81 USD plus commission. The initial 10 hours/week commitment quickly scales up to 45 hours/week within 45 days, allowing for a rapid increase in base earnings.

Monthly Compensation Range: $505–$900 Guaranteed Base + Generous Commission.



Compensation Structure by Target Revenue Goal:

Achieve $1,200 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $675 Minimum. Commission Rate: 10% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement.

Achieve $2,400 Minimum: Guaranteed Monthly Base: $900 Minimum. Commission Rate: 15% on qualifying sales. Enhanced Benefits Package: Social Security System & Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing.



Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

If you are ready to be a crucial leader in a high-growth, mission-driven music company, apply now!



Application Instructions:



Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

title: Sales Manager
description:
Pex Life Records LLC is an independent record label dedicated to producing high-quality urban music focused on health, personal relationships, financial literacy, peak performance, bodybuilding, meditation, and spirituality. Founded by Wilmarck, our music merges influences from Kanye West and Drake with motivational themes inspired by Tony Robbins. With over 1,000
 subscribers and 20,
 followers, we aim to inspire and uplift through our music.



Position: Music Manager



We are looking for a music manager responsible for:

- Pitching proposals to songwriting job boards

- Keeping our books and managing contracts

- Driving success by boosting profits and hitting sales targets

- Leading and inspiring the team to deliver stellar performance

- Recruiting, hiring, and guiding contractors

- Managing operations, scheduling, and compliance

- Creating memorable customer experiences

- Onboarding and training new hires

- Communicating seamlessly with stakeholders

- Working 45-50 hours/week, including evenings, weekends, and holidays

- Lifting up to 25 pounds when needed



Disclaimer: Prospects will respond outside of scheduled hours. There will be an established 8-hour window where you’ll be expected to respond within an hour. Ex. Your schedule hours will be 6:30 PM -3:00 AM EST (From 3-11 PM EST if a prospect responds to a proposal, you’ll be expected to respond. Each response should take 5-15 mins. You can expect 3-5 responses per week. The additional hours may be deducted from your regular schedule if it exceeds 50 hours.



Contract Details

- Hourly Rate: $2.81/hr USD + 10%-15% of revenue

- Monthly Compensation: $505-$900 + commission

- Initial Hours: 10 hours/week, increasing to 45 hours/week over 45 days

- Training: Paid training provided

- Raises: Based on work performance



Hiring Process

This is an audition-based hiring process. We will select 3-5 candidates for a paid audition. After reviewing your work, we'll choose one full-time hire.

- Interview: To assess mutual fit

- Notification: Candidates will be contacted within 48 hours regarding audition status

- Video Chat: For day 1 of the audition



Responsibilities

Immediate Focus:

- Pitching to Songwriting Job Boards

- Album Launch Tasks

- Bookkeeping

- Onboarding & Interviewing Staff

- Explaining service and product prices

- Answering customer inquiries

- Obtaining customer information for shipping/services

- Managing our production team

- Communicating with tea
mbers/leaders

- Hitting monthly revenue goals



Future Responsibilities (If Qualified):

- Leading meetings

- Managing teams

- Reporting analytics

- Servicing customers



Skills and Qualifications

Essential:

- Persistence and determination

- Proposal writing skills

- Time management

- Product knowledge

- Customer service proficiency

- Strong English speaking/writing skills

- Reliable internet connection



Ideal Candidate Qualities

- Flexible and eager to learn

- High integrity and commitment

- Relentless execution

- Ability to work independently

- Competitive spirit

- Receptive to constructive criticism

- Effective communication skills



Benefits



Music Manager Incentive Program

The program motivates music managers to achieve monthly revenue goals, fostering a productive environment.



Eligibility: Current management team as of Jan 12, 2025

New hires must be with Pex Life Records for 6 months to qualify

Monthly Revenue Goals and Benefits:

- At $1,200 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $675 Minimum

- Commission: 10% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: 13th Month Pay, Internet Costs Reimbursement, Profit Sharing, PhilHealth Reimbursement



- At $2,400 Minimum:

- Guaranteed Pay: $900 Minimum

- Commission: 15% on qualifying sales

- Additional Benefits: Social Security System Reimbursement, Pag-IBIG Fund Reimbursement, 50% HMO Expenses, Profit Sharing

- Contractual Availability

- Flexible Scheduling: Choose your working days/hours

- Job Sharing: Train others to complete your tasks

- Revenue Lock-In Structure

- Contractual lock-in for pay based on hitting revenue goals over 2-12 months.

- Compensation

Monthly Salary: $505 USD (ifgoal isn't attained)

Start Date: 2 weeks after the interview (if selected)

Long-term Position: 32-40 hours/week

Available Hours: Sunday-Thursday 6:30 PM EST - 3:00 AM EST

Work Location: Remote



Only one position is available; apply now!



Application Instructions

In your proposal, please start with "purple elephant" to confirm you've read this job description. Include components of sales management such as writing proposals to acquire clients, appointment setting, and performing introductory calls to close clients. If we'd like to move forward, we'll send you a screening exercise followed by an interview invite if you pass.

title: Creative & Pinterest VA for Luxury Skincare Brand (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
*ABOUT US*'

Awo Body is a Ghanaian-owned sustainable skin and body care brand that blends West-African beauty rituals into modern staples. We hand-blend unrefined shea butter and nutrient-rich plant oils into whipped butters, body-shimmer oils, and exfoliating nets. Every batch is produced in small quantities, sourced ethically, and finished with a clean, minimalist aesthetic—because we believe self-care should feel both good for your body and environment. 



 Core Tasks

1. Design & schedule 2 Pinterest pins per day in Canva (templates & brand kit provided).



2. Crop/re-frame RAW photos Crop & re?frame RAW photos from brand shoots



3. Draft original Instagram caption ideas (5–6 per week) in our luxury-warm voice. Captions must be written by you—no ChatGPT-generated copy.



4. 4. Brand-Ambassador Management:



Manage the ambassador inbox, accept candidates, issue unique discount codes, and maintain the tracker.



Onboard new ambassadors and reach out to existing ones weekly to collect UGC (photos/reels) and confirm posts go live on schedule.



Flag top-performing ambassadors for potential collabs and or commission.



5. Weekly Report: pins published, impressions, new ambassadors onboarded, UGC pieces collected, and any red-flag issues.



Must-Have Skills

Canva (or Figma) for on-brand graphics.



Pinterest best-practices (keywords, title length, link pinning).



Solid written English; can match a luxury yet fun and friendly tone.



Google Sheets & Google Docs basics.



Nice to Have

Light Lightroom / Photopea retouching.



Experience with Planoly, Preview, Tailwind, or Metricool for scheduling.



 KPIs (for Day-61 raise)

14 pins published each week.



Ambassador tracker updated weekly.



5 edited UGC post (photo or reel) delivered weekly.



All tasks hit agreed deadlines.



To Apply

2–3 Canva pin samples or link to a Pinterest board you’ve designed.



One sentence on why Beauty and skincare matters to you.



Your weekly availability in EST.



Confirm you accept $3/hr starting.

title: Creative Marketing Assistant (Ads, Content & Customer Support)
description:
About the Role



We are a bathroom renovation company based in Scotland and we are hiring a full-time marketing assistant to help us grow. This is not a narrow specialist role. We need someone who takes ownership across advertising, content creation, and customer communication and who is always thinking about how to get us more leads.

You do not need years of experience, but you must be a fast learner, self-motivated, and genuinely interested in helping a business grow. If you do good work, this is a long-term role with bonuses tied to results.



--What You Will Be Doing

Generating and following up leads is the core of this job. That means:



Running and improving our Meta and Google Ads to bring in more enquiries

Creating ad creatives - videos, images, and hooks and constantly testing what works

Posting content on social media that showcases our bathroom projects and builds trust

Contacting new leads quickly and professionally through our CRM

Replying to customer messages and helping book appointments

Editing short videos using CapCut or similar tools

Assisting with website updates and general business support



--What We Are Looking For



Someone who takes initiative and does not need to be chased

Comfortable creating content and communicating with customers in English

Tech-savvy and quick to learn new tools

Organised, reliable, and detail-oriented

Experience with Canva, CapCut, Meta Ads, Google Ads, or CRM systems is a bonus but not required



--Work Schedule

Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM GMT (UK time)



--Salary

Competitive based on experience, paid monthly. Performance bonuses available based on business results.



--How to Apply

Send a message and include all of the following - applications missing any of these will not be considered:



Your expected monthly salary

Your English proficiency level

Examples of content, ads, or marketing work you have done

Dream holiday destination

Confirmation you can work Monday to Saturday, 9–5 GMT

title: CRO / Website Specialist (GoHighLevel + WordPress)
description:
We’re a growing U.S.-based marketing agency that helps service-based businesses grow through paid ads, landing pages, websites, funnels, and systems.



We’re looking for a CRO / Website Specialist who is very strong in GoHighLevel and WordPress.



Your main role will be building, editing, improving, and QA-ing websites and landing pages with a strong focus on conversion.



This is not mainly a graphic design role.

This is not mainly a Google Ads management role.



We want someone who is strongest at:

 • building pages in GHL

 • editing and improving sites in WordPress

 • making pages look clean and professional

 • improving mobile responsiveness

 • thinking through layout, flow, CTA placement, and conversion



You do not need to be an advanced Google Ads strategist, but it is a strong bonus if you understand the basics of Google Ads and how landing pages support paid traffic.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with a fast-moving agency and play an important role in helping client campaigns perform better.



(Directions on how to apply are at the bottom of this posting.)



JOB REQUIREMENTS

 • Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel

 • Strong hands-on experience with WordPress

 • Experience building and editing websites, landing pages, and funnels

 • Strong eye for layout, spacing, section structure, and mobile optimization

 • Able to build clean, high-converting pages from examples, briefs, or direction

 • Experience with forms, buttons, embeds, calendars, and basic integrations

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to QA your own work

 • Fast and accurate with revisions

 • Comfortable working across multiple client projects

 • Fluent written and spoken English

 • Good communicator

 • Reliable internet and dependable work habits

 • Available full time Monday–Friday



BONUS SKILLS (Nice to Have)

 • Basic to intermediate Google Ads experience

 • Understanding of how landing pages connect to paid traffic

 • Familiarity with conversion tracking

 • Experience with GA4, GTM, pixels, or event setup

 • Understanding of CRO / conversion principles

 • Experience with service business lead generation

 • Ability to spot weak headlines, poor CTA placement, cluttered layouts, or friction points on a page



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 • Building and editing websites in GoHighLevel and WordPress

 • Creating landing pages for paid traffic campaigns

 • Improving existing pages for better conversion

 • Making sites mobile responsive and clean across devices

 • Setting up forms, calendars, buttons, and page sections

 • Supporting website launches and page updates

 • QA-ing pages before they go live

 • Making ongoing edits and improvements for clients

 • Supporting ad-to-page funnel execution

 • Occasionally assisting with Google Ads-related tasks if you have experience there



IMPORTANT



This role is best for someone who is:

 • very strong in GHL

 • very solid in WordPress

 • interested in conversion-focused page building

 • at least somewhat familiar with Google Ads



We are looking for someone who can help us execute quickly, improve page quality, and support better campaign performance.



HOW TO APPLY

 1.
 us at 
 

 2. Use this subject line: CRO / Website Specialist – GHL + WordPress

 3. Attach your resume

 4. Include your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

 5. Include links to 3–5 pages or websites you have built or edited in GoHighLevel or WordPress

 6. Include a screenshot of your internet speed. 

 7.  In your
, answer these questions:

- How many years of experience do you have with GoHighLevel?

- How many years of experience do you have with WordPress?

- Which platform are you stronger in: GHL or WordPress?

- Have you built landing pages for paid ads before?

- What do you usually look for when trying to improve a landing page’s conversion rate?

- How much Google Ads experience do you have? (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced)

 8. Send us a short message here on OnlineJobs.ph letting us know you applied by



We’ll review applications and reply by
 with next steps for qualified candidates.



Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you.

Flexibility and Structure:



100% Remote Position: Work from anywhere.

Core Availability: Sunday–Thursday, 6:30 PM EST – 3:00 AM EST.

Work/Life Balance: We offer Flexible Scheduling (choose your working days/hours) and Job Sharing options.

Prospect Response Disclaimer: Maintain key client relationships by being available for 3-5 quick, 5–15 minute responses per week within a designated 8-hour window (e.g., 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM EST).



What We're Looking For (Skills & Qualities)



We need a relentless executor with an independent spirit and high integrity.

Essential: Superior proposal writing, persistence, time management, and strong English speaking/writing skills.

Ideal Candidate: Flexible, eager to learn, competitive, and receptive to constructive criticism.



Your Path to Full-Time: The Paid Audition



We skip the traditional hiring steps and go straight to evaluating your work. The process is designed to be fair, fast, and merit-based:

1 Submit your proposal.

2 Pass a screening exercise.

3 Participate in an interview.

4 Top candidates are selected for a paid audition to ensure a mutual fit before a full-time offer is extended.

Demonstrate your expertise in sales management (client acquisition, appointment setting, and closing calls) in your proposal. To ensure you've read these details, please begin your proposal with the phrase "purple elephant."

title: Vector Graphic Designer - Position 5
description:

tal signs for homes, businesses, and special events. With over 30 years of experience in sign manufacturing and metal fabrication, we pride ourselves on craftsmanship, attention to detail, and exceptional customer service. We sell across multiple e-commerce platforms and require multiple graphic designers for product development, social media, customer service- providing mockups and fulfillment of orders, and website product development.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
ROSE INJECTABLES — Virtual Assistant (Video Editing + Operations)

Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term | Start Immediately

WHO WE ARE

Rose Injectables is a physician-led women’s health and aesthetic boutique in Colorado Springs and Cañon City, CO. Founded by Dr. Liz Rose Knies, M.D. — board-certified emergency medicine physician and aesthetics specialist — we are more than a medspa. We serve women from 15+ states, hold a 5.0 Google rating with 379+ reviews, and have trained 5,000+ providers nationwide. We are growing fast and need a sharp, reliable VA to grow with us.

OUR 2026 STANDARD: CONSISTENCY. We need someone who executes the same high standard perfectly, every time.

THE ROLE — HOW IT GROWS

This is a long-term position that starts with one responsibility and expands as you prove your skills.

PHASE 1 (Start): Video Content Editing

• Edit short-form Instagram Reels from raw 4K iPhone footage per our Brand Playbook

• Use Meta Reels Editor (preferred) or Adobe Premiere Rush / CapCut Pro

• Apply our 5-Part Video Structure with on-screen hook word overlays

• Generate, proofread, and burn in closed captions — brand fonts and colors only

• Write Instagram captions in brand voice with correct hashtags and landing page links

• Submit via Slack, WhatsApp, or Dropbox — detailed playbook provided

• KPI: 0–1 revisions per video. Bonus affected by 2+ revisions.

PHASE 2 (Added after Phase 1 mastered):
 Management

• Manage Dr. Liz’s
 using our GPS category system (!1Liz ? 8Delete)

• Draft professional responses on behalf of Dr. Liz — correct English required

• Flag critical
s immediately; manage travel and event calendar updates across Zenoti, Cozy, and wall calendars

• Notify tea
mbers of schedule changes

PHASE 3 (Added after Phase 2 mastered): Outreach & Lead Support

• Follow up with new patient leads via
 and Jotform — warm, professional English

• Support appointment booking via Zenoti

• Assist with 2x/month newsletter production and content calendar maintenance

• Report weekly on leads, consultations, and conversions

REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE

? Excellent written and spoken English — you will write for our brand and communicate with real patients

? Reliable high-speed internet (include a Speedtest screenshot with your application)

? Full dedication during your Rose Injectables hours — no other clients simultaneously

? Willingness to follow a detailed playbook exactly

? Honest communication — ask before you guess

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Portfolio of short-form video edits (Reels, TikTok, or similar)

• Experience managing an executive’s
 inbox

• Health, wellness, beauty, or medical aesthetic experience a plus

• Familiarity with Meta Business Suite / Instagram best practices

TOOLS YOU WILL USE

Meta Reels Editor, CapCut Pro, Adobe Premiere Rush, Canva, Slack, WhatsApp, Dropbox, Zenoti, Jotform, HeyOrca, Gmail

HOURS & PAY

• Start: 10–15 hours per week, growing to 20+ as phases expand

• Base rate + bonus/commission tied to KPIs

• Rate increases with each phase progression

• Long-term position — we invest in people who invest in us

HOW TO APPLY



Respond here

Subject: VA Application — [Your Name] — Video Editing

Include:

 1. Resume or work history summary

 2. 2–3 short-form video editing samples (Reels or TikTok)

 3. English writing sample: In 2–3 paragraphs, describe a content or social media project you worked on — the goal, what you did, and the result

 4. Brief video introduction (max 2 minutes): Who you are, why you want to work with a women’s health brand, and what you know about Rose Injectables

 5. Speedtest.net screenshot

 6. Hours available per week and your time zone

Applications without a video sample and writing sample will not be reviewed. Shortlisted applicants will receive a paid skills test — a real edit using our brand playbook.

title: Senior Customer Support Specialist – DTC Supplement Brands (Shopify/Zendesk)
description:
We run 5 supplement/wellness brands on Shopify and are looking for one experienced support specialist to join our small team. This isn't entry-level — we need someone who's been doing this for years and can step in confidently from day one.

Our flows and macros are built out. We need someone who can follow them precisely, move fast, and also use good judgment to craft warm, human responses when the situation calls for it.



What You'll Do:



Handle 50+ tickets/hour via Zendesk using pre-built flows

Manage subscriptions in Loop (cancellations, skips, pauses, billing)

Track and troubleshoot orders via Shopify + 17Track

De-escalate sensitive situations with empathy

Work independently with minimal oversight



Must-Haves (Required):



5–7+ years of Zendesk + Shopify customer support experience

Hands-on experience with subscription platforms (Loop, Seal, or similar) — actually cancelling, pausing, and managing subscriptions

Previous experience supporting supplement, wellness, or health brands
