title: Part-Time Shopify E-Commerce Manager
description:
PART-TIME SHOPIFY E-COMMERCE MANAGER

Soft Wash Technologies | Remote | ~10 hrs/week |$5.50 - $7.50 /hour



You know what a great Shopify store looks like — and more importantly, you know what a broken one looks like.



We sell pressure washing and soft washing equipment to professional contractors across the US. Our store is the business. When it's sharp, clear, and easy to buy from, contractors trust us. When it's not, they leave.

We're looking for one person to own the site.





A TYPICAL WEEK LOOKS LIKE THIS:



You log in, check the store, and notice the homepage banner is still promoting last month's sale. You swap it. You see a product description that reads like a spec sheet — you rewrite it so a contractor actually understands why they need it. You check Microsoft Clarity and spot that mobile visitors are dropping off on a collection page. You dig in and fix it. You publish a blog post you've been working on that targets a keyword you found during research. You update two FAQ answers that were outdated. You resize and optimize a few product images that were loading too slow.

Then you hop over to our Amazon and eBay listings — we only cross-post a handful of products there, but you make sure the inventory counts match, the images look right, and the descriptions aren't stale. It's not a huge lift, but if something's off, you catch it.

That's the job. Nobody tells you to do most of this. You just see it and handle it.





YOU'LL USE:



Shopify (daily), Amazon Seller Central, eBay Seller Hub, Canva, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity, Notion, and GoHighLevel (we'll train you on GHL).





YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF:



You've actually managed a Shopify store — not just "set one up once." You've touched Amazon or eBay seller accounts enough to keep listings clean and accurate. You write product copy that sounds like a human talking to another human, not a keyword-stuffed robot. You can do basic image editing without being asked. You understand on-page SEO well enough to do it, not just talk about it. And you don't need someone checking in on you every day to make sure the work got done.





TO APPLY:



Take a look at 
. Send us a short message that includes one specific thing you'd change on the site and why. Include a link to a Shopify store you've worked on, or screenshots.

That's it. No novel. No generic cover letter. Just show us you looked.

title: AI Video Creator & Script Editor Specialist (Short Dramas) (Remote - Philippines)
description:
Company: MetaOne



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $3.00 - $4.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



About Us:

We are MetaOne, an innovative content creation team operating as a high-speed "Digital Assembly Line." We are currently building rapidly growing channels focused on short-form AI drama videos (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts). Our production spans two distinct types of content: engaging, story-driven dramas for adults, and fun, captivating stories for kids.



The Role:

We are looking for a highly creative AI Video Creator & Script Editor who can take existing scripts, use AI to rewrite them into fresh, original stories, and bring them to life using cutting-edge AI video, image, and voice generation tools. In this role, you will own the entire AI video production process from script adaptation to final assembly, ensuring high retention and viral potential for every video.



Key Responsibilities:



Script Alteration & Writing: Use ChatGPT, Claude, or similar AI tools to take existing drama scripts and rewrite them into entirely new storylines with different characters, settings, and plots.



AI Video & Image Generation: Prompt and generate high-quality visual assets using the latest AI tools (such as Midjourney, Runway Gen-2, Kling, Pika, or similar).



AI Voiceovers & Audio: Generate realistic character voices and engaging narration using tools like ElevenLabs, and mix in appropriate background music and sound effects.



Video Editing & Assembly: Put the AI-generated clips, voiceovers, music, and subtitles together using CapCut or Premiere Pro. Ensure the pacing is highly engaging to hook and retain viewers.



Audience Adaptation: Seamlessly switch gears between creating mature, compelling dramatic storylines for adults, and safe, colorful, fast-paced videos for children.



Requirements:



Proven AI Production Experience: Must have a strong portfolio showcasing AI-generated videos you have produced from start to finish. (Applications without a portfolio will not be considered).



Prompt Engineering Skills: Strong understanding of how to prompt effectively for both text (ChatGPT/Claude) and visuals (Midjourney/AI Video tools).



Editing & Pacing: Excellent video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere) with a sharp instinct for storytelling, pacing, and creating strong visual hooks.



Strong English Comprehension: You must be able to ensure scripts make sense, flow naturally, and hit the right dramatic beats.



High-Volume Execution: Ability to work efficiently, manage your time well, and produce a consistent volume of short videos each week.



How to Apply:

If you are a storyteller who loves pushing the limits of AI video tools, we want to see what you can create! Please submit your resume along with links to your AI video portfolio or past work. Please make sure to leave us your WhatsApp number so we can contact you directly.



Please note: This position begins with a 2-week trial period to ensure it is a great fit for both sides. The trial period is compensated at $3.00 USD per hour, and you will be paid weekly via Wise.

title: AI Content Assembly & Operations Assistant (Remote - Philippines)
description:

Schedule: Standard Philippine daytime hours



About Us:

We are MetaOne, a fast-growing, fully remote AI-First Automation Agency and Media Company. We operate as a high-speed "Content Factory" to mass-produce social media content, e-commerce assets, and short AI videos. We rely on smart tools, clear systems, and dedicated tea
mbers to keep our production moving efficiently.



The Role:

We are looking for a highly organized AI Content Assembly Assistant to join our operations team. You do not need to be an advanced AI expert—our creative leads will handle the complex prompt engineering. Your job is to be the hands-on assembler for our digital media pipelines. You will take raw AI-generated images, scripts, and voiceovers, and put them together following strict step-by-step SOPs. If you follow instructions perfectly and love high-volume, repetitive creative assembly, this is the perfect job for you.



Key Responsibilities:



Basic Video Assembly: Use CapCut to stitch together pre-generated AI video clips, add provided voiceovers, and insert standard subtitles for short-form content (TikToks, Reels).



Graphic Formatting: Take AI-generated images and drop them into our pre-made Canva templates to create clean, consistent social media and e-commerce posts.



SOP Execution: Copy and paste standard, pre-written prompts into ChatGPT or other basic AI tools to generate bulk text (like product descriptions or video titles).



Content Scheduling: Upload final videos and graphics to social media platforms or scheduling tools exactly as instructed.



File Organization: Keep all generated assets, final videos, and scripts perfectly organized and accurately labeled in our shared workspace (Lark/Google Drive).



Requirements:



Tool Proficiency: Solid, basic experience in graphic design using Canva and video editing using CapCut.



Detail-Oriented: You must be able to follow strict Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) without missing a single step.



Highly Organized: Excellent file management skills to keep our high volume of digital assets sorted in Google Drive/Lark.



Reliable Communicator: Good English communication skills and a highly reliable internet connection.



Availability: Ability to work full-time during standard Philippine daytime hours.



How to Apply:

If you are incredibly organized, love putting the pieces together, and thrive on executing clear instructions, we want you on our team! Please submit your resume along with a brief message highlighting your experience with Canva, CapCut, and following detailed SOPs. Please make sure to leave us your WhatsApp number so we can contact you directly.

title: Social Media & UGC Manager – DTC
description:
Social Media & UGC Manager – DTC Apparel Brand

Location: Remote?Type: Full-Time?Industry: DTC E-commerce / Apparel



What We’re Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced Social Media & UGC Manager who has previously worked in a similar role for established DTC brands.

This role requires someone who understands how UGC content drives growth for e-commerce brands and has experience working in high-volume creative environments.

Our brand scales through UGC-driven content, paid social ads, and creative campaigns, meaning a large part of our growth depends on strong creator relationships and a constant pipeline of new content.

You’ll work closely with our Creative Strategist and marketing team, helping source creators, coordinate content production, and ensure we consistently produce high-performing UGC creatives for both paid ads and social media.

This is not an entry-level role.

You must have previous experience working with larger DTC brands and managing UGC creators or influencer pipelines at scale.

Experience within fashion, apparel, lingerie, or female-focused brands is a strong advantage.



Your Role

Your main focus will be managing the UGC creator pipeline and social media presence for the brand.



UGC Creator Outreach

A large part of your role will be finding and contacting new UGC creators daily.

This includes:

* researching creators on TikTok and Instagram

* identifying creators who match the brand aesthetic

* reaching out to creators for collaborations

* onboarding creators into our content pipeline

You should be comfortable with consistent daily outreach and creator sourcing.



Creator Relationship Management

Maintain and grow relationships with existing creators working with the brand.

This includes:

* coordinating new content ideas

* organizing deliverables

* maintaining long-term creator partnerships

* ensuring creators consistently produce new content



UGC Research & Creative Collaboration

Work closely with the Creative Strategist to:

* research trending UGC formats

* identify new creator angles and content ideas

* source creators that match campaign needs

* support creative testing for paid ads



Social Media Management

In addition to creator management, you will also support the brand’s organic social media presence.

Responsibilities include:

* posting regularly on social media

* maintaining a consistent content flow

* helping plan and schedule posts

Platforms include:

* TikTok

* Instagram



Content Planning & Organization

Help maintain a strong content pipeline by:

* organizing creator campaigns

* tracking UGC deliverables

* maintaining content calendars

* ensuring the team always has new content ready for ads and social



Required Experience

This role requires proven experience working in a similar role.

You must have experience with:

* UGC creator sourcing

* creator outreach

* influencer coordination

* content pipelines for DTC brands

* TikTok and Instagram content ecosystems

You should also have experience working with larger or fast-scaling DTC brands.

Strong preference for candidates who have worked with:

* fashion brands

* apparel brands

* lingerie or underwear brands

* female-focused brands



Skills We Value

You should be someone who:

* is highly organized

* communicates clearly with creators

* understands TikTok and Instagram culture

* can identify creators that fit a brand quickly

* works proactively and independently

You should also understand how UGC content is used for paid ads and performance marketing.



Tools & Workflow

Please mention the tools you work with.

Typical tools may include:

* Notion

* Slack

* Google Sheets

* creator outreach systems

* social media scheduling tools

Bonus if you have experience with:

* UGC platforms

* influencer databases

* AI tools that improve workflow and research



What We Offer

* Full-time position

* Competitive salary

* Performance-based bonuses

* Work with a fast-growing DTC apparel brand

* Be part of a high-performance creative team

* Opportunity for long-term growth within the company



How To Apply (Important)

To apply, please include:

1. Your CV

2. A list of DTC brands you have worked with

3. Examples of UGC creators or campaigns you have sourced

4. A short explanation of what you could contribute to our brand

5. The tools and systems you use for outreach and organization



To confirm you read this posting, include the word:

"Apperal"

at the end of your application.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor – Short-Form Social (Instagram & TikTok)
description:
We're a small, mission-driven children's brand rooted in cultural representation, joy, and belonging. 



We're looking for a video editor who gets us. Not someone who edits content — someone who can feel the story in raw footage and shape it into something that stops the scroll and earns the follow.



What you'll be doing:

Editing short-form video (15 seconds to 3 minutes) for Instagram Reels and TikTok — from raw footage of our products, community 
nts, and behind-the-scenes clips. You'll own the edit: clip selection, pacing, transitions, audio, and a soft CTA that feels native to our brand. Turnaround is typically 24–48 hours.



The style we're going for:

Before you apply, watch this: 


==





This is the quality, feel, and emotional tone we're building toward. Warm. Intentional. Scroll-stopping. If you watch it and immediately start thinking about how you'd approach it — you might be our person.



You're the right fit if:

- You have a strong portfolio of short-form edits that have actually grown accounts (followers, engagement, comments — show us the receipts)

- You understand what makes someone stop, watch, and share — and you build for that from the first frame

- You know CapCut (or similar) inside out and stay ahead of trends without chasing them blindly

- You're fast, communicative, and don't need hand-holding to deliver

- You genuinely care about brands with heart and a mission — this isn't just a gig to you



To apply, send us:

1. 2–3 examples of short-form edits in a similar emotional or lifestyle style — your most relevant work, not your full portfolio

2. One Instagram or TikTok account you've edited for (we want to see real-world results, not just clips)

3. A short note telling us: why this kind of brand resonates with you, what you're looking for in a long-term creative partnership, and your typical availability (EST time)

4. Your rate in CAD and weekly capacity 

5. Typical turnaround time



Generic applications won't be reviewed. We want to hear your voice and see that you understand the kind of content we're building. Watch the reference video. Then tell us why you're the right fit.

title: Customer Service Manager A+
description:
Customer Service Manager – DTC Apparel Brand

Location: Remote?Type: Full-Time?Industry: DTC E-commerce / Apparel



What We’re Looking For

We’re looking for an experienced Customer Service Manager who has previously managed support teams for established DTC brands.

Customer experience is a critical part of our brand, and this role requires someone who understands how high-performing customer support teams operate in fast-growing e-commerce environments.

You will be responsible for leading and managing our customer support team, improving systems and workflows, and ensuring the team consistently delivers high-quality support while maintaining strong operational efficiency.

This is a senior role, and we are specifically looking for someone who has experience managing larger support teams within DTC e-commerce companies.

Experience working with fashion, apparel, or high-volume e-commerce brands is a strong advantage.



Your Role

You will oversee the entire customer support operation, ensuring the team operates efficiently while delivering excellent customer experiences.



Team Leadership & Management

You will be responsible for leading and managing the customer support team, including:

* overseeing daily support operations

* managing support agents

* improving team workflows

* ensuring high-quality responses and customer satisfaction

You should have experience managing larger support teams and maintaining strong team performance.



Support Systems & Tools

You should be experienced working with modern support systems, such as:

* Zendesk

* Freshdesk

* Gorgias

* or similar customer support platforms

You should understand how to build efficient ticketing systems, workflows, and automation.



KPI Management

You will be responsible for managing and improving customer support KPIs, including:

* response times

* resolution times

* customer satisfaction (CSAT)

* ticket volume management

You should have experience tracking and reporting performance metrics for your team.



Refunds, Exchanges & Operational Efficiency

You should have experience managing refund and exchange processes within DTC brands.

A key part of the role is working on strategies that help:

* reduce unnecessary refunds

* lower exchange rates

* improve customer satisfaction

* optimize operational processes

This requires understanding customer behavior, policies, and internal workflows.



Performance Tracking & Reporting

You will be responsible for tracking team performance and support metrics, including:

* agent productivity

* ticket resolution quality

* response time improvements

* operational efficiency

You should be comfortable building reports and tracking systems that help the team continuously improve.



Required Experience

This role requires proven experience managing customer support teams for DTC brands.

You must have experience with:

* managing customer support teams

* handling high ticket volumes

* customer support systems (Zendesk, Freshdesk, etc.)

* KPI tracking and performance management

* refunds and exchange management

Strong preference for candidates who have worked with:

* fast-scaling DTC brands

* fashion or apparel brands

* high-volume e-commerce businesses



Skills We Value

You should be someone who:

* is highly organized

* leads teams effectively

* understands customer behavior in e-commerce

* can optimize workflows and systems

* focuses on both customer experience and operational efficiency



What We Offer

* Full-time position

* Competitive salary

* Performance-based bonuses

* Work with a fast-growing DTC apparel brand

* Lead and develop a high-performance support team

* Long-term opportunity to grow within the company



How To Apply (Important)

We are looking for detailed applications only.

Your application must include:

1. Your CV

2. A list of DTC brands you have worked with

3. The size of the customer support team you have managed

4. Which customer support systems you have worked with (Zendesk, Freshdesk, etc.)

5. Your strengths as a Customer Service Manager

6. How you have worked to reduce refunds and exchanges

7. How you track and manage team KPIs

8. How you measure and improve support team performance



To confirm you read the full posting, include the word:

"Apperal"

at the end of your application.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



If you have experience managing high-performing customer support teams for DTC brands, we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Part -Time Virtual Assistant
description:
**Job Description:**



???? Do a little of everything. Grow into everything. Long-term role with a fast-growing US healthcare company.



???? $200–$400/month USD | Start Part-Time (20 hrs) | Path to Full-Time | 100% Remote



---



**ABOUT US**



We run a growing portfolio of US healthcare businesses in Connecticut — in-home companion care, remote patient monitoring, medical equipment supply, adult day programs, disability services, medical waste pickup, and patient transportation. We are expanding fast and need one reliable all-around VA to help keep everything running.



Our Philippines-based VA team is a core part of how we operate — not an afterthought. You will get clear tasks every day, direct communication with the owner, and a real opportunity to grow into a higher-paying full-time role as the company scales. We pay on time, we treat our team well, and we promote people who perform.



---



**WHAT THIS ROLE IS**



This is a generalist VA role. You will rotate across multiple functions — outreach, billing support, patient monitoring coordination, caregiver scheduling, CRM management, reporting, and admin. The owner assigns your priority tasks each morning via Slack and you report back each evening.



This is the right role for you if:

? You are organized and reliable above all else

? You like variety — you do not want to do the same task for 8 hours straight

? You want to learn how US healthcare businesses actually work from the inside

? You are ambitious — you want more hours, more responsibility, and more pay over time

? You can work independently once given a task — no micromanagement needed here



---



**YOUR DAILY TASKS (Rotated Based on Priority)**



LEAD GENERATION & OUTREACH

- Build contact lists of doctors, clinics, hospitals, dental offices, and discharge planners in Connecticut using Google and healthcare directories

- Send outbound
s and LinkedIn messages using templates provided

- Make follow-up calls to warm leads using OpenPhone VOIP (scripts provided)

- Book qualified appointments into the owner's calendar

- Update all lead activity in HubSpot CRM daily



BILLING & CLAIMS SUPPORT

- Track claim submission status and flag unpaid or denied claims

- Assist with patient eligibility checks and document prep

- Follow up with insurance payers via portal or phone on outstanding claims

- Maintain organized billing records in shared Google Drive



PATIENT MONITORING COORDINATION (RPM)

- Log in to RPM dashboard each morning and review patient vital sign alerts

- Send check-in messages or reminders to patients (scripts provided)

- Document all patient interactions in the platform for billing compliance

- Escalate any abnormal readings immediately to the supervising clinician



SCHEDULING & CAREGIVER COORDINATION

- Keep caregiver schedules updated in AxisCare scheduling software

- Confirm visits with caregivers 24 hours in advance

- Find replacement caregivers quickly when a call-out happens

- Match new clients to available caregivers based on location and availability



GENERAL OPERATIONS & ADMIN

- CRM data entry and cleanup in HubSpot

- Internet research — find contacts, verify information, compile lists

- Prepare daily and weekly summary reports in Google Sheets

- Post job ads for caregiver recruiting and do initial applicant screening

- Handle ad hoc tasks assigned by the owner each day



---



**YOUR DAILY ROUTINE**



Start of shift — Check Slack for owner's priority tasks. Review RPM dashboard alerts. Send daily check-in message to owner.



First half — Work on the day's #1 priority (outreach, scheduling, billing, monitoring, or admin).



Second half — Complete supporting tasks, prepare reports, finish outstanding follow-ups.



End of shift — Submit daily EOD report to owner via Slack: tasks completed, leads added, calls made, issues flagged.



---



**HOW WE MEASURE YOUR PERFORMANCE**



? Daily EOD report submitted to owner via Slack — every single day

? All assigned tasks completed same day unless otherwise agreed

? CRM updated same day for every interaction

? Zero missed scheduling coverage — call-outs resolved within 2 hours

? RPM patient alerts reviewed every morning by 8 AM PHT

? Owner never has to chase you for an update — you communicate proactively



---



**REQUIREMENTS**



- Strong written and spoken English — you will be
ing, calling, and messaging US healthcare professionals and patients

- Proficient in Google Workspace: Gmail, Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Drive

- Organized, reliable, and self-directed — you execute without being reminded

- Responsive on Slack during work hours — messages answered within 30–60 minutes

- Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace (required for calls)

- Available US Eastern Time hours — minimum 9 AM–1 PM EST Monday–Friday

- At least 1 year of VA, admin, or professional experience of any kind

- Willing to learn multiple types of tasks — this is not a single-function role



---



**NICE TO HAVE (Will move you to the top of the list)**



- Prior experience with any US healthcare company, medical office, or insurance billing

- Familiarity with HubSpot or any CRM

- Experience making outbound calls to US businesses or professionals

- Background in scheduling, staffing coordination, or operations

- Any exposure to Medicare, Medicaid, or health insurance terminology

- Experience with AxisCare, Brightree, or any home care or billing software



---



**TOOLS YOU WILL USE**



HubSpot (CRM) | OpenPhone (outbound calls) | Slack (team communication) | AxisCare (caregiver scheduling) | Optimize Health or Prevounce (RPM monitoring) | Google Workspace | Zoom | Wise (how you get paid)



Training is provided on all healthcare-specific tools. You just need to be comfortable learning new software quickly.



---



**COMPENSATION & GROWTH PATH**



- Starting: $200–$300/month for 20 hours/week (part-time)

- Full-time: $350–$400/month for 40 hours/week once promoted

- Pay date: 1st of every month via Wise — no delays, no excuses

- Raises: Performance-based as you take on more and deliver results

- Bonuses: Available for hitting key milestones

- Path: General VA ? Senior VA ? Department Lead as we expand to more states



---



**WHAT WE OFFER**



? Steady, long-term position — we are building a company, not a short-term project

? Paid on time every month — we have never missed a VA payment

? Direct access to the owner — fast answers, no layers of management

? Real growth path — we promote from within

? Variety every day — you will never be bored

? Learn how multiple US healthcare businesses work from the inside

? Full training provided on all healthcare-specific platforms

? Supportive team of fellow Philippines-based VAs



---



**HOW TO APPLY**



Send a message with ALL of the following — applications missing any of these will not be reviewed:



1. Start with: "Healthcare VA — [Your Name]"

2. 2–3 sentences about your background and what VA work you have done before

3. Which of the tasks listed above you are most comfortable with and why

4. Which tasks are new to you — be honest, we value honesty over exaggeration

5. Confirm: Can you work 9 AM–1 PM US Eastern Time (EST) Monday–Friday?

6. How many hours per week are you available right now?

7. Your internet speed — paste your result from speedtest.net

8. Your
 or Zoom ID for a short intro call



We read every application. Generic copy-paste messages will not get a response. Tell us something real — what you are good at, what you want to learn, and why this role fits where you want to go. We are looking for one person who is genuinely reliable and wants to grow with us for years, not months.



---



**Salary:** $200–$400/month USD

**Hours:** Part-time (20 hrs/week) to start — full-time path available

**Schedule:** Monday–Friday, US Eastern Time

**Location:** Remote — Philippines

title: Customer Support (Written) | No Experience Needed | FUN| Dance Academy
description:
***READ FULL JOB POST BEFORE APPLYING. *** Please don't waste your time or ours. Thanks :)



Full-time, long-term opportunity.



Four days per week, or five days per week scheduling options.



Looking for:

- Outstanding English

- Empathy



Our communications with students are FRIENDLY, FUN, and PERSONAL.



ABOUT US

We are the largest salsa & bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and are growing rapidly.



The culture here is FUN, fast, and friendly. Our goal is to make every student feel welcome and completely taken care of.



Dancing changes lives - we are on a mission to deliver the best salsa/bachata educational experience on Earth.



The company is MaS Dance Academy.





ABOUT YOUR TEAM

Working with a remote team that helps with all facets of the business, you'll form a close working relationship and bond with your team mates. We even host team retreats in the Philippines!



----------------------------

SCHEDULE

All times written in PST (Los Angeles time)



TRAINING (2-4 weeks):

Sunday - Thursday 9am - 6pm (with 1 hour break)



AFTER TRAINING



Both options are full-time 40 hours per week.



OPTION 1 - FIVE DAY SCHEDULE:

Thursday - Monday 8am - 5pm (with 1 hour break)



OPTION 2 - FOUR DAY SCHEDULE:

Saturday, Tuesday, Wednesday 10am - 9pm (with 1 hour break)

Friday 12pm (noon) - 11pm (with 1 hour break)

----------------------------



YOUR ROLE

• Your primary role is written student support (text,
 etc.)

• When there are no support tasks to complete, you'll contribute in a wide variety of other ways, depending on your skills and interests. Some examples may include writing blogs, updating websites, doing research, collecting and analyzing numerical data and using it to create reports, etc.





WRITTEN VS PHONE SUPPORT

• 95% of our student support is written. However, occasionally you will need to be on the phone with a student. You must be comfortable on the phone.





TYPES OF SUPPORT YOU'LL HANDLE

• One on one texting and
ing

• Mass texting and
ing

• Occasional phone calls (rare)

• Updating database after every interaction and attempted interaction

• Daily reports

• Etc.





COMPANY CULTURE

Working in a small business like ours is very different from a large corporation. Some of the differences are:



• Personal tone: Our communications with students are FRIENDLY, FUN, and PERSONAL. It's like talking to your best friend. We use emoji's and exclamation points and are very personal. We take the opposite approach of large corporations that give robotic, frustrating, not very helpful support. You need to be intuitive and have strong emotional intelligence to feel what the students are needing when they communicate.



• More creativity: there is more freedom to adjust your responses for each scenario. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting.



• Impact: your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see



• Feedback: your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! We want everyone here thinking as if they were the business owner.





ABOUT YOU

• Perfect written English

• Available full-time

• High emotional intelligence

• Flexible

• Quick learner

• Thrives in fast-paced, quickly changing environment

• Desire to always seek better ways to do things, including finding ways to use A.I. tools

• Happy to be on the phone when needed (which is rarely)

• Tremendous attention to detail - gets things right the first time

• PRO-ACTIVE. Always looking for ways to improve.

• Meticulous, organized, methodical. Almost never misses a detail.

• Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task.

• Not afraid to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinion on the approaches that we take so that we can improve.

• Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time

• Strong communicator

• Makes decisions independently

• Quick learner

• Fast computer

• Fast, dependable Internet

• Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata or any dance!





APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:

1. A brief intro about yourself



2. Are you happy to be on the phone when needed?



3. This is a fast-paced environment with quickly changing conditions. You’ll need to be able to think quickly on your feet and track dozens of moving pieces at once with precision and accuracy. This role is NOT for people who feel overly anxious in this type of environment. Apply only if you thrive in such an environment. Based on this information, do you still feel this role is a good fit for you?



4. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application the answers to the assessment in the link above: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit) 4. Highest level of formal education



6. Any customer support experience? If yes, please describe.



7. Which of the two scheduling options do you prefer?



8. These positions are competitive, often with hundreds of applicants. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 us off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, we personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Floor Plan Specialist (Metric Scaling & Data Entry)
description:
Pay:  Approx $7.25 USD per hour



Job Type: Freelance / Per Task (Volume varies)  



About the Role:



SKG Real Estate Media is looking for a technical Floor Plan VA to help us achieve RMS (Residential Measurement Standard) compliance for our real estate listings. We use CubiCasa to generate initial layouts, but we need a specialist to "anchor" those plans to our on-site laser measurements to ensure 100?curacy.  



This is a repetitive, detail-oriented task. We provide the formulas and templates; you provide the precision.



Key Responsibilities:



Scale SVG Files: Take raw CubiCasa SVG floor plans and resize the perimeter to match on-site laser measurements provided by our team.



Perimeter Sketching: Create clear perimeter sketches (excluding interior walls) that show all exterior dimensions in metric, exactly like our provided examples.  



Wall Thickness: Apply the specific exterior wall thickness measurements we provide for each property.



Data Entry: Input metric room dimensions and property details (Agent name, address, etc.) into our Google Sheets template.  



Formula-Based Conversion: Our sheets automatically convert Metric to Imperial; you simply need to input the metric data and delete any unused line items to keep the report clean.  



The Schedule (Hard Deadline)



Turnaround: All assigned tasks from the previous day must be completed and delivered by 9:00 a.m. MST (Alberta Time).



Volume: This is a "per task" role. Some months are very busy, others are slower. There is no guaranteed weekly minimum.



If you apply, you must put FLOOR PLAN in the subject field or your application will be ignored.



Requirements



Software Agnostic: Use any software (AutoCAD, Illustrator, etc.) as long as the final sketches are perfectly accurate and professional.  



Metric Proficiency: You will work entirely in Metric; our system handles the conversions.  



Detail Obsessed: You must be comfortable deleting unnecessary rows and formatting the sheet to look "client-ready".  



How to Apply (Trial Task)



To be considered, please reply with your experience in floor plan scaling. I will then send you a "Test Package" containing:



An SVG file.



On-site laser measurements (including wall thickness).



A Google Sheet template.



An example of a finished RMS sheet.  



Your trial task will be to scale the SVG, create the perimeter sketches, and fill out the template based on the data provided.

title: AI Agent Architect & Autonomous Workflow Builder (Remote - Philippines)
description:
Company: MetaOne



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $4.00 - $6.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



About Us:

We are MetaOne, a high-speed, fully remote AI-First Automation Agency and Media Company operating as a "Digital Assembly Line." We do not do things manually, and we don't just string together basic Zapier triggers—we build autonomous machines. We are currently building a fully automated "Content Factory" utilizing multi-agent AI systems, and we need top-tier technical talent to build our digital workforce.



The Role:

We are seeking a highly technical AI Agent Architect to serve as the orchestrator of our AI workforce. You will be responsible for moving us beyond linear automations and into autonomous AI agent swarms. By using advanced LLM orchestration, custom Python/Node scripts, and agent frameworks, you will build systems where AI agents talk to each other, critique their own work, and mass-produce high-fidelity content and e-commerce campaigns with zero human intervention.



Key Responsibilities:



Multi-Agent Content Factories: Design workflows where a "Research Agent" briefs a "Scriptwriting Agent," which then hands off data to media generation APIs (ElevenLabs, Midjourney, HeyGen, Runway) to autonomously assemble short-form video and drama content.



Autonomous E-Commerce Pods: Create AI agents that scrape competitor data, write highly-converting product copy, generate AI-enhanced visuals, and automatically push them to Shopify and Meta/TikTok Ad Managers.



RAG & Knowledge Integration: Build and maintain vector databases/RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems so our AI agents perfectly understand our brand voice, past winning ads, and internal SOPs.



API Orchestration: Seamlessly connect complex language models (GPT-4, Claude 3, Llama) with external web-scraping tools, social media APIs, and our enterprise workspace (Lark).



Self-Correcting Pipelines: Build logic loops where agents review generated content for quality and brand safety before anything is published to social media or ad platforms.



Requirements:



Agent Framework Experience: Hands-on experience building with frameworks like CrewAI, AutoGen, LangChain, Flowise, or Dify.



Advanced Coding Skills: Strong proficiency in Python or Node.js to write custom API connectors and logic when off-the-shelf tools fail.



Deep API Knowledge: You must be incredibly comfortable reading complex API documentation and integrating AI image, video, text, and social posting endpoints.



The "Builder" Mindset: You don't wait for a YouTube tutorial. When a new AI model drops, you are the first one figuring out how to plug it into an automated workflow.



Excellent Communicator: Clear written and video communication skills in English to explain complex technical workflows to the management team.



How to Apply:

If you are a highly technical builder who wants to push the absolute limits of AI automation, we want you on our team! Please submit your resume along with a brief message explaining a complex AI automation or agent workflow you have built in the past. Please make sure to leave us your WhatsApp number so we can contact you directly.



Please note: This position begins with a 2-week trial period to ensure it is a great fit for both sides. The trial period is compensated at $4.00 USD per hour, and you will be paid weekly via Wise.

title: Canadian P&C Insurance Quoting Specialist (EST Night Shift)
description:
Compensation: $5.60 – $7.50 USD per hour (Approx. $900 – $1,200 USD / 50,000 – 66,000 PHP per month based on a 40-hour work week).

Schedule: Full-Time, Night Shift (Working Eastern Standard Time / EST)

Location: Remote (Work From Home - Philippines)



About Us:

We are a tech-enabled offshore staffing agency providing premium back-office support strictly to Canadian Property & Casualty (P&C) insurance brokerages. We equip our team with proprietary "Metaone" workflow automation, making your job smoother, faster, and more efficient. We are looking for an elite Quoting Support Specialist who deeply understands the Canadian insurance market to help our licensed brokers close more deals.



About the Role:

This is NOT a sales role, and there is ZERO cold calling. You will strictly operate as behind-the-scenes administrative support, ensuring full compliance with Canadian provincial licensing regulations.



Your primary job is to act as a "time multiplier" for our Canadian brokers. When a broker collects a client's information, you will take that raw data and accurately input it into Canadian rating engines. You will generate a clean, accurate pricing spreadsheet and send it back to the broker so they can make the sale.



Key Responsibilities:



Receive raw client data (Canadian Driver's License numbers, 17-digit VINs, Postal Codes, home square footage, claims history) from local brokers.



Perform rapid, highly accurate data entry into Canadian P&C rating/quoting software (specifically CompuQuote, Applied Rating Services / ARS, or EZLynx Canada).



Run quotes across 10+ different Canadian insurance carriers (e.g., Intact, Aviva, Wawanesa, Economical, Definity, RSA) to find the most competitive rates.



Perform Quality Assurance (QA) checks to ensure all province-specific and eligible discounts are applied (e.g., Winter Tires, Multi-Line, Retiree discounts, Commute distance).



Compile the results into a standardized Excel/Google Sheets pricing comparison and return it to the broker rapidly.



What We Are Looking For (Requirements):



Strict Experience Requirement: Minimum 1 to 2+ years working as a Rater, Quoting Assistant, or Data Entry Specialist specifically for a Canadian P&C insurance brokerage. (Note: US insurance experience does not qualify for this role due to completely different laws, postal code systems, and software).



Software Knowledge: Proven hands-on experience using Canadian comparative rating software (CompuQuote or Applied Rating Services is a must). Familiarity with Broker Management Systems like Applied EPIC or PowerBroker is a major plus.



Market Knowledge: Familiarity with Canadian auto and home policies and rating factors (understanding how Postal Codes and provincial driving records affect rates, and familiarity with Autoplus reports).



Speed & Accuracy: 50+ WPM typing speed with near 100% accuracy. You must be able to input complex data like VINs without making a single mistake.



Tech Requirements: A secure, quiet home workspace. You must have a highly reliable high-speed internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps), a backup internet source, and a backup power supply (UPS or generator).



Privacy: Strict adherence to a "clean-desk" policy to protect highly sensitive Canadian consumer data under PIPEDA laws.



How to Apply:

We process highly sensitive Canadian consumer data, which means attention to detail is the most important skill you can have.

title: Business / Sales Development Representative (Outbound Lead Generation)
description:
We are looking for a Business Development Representative (BDR) who can help us find and open new client relationships.



Our company generates high-quality consumer leads in industries such as:



• Auto financing

• Insurance

• Vehicle warranties

• Home services

• Financial services



Your role is to find companies that want to buy leads and start conversations with decision makers.



This is real business development, not basic VA work.



If you are someone who enjoys prospecting, outreach, and opening deals, this role is for you.



What You Will Do



Your job is to build a pipeline of potential clients.



This includes:



• Research companies that buy leads (dealerships, brokers, service companies)

• Find decision makers (owners, marketing directors, sales managers)

• Build targeted prospect lists

• Send outbound cold
s and LinkedIn messages

• Start conversations with potential partners

• Follow up with interested prospects

• Book meetings for the founder

• Maintain organized prospecting lists



Your goal is simple:



Open conversations with potential buyers.



Required Skills (3)

B2B Outbound Prospecting



You must know how to find potential clients and build prospect lists.



Examples:

• LinkedIn

• Google research

• directories

• Apollo / prospecting tools



2?? Cold Outreach



You must be comfortable sending cold
s and LinkedIn outreach messages that get replies.



Organized Pipeline Management



You must track:



• prospects contacted

• responses

• follow-ups

• meetings booked



Nice To Have



These are a plus but not required:



• Experience selling marketing services or leads

• Experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator

• Experience with Apollo / Instantly / Lemlist

• Experience doing cold
 campaigns



Compensation



• Hourly pay based on experience

• Long term role if performance is good

• Potential performance bonuses for qualified meetings booked



Who This Role Is Perfect For



Someone who:



• enjoys researching companies

• enjoys outbound outreach

• likes building relationships

• wants to grow in business development



IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING



We receive many applications and only review serious ones.



To apply:



Start your application with the word DEALFLOW



Then answer these 3 questions:



1. Have you done outbound lead generation before? Explain.



2. If we sell auto loan leads, what type of companies would you contact?



3. Write a short cold outreach message you would send to a potential lead buyer.



If you enjoy finding opportunities and opening deals, we would love to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Acquisitions & Operations Specialist
description:
The Role:

We have a high-performing cold caller generating leads. We need a "Closer" to take over. You will be responsible for evaluating property values (comps), negotiating with sellers to sign contracts, and managing the transaction through to closing. You will also find buyers and continuously grow buyer list. This positions starts with 25 hours weekly and will increase to 40 upon closing first deal.

    Fluent English: Must have excellent verbal and written communication skills to negotiate with U.S.-based sellers.

    Availability: Must be able to work during U.S. business hours (EST).

    Reliability: We need a partner, not a "flake." You must be highly organized and responsive. 



Must Haves:

Commit to sending daily reports at the end of each shift

Strong attention to detail

Fast Learner

Experience using wholesale real estate tools like REI Reply

Experience working and finding with wholesale real estate buyers

Highly organized



Bonus Haves:

VPN

Experience in closing leads generated from
*

    High-volume lead flow provided for you.

    Massive upside: Your primary income will come from closing deals.

title: Senior Finance Support | $8–$10/hr
description:
Hi! I’m looking for a Senior Finance Support to help keep financial data organized, accurate, and ready for decision-making. If you enjoy working with numbers, building forecasts, and creating clear financial reports, this is a great fit for you.



What I’m Offering:

– $8–$10/hour

– 20 hours per week

– US Central Time hours (PH night shift)

– Fully remote work



What You’ll Help Me With:

– Building and maintaining cash flow forecasts in spreadsheets

– Tracking budgets and highlighting key variances or trends

– Preparing monthly reporting packs (P&L, balance sheet, reconciliations)

– Supporting bookkeeping tasks in QuickBooks Online

– Helping keep financial records accurate and organized



You’ll Do Well in This Role If You:

– Are confident in building and updating cash flow forecasts

– Have strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

– Know QuickBooks Online, especially reconciliations and month-end workflows

– Can prepare clear, client-ready financial reports

– Communicate clearly and stay organized while handling multiple clients



To Apply:

Send me a message and include RIVOUR and your years of cash flow forecasting experience in the title.

title: Head of Marketplaces (Ecommerce - Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



This role is ideal for someone with strong commercial instincts, leadership experience, and hands-on marketplace expertise. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing marketplace operations, and leading strategy across multiple platforms.



Key Responsibilities:



- Defining vision, setting priorities, and driving growth across online marketplaces.

- Own overall marketplace strategy and performance (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and future platforms)

- Drive sales growth, profitability, and market share.

- Plan and execute campaigns, promotions, and product launches.

- Optimize product listings, pricing, and assortment.

- Analyze sales data, traffic, and conversion metrics to improve performance.

- Manage marketplace operations including inventory coordination, order fulfillment, logistics, returns, and customer service.

- Monitor competitors and marketplace trends.

- Ensure compliance with marketplace policies and standards.

- Collaborate with the Marketing team to optimize demand, funnels, and conversions while scaling livestream, affiliate, and KOL/KOC commerce.

- Oversee forecasting, performance tracking, and executive-level reporting.

- Communication with Key Account Managers.

- Leading PH team, collaborating with other multicultural teams, and managing external partners.



Qualifications:

- 3 - 5 years proven experience in E-commerce Marketplace Management (e.g., Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop) or roles as E-commerce Manager or Marketplace Manager.

- Background in fast-growing or high-volume e-commerce businesses.

- Strong understanding of online sales, promotions, and analytics.

- Knowledge of paid ads within marketplaces (Shopee Ads, Lazada Ads, TikTok Ads).

- Proficient in Google Workspace (especially Google sheets) and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Experience managing multiple SKUs and campaigns.

- Excellent communication and leadership skills.

- Data-driven mindset with strong problem-solving abilities.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.







We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you.

title: Hiring a Video Editor for Online Ads (E-commerce)
description:
We’re looking for a video editor who understands short-form ad content for platforms like TikTok, Meta Platforms ads, and YouTube. You’ll be editing short product-focused videos designed to perform well in paid advertising campaigns.



The workload is light and structured for now, but if things go well this can easily turn into a longer-term collaboration.



Compensation:

• $15 per completed video

• Each video includes 3 hook variations

• Bonuses may be offered depending on performance



Expected Workload:

• Around 2–7 videos per week

• Volume may increase depending on quality and consistency



How the Hiring Process Works:

1. Start your application with “I'm Ready to Make a Paid Sample.”

2. Send your best 3 ad-style videos (preferably product or e-commerce related).

3. If your work fits what we’re looking for, we’ll send paid sample instructions.

4. The sample will be a short video edit (up to ~1 minute).

5. You’ll hear back from us within 24 hours after submitting the sample.



Simple and straightforward.



Reference Examples:

We’ll provide a folder with example ads showing the editing style we want.



Before Applying:

Please only apply if you’re confident you can match a strong ad-editing style and deliver quickly. We’ll be producing a lot of videos, so consistency and speed matter.



Additional Notes:

Pricing can be adjusted after the sample, depending on quality and turnaround time.



Thanks!

title: Editor for tiktok videos
description:
I’m looking for people who can edit TikTok Shop videos



Right now we’re about to push out a large amount of content, and I’m looking for editors who want to take advantage of a real opportunity. If you put effort into the task and your work stands out, I’m more than happy to pay well for people who deliver strong results.



The clips will already be AI-generated, and I’ll provide clear examples of the editing style so you know exactly what the final video should look like.



Your job will be to create the voiceover, edit the clips, and produce a final TikTok Shop video.



I’m not looking for people who just throw something together I’m looking for editors who actually try to make the video engaging. If you take the task seriously and your edits are good, this can turn into long-term work.



If you’re interested, apply and I’ll send you the next steps and instructions.

title: PHONE EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT (Sales Focused) [REMOTE]
description:
YOU (THE CANDIDATE):

You are the kind of woman who treats your work like it's your business. You thrive in a role where communication, intelligence, and quick thinking matter every single day. You are thrilled by the idea of a lifetime job opportunity instead of applying for 100 new jobs every 6 months. You excel at verbal communication in English, think quickly under pressure (including in an interview), and you have a natural sales mentality — you feel confident encouraging tenants to sign or renew a lease without needing scripts or hand-holding, even if you are new to property management.



Read these carefully - if this sounds like you, you’re who we want:



• You love speaking with people - idea of encouraging tenants to renew their lease or confidently talking with new applicants about why they should choose our homes actually energizes you.

• You’re calm, patient, and solution-focused under pressure - when you receive calls about issues, your natural instinct is to resolve, not get flustered.

• You speak exceptional English with a clear voice and minimal accent - the kind that U.S.-based callers can easily understand on the phone.

• You are resourceful and skilled at problem solving, able to think on your feet, and naturally good at handling unexpected or challenging situations.

• You consider yourself highly intelligent - the type of person others rely on when something tricky needs solving.

• You have prior work-from-home experience and know how to manage yourself independently.

• You have a proven history of staying with past employers (ideally 2 years or more).

• You want stable, long-term, full-time employment and value security over chasing short-term high pay that disappears.

If this is you authentically - not aspirationally - we want to meet you (even if you haven’t worked in Property Management before).

_____________________________



US (THE COMPANY):

• We are a U.S. based long-term rental property company - not Airbnb, not short-term rentals.

• We currently manage 100+ houses and are growing quickly.

• We expect to reach another 100–200 homes in the next two years.

• We value ladies who want long-term stability with us - 10 years, not 10 months.

_____________________________



COMMITMENT FROM YOU:

 • Full-time (40 hours/week)

 • Availability: Monday–Friday, 7 AM–7 PM Pacific Time | Active working hours occur within that window

 • This is a long-term, secure role for someone who wants to grow with us at $700-$1000 Monthly (Based on Experience) + Bonuses

_____________________________



Apply Here: 

OLJ Applications or OLJ Messages will not be reviewed.

title: AI Automation Specialist - E-commerce (n8n, Make, Zapier)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company looking to supercharge our operations with AI automations. We need an AI automation specialist who can build powerful customer service automations and streamline our team's processes using the latest AI tools while also having the knowledge to custom code yourself.



What you'll do:

• Build and implement customer service automations

• Create workflow automations using n8n to optimize our team's daily processes

• Develop custom automations with Make, Zapier, Manus, Claude Code and more.

• Write custom code solutions when pre-built tools aren't enough

• Stay current with the newest AI tools and recommend implementations for our business

• Test, troubleshoot, and optimize automation workflows for maximum efficiency



What we're looking for:

• At least 6 months of hands-on AI automation experience

• Expert-level knowledge of n8n, Make, Zapier, Manus, and Claude Code

• Strong custom coding abilities (Python, JavaScript, or similar)

• Proven experience creating automations for e-commerce companies

• Deep understanding of customer service automation workflows

• Someone who actively follows and experiments with the latest AI tools



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AISpecialist'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk me through a specific CS automation you built for an e-commerce company using n8n. What triggers did you use, what APIs did you connect, and what was the end result?

2. Describe a complex workflow automation you created that required custom coding. What tools did you use, what code did you write, and how did it solve the problem?

3. What's the most recent AI tool you've experimented with in the past month, and how could it be applied to e-commerce automation?

4. Tell me about a time when pre-built automation tools weren't sufficient for a project. How did you approach building a custom solution?

5. Please share at least 3 automation examples you've created for e-commerce companies or customer service workflows. Include screenshots, workflow diagrams, or videos showing your n8n automations in action.

title: Landing Page Developer for DTC Ecommerce Brands (Replo/GemPages)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company working with multiple DTC brands to create high-converting landing pages and product pages. We're looking for a skilled Landing Page Developer who can take our Figma designs and turn them into pixel-perfect, lightning-fast Shopify pages using page builders like Replo or GemPages.



What you'll do:

• Develop landing pages, product pages, homepages, and advertorials in Shopify using Replo or GemPages

• Translate Figma designs into live pages as exact 1-to-1 replicas for both desktop and mobile

• Ensure all pages load fast and are fully optimized for page speed

• Integrate Shopify apps into pages (bundle apps, swatch apps, review widgets,
 capture forms)

• Write custom HTML, CSS, and Liquid code when page builders can't achieve the desired design or functionality

• Thoroughly self-test and QA every page before delivery, ensuring zero errors or layout issues

• Take on new projects weekly across multiple brands and occasionally update existing pages



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience developing Shopify pages using Replo or GemPages

• Ability to build pixel-perfect replicas of Figma designs on both desktop and mobile

• Strong understanding of page speed optimization on Shopify

• Experience integrating third-party Shopify apps into page builder layouts

• Custom coding skills (HTML, CSS, Liquid) to solve page builder limitations

• Extreme attention to detail in both design accuracy and functionality

• Self-sufficient QA process and experience working with DTC ecommerce brands



Nice to have:

• Experience with Shopify theme development or advanced Liquid customizations

• Familiarity with conversion rate optimization principles

• Experience working across multiple brands simultaneously



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'PageBuilder429'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Do you prefer working in Replo or GemPages, and why? What are the strengths and limitations of each in your experience?

2. How many hours would it take you to develop a mid-length product page from a completed Figma design into a fully functional page in a page builder? Walk us through how you estimate this.

3. What steps do you take to ensure that the pages you build load fast on Shopify? Which tools do you use to measure and optimize page speed?

4. What happens when a Figma design includes an element or interaction that is not natively possible in a page builder? Give a specific example of how you solved this with custom code.

5. Share a minimum of 3 to 5 links to live Shopify pages you have built using a page builder, with a brief explanation of your role in each project.

title: YouTube Shorts Clip Finder + Scriptwriter
description:
We run a fast-growing YouTube Shorts channel focused on motorcycle and biker content. We're looking for a Clip Finder + Scriptwriter who understands short-form storytelling and can identify viral GoPro-style biker clips.



Your role will involve finding raw clips, researching sources, and writing short scripts for viral Shorts content.



This is not just a writing job — you must also be comfortable searching for raw clips and understanding the content strategy behind the channel.



Channel:





Responsibilities

- Find raw GoPro-style motorcycle clips suitable for Shorts

- Write engaging short scripts / hooks for videos

- Track down original sources of clips

- Understand and follow the channel’s storytelling format

- Suggest clips that could perform well on the channel



Ideal Candidate

- Experience writing YouTube Shorts / TikTok scripts

- Good at research and sourcing original clips

- Understands viral short-form storytelling

- Familiar with motorcycle / GoPro / biker content

- Reliable and able to work long-term



Application Process (Required Test)

To evaluate applicants, we ask you to complete a sample task.



Please also answer the following:

- Tell us about your past experience.

- Why do you think you'd be a good fit for this role?

- Are you available for long-term work?

- How quickly do you usually adapt to new workflows?



We are looking for someone who can grow with the channel long-term, so reliability and understanding the content style are very important.

title: YouTube Shorts Content Researcher & Scriptwriter
description:
We manage a rapidly growing YouTube Shorts channel centered around motorcycle and biker content, and we’re looking for someone who can help us find and turn great clips into engaging short-form videos.



This role combines content research and scriptwriting. You’ll be responsible for discovering interesting GoPro-style biker footage and writing short scripts that turn those clips into compelling YouTube Shorts.



If you enjoy analyzing viral content, searching for interesting clips, and crafting short engaging narratives, this could be a great fit.



Channel:





Responsibilities

title: Game Preview Video Creator (Browser Games) — Full-Time, Long-Term
description:
Plix.gg is a browser games portal with thousands of games, similar to Poki and CrazyGames. We're looking for an experienced video editor to create short, high-quality preview clips for our game library at scale.

Visit our site: 



What you'll do:

Play browser games on Plix.gg and capture the most exciting gameplay 
nts (play it for few minutes so clips are not from only beggining fo the game)

Edit short 6-8 second preview videos that feel fast, clear, and eye-catching (few 3-4 clips in each video)

Use quick cuts, speed ramps, and strong gameplay 
nts to make each preview engaging

Export videos as 480x480 MP4, 30fps, no audio, optimized for size— max 1MB per file, preferably within 500KB

Upload finished files to a shared Google Drive using the correct file names

Report any broken or non-working games in a shared Google Sheet (game name, URL, what's broken)



Reference examples:

Visit 
, 
 or 
 and hover over any game thumbnail, you'll see a short animated preview that plays on hover. That's exactly what we're creating.

What we require:



Proven experience with video editing software such as Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut

Proficient with OBS Studio or similar screen recording software - you must already know how to set up recording profiles, adjust encoder settings, and troubleshoot on your own

Understands video compression and optimization, you know how to hit a target file size without destroying visual quality (codec settings, bitrate control, resolution scaling)

Reliable internet connection and a computer that can run browser games smoothly

Strong attention to detail and consistency

Able to work independently in a high-volume, repeatable workflow

Full-time availability for long-term work



This role is NOT for beginners. We need someone who already knows their tools and can produce optimized, web-ready video output from day one.

What makes a good preview:

A good preview shows actual gameplay, clear action or satisfying 
nts the core mechanic of the game, fast pacing (if the game has it), and visual variety across 3-4 clips.

A bad preview shows menus, loading screens, tutorial text, static or boring gameplay, or 
nts where nothing interesting is happening(unless the game is not excting). 





Pay:

Base: $600/month

Minimum: 100 approved videos per week (average 20/day across 5 days in the week - you choose which days)

Bonus: $0.50 for every approved video above 100 per week, up to $300/month extra

Total earning potential: $600-$900/month

Examples:



100 videos/week = $600/month

125 videos/week = $650/month

150 videos/week = $700/month

200 videos/week = $800/month

250+ videos/week = $900/month (max)

Payment: Weekly for the first month, then biweekly or monthly via Wise or EasyPay (Payoneer), your choice.

First month is a paid trial.





How approval works:

A video may be sent back for revision if it shows menus, loading screens, or tutorial overlays, does not show meaningful gameplay, feels too slow, repetitive, or visually weak, exceeds the 1MB file size limit, or does not match naming or style guideline.



We provide:

File naming rules and upload instructions

Ongoing feedback to help you improve speed and consistency



Long-term opportunity:

We have thousands of games and continue adding more. If you are reliable and produce strong work consistently, this is a stable long-term role with potential for pay increases.

We care about output, not rigid schedules. Need to skip Wednesday? Make it up on Thursday or swap it for a weekend day — your call. As long as you communicate in advance and your weekly output stays consistent, we're happy. Your base pay is guaranteed regardless of daily output. The bonus is there to reward you when you're in the zone, not to punish you when life happens. We're building a long-term working relationship, not tracking every minute.



To apply, please send:

Your video editing experience, what software you use, how long you've used it, and what kind of work you've done

Go to Plix.gg, pick any 1-3 games, and create a 6-8 second preview for each (480x480, fast-paced with speed ramps, no audio, under 1MB each). Upload to Google Drive and share the link.



Applications without sample videos will not be considered.

title: Full Stack Developer (React / Node) for Real Estate Investment Platform
description:

This role will work directly with our acquisitions team to build tools that help us analyze deals faster and scale our operations.



This is a long term position with consistent work.

Responsibilities



Build and improve our internal real estate deal analysis system.



Tasks include:



• Improving our deal calculator (ARV, rehab, MAO, wholesale spreads)

• Integrating APIs for property data and comps

• Connecting Google Sheets to web applications

• Building new features for deal intake and analysis

• Creating dashboards and internal tools for acquisitions

• Automating workflows for property analysis

• Maintaining and improving existing code



You will work closely with the owners to continuously improve the system.



Current System Includes



• Property deal calculator

• ARV and comp analysis

• Rehab estimator

• MAO calculations

• Wholesale assignment price engine

• Holding cost calculations

• Web based deal interface

• Google Sheets integration



We want to expand this into a full internal acquisitions platform.



Required Skills



• JavaScript

• React or Next.js

• Node.js

• API integrations

• Database management (PostgreSQL or similar)

• Experience building web applications



Nice to have:



• Google Sheets API

• Real estate or data analysis experience

• Automation tools

• CRM or internal tool development



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who:



• Is detail oriented

• Writes clean code

• Can think through problems and suggest improvements

• Communicates clearly

• Wants a long term position



This is not a short project. We want someone to become part of our team.



Work Schedule



Flexible schedule.



We care more about results and communication than strict hours.



Compensation



Based on experience.



There is opportunity for raises and long term work as the system grows.



To Apply



Please include:



Links to web apps you have built



Your experience with APIs and databases



Your favorite programming language and why



The word EagleKey at the top of your application so we know you read the full post



Example Projects You Will Work On



• Property deal calculator improvements

• Automatic comp pulling from APIs

• Investor pricing calculators

• Deal pipeline dashboards

• Data integrations with property data providers



If you enjoy building useful tools and want long term work with a growing real estate company, we would love to hear from you.

title: Client Specialist for Law Firm
description:
Montecito Law Group is a boutique estate planning law firm based in Santa Barbara, California. Our clients are typically professionals, business owners, and retirees who value thoughtful guidance and excellent service.



We are seeking a warm, articulate Client Intake Coordinator to answer calls, schedule consultations, and help ensure a smooth experience for new clients.



This is a phone-focused role. Clear spoken English and a professional phone presence are essential.



The right candidate is naturally warm and friendly, technically accurate and efficient in gathering information, and will leave a positive impression on callers. 



The position will also include general support tasks, which could range from assisting with legal matters, social media, marketing,
 management, etc. We love working with quick learners who are eager to help clients.



Responsibilities

Answer incoming calls from prospective clients

Provide a friendly and professional first impression

Schedule consultations with the attorney

Collect basic information from callers (name, contact information, property addresses)

Send follow-up
s and information forms

Update the client database

Assist with light administrative tasks as needed



Requirements

Excellent spoken English with clear pronunciation

Comfortable speaking with U.S. clients by phone

Professional, calm, and friendly phone manner

Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

Strong attention to detail

Ability to follow structured intake scripts



Preferred Experience

Candidates with experience in any of the following will stand out:

U.S. call center support

Client intake or appointment scheduling

Customer service for U.S. companies

Administrative support roles

Experience supporting law firms or professional services



If interested, please provide (1) a one- to two-minute video recording explaining why you think you would be a good fit for this role, and (2) a voice recording of the following sample script:



Part 1 – Greeting



“Thank you for calling Montecito Law Group.

This is ________. How may I help you today?”



(pause as if the caller responds)



“Thank you for sharing that. I’d be happy to help.”



Part 2 – Listening and Light Guidance



“So I can make sure we schedule you appropriately, may I ask a few quick questions?”



(pause)



“What is your full name?”



(Caller: Nancy Moore)



(confirm spelling)



"Thank you, Nancy. May I ask how you found our law firm?"



(Pause)



(Caller: Google. I loved your reviews!)



“Great. We are glad you reached out."



“Are you looking to create a new estate plan, or update an existing one?”



(pause)



“Thank you.”



Part 4 – Fee Conversation



“Our estate plans are customized for each family, but most plans start around six thousand dollars, depending on complexity.



During the consultation, Stefanie will review your situation and explain the options available.



Part 6 – Scheduling the Consultation



“The next step is to schedule your initial planning consultation with Stefanie.



Let me take a look at the calendar.”



(pause)



“We have appointments available next week. Would Tuesday morning or Thursday afternoon work for you?”



Part 7 – Closing



“Perfect. I have you scheduled for 3 p.m. Thursday, April 2.



Finally, I’ll
 you a short information form. Please complete it before our meeting so we can prepare.



Thank you, Nancy. We look forward to meeting you.”

title: GHL/Wordpress Expert web designer + SEO Specialist
description:
We’re a US-based marketing agency (eFreedom) that builds websites and marketing systems for contractors and real estate fund operators. You’re not building from scratch. You’re taking a finished website and making it 10x better.

What you do:

 ? Take completed GHL and WordPress websites and optimize the design, layout, and user experience

 ? Make websites look premium and professional — not template-looking

 ? Improve page speed, mobile responsiveness, and overall performance

 ? Implement on-page SEO (meta tags, headers, image optimization, internal linking, schema markup)

 ? Optimize landing pages and funnels for higher conversion rates

 ? Fix anything that looks cheap, broken, or amateur

 ? Set up proper lead capture forms, CTAs, and tracking

 ? Provide recommendations on design and UX improvements for each client site

What we need:

 ? 2+ years experience in GHL website builder AND not so important but would be fine if you know WordPress/Elementor

 ? Fast worker — most sites should take 2-4 hours to optimize

 ? Available 10-15 hours per week

Big plus:

 ? Experience with contractor or real estate websites

 ? Funnel optimization experience

 ? Google PageSpeed and Core Web Vitals knowledge

 ? Conversion rate optimization experience

This is part-time, ongoing work. As we add clients, your hours grow. Show us quality and you’ll have consistent work every week.

WAGE/SALARY:

$350 + Bonuses

The ideal candidate is highly organized, able to follow structured processes, and comfortable working with official government forms and documentation.



This role involves assembling client credit packets, filing reports with government agencies, and sending dispute letters to credit bureaus.



Responsibilities



• Compile and organize client credit dispute packets

• Review client documents to ensure accuracy and completeness

• File Identity Theft Reports through the FTC website

• Submit complaints and disputes through the CFPB portal

• Prepare and send credit dispute letters to credit bureaus

• Send documentation via digital mail and

• Maintain accurate records of submitted disputes and case updates

• Follow internal step-by-step SOP processes

• Upload and organize files in Google Drive or CRM system

• Track dispute progress and update status reports



Daily Tasks



• Gather client credit reports and supporting documents

• Prepare dispute letters and documentation packages

• File FTC Identity Theft Affidavit reports

• Submit CFPB complaints when required

• Send letters to Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax

• Maintain logs of all disputes sent and responses received



Requirements



• Strong attention to detail

• Excellent written English

• Ability to follow structured instructions and procedures

• Experience with credit repair or credit disputes (preferred but not required)

• Comfortable working with government websites and forms

• Strong organization and file management skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Tools You May Use



• Google Docs

• Google Drive

•

• Digital Mail Platforms

• Credit Repair CRM systems (if applicable)



Bonus Skills (Not Required)



• Experience working in the credit repair industry

• Familiarity with FTC Identity Theft Reports

• Experience submitting complaints through CFPB

• Understanding of FCRA dispute processes



Position Details



• Fully Remote

• Flexible Hours

• Training Provided

• Long-Term Opportunity for the Right Candidate



?



Screening Questions (Add to your job post)

 1. Have you worked with credit repair or credit disputes before?

 2. Are you familiar with FTC Identity Theft Reports or CFPB complaints?

 3. How comfortable are you working with structured documentation and legal forms?

 4. What tools do you typically use for document organization and communication?
