title: Credit Analyst
description:
About the Role: 

We are a Commercial Consulting Inc. (AB, Canada) is looking for a detail-oriented Credit Analyst with a strong background in finance and accounting. Unlike back-office roles, this position requires you to be at the forefront of our operations—interacting directly with our Canadian clients to collect documents, assess financial health, and participate in strategic planning meetings.



Key Responsibilities

Client Document Collection: Proactively reach out to clients to gather financial statements, tax returns, bank statements, and legal documents.



Financial Analysis: Perform deep-dive analysis of client financials (Balance Sheets, P&L, Cash Flow) to determine creditworthiness and "bank-readiness."



Client Communication: Explain complex financial requirements to clients in clear, professional English. You will be the bridge between their raw data and our consulting advice.



Meeting Participation: Attend online meetings to understand client needs and provide real-time feedback on their financial standing.



Report Preparation: Draft comprehensive credit summaries and financial health reports for the management team.



The 3 Must-Have Qualifications

Strong Finance/Accounting Background: A degree in Accountancy, Finance, or a related field. 



Exceptional English Command: You must have a "near-native" level of English, both written and spoken. You will be representing our firm to Canadian business owners.



Real Estate or Lending Experience: Familiarity with real estate financial modeling or commercial loan processing is a significant asset.



What We Offer: Highly Competitive Pay



Stability: Full-time, 35-hour work week with long-term career growth. (part-time for the first three months)



Professional Environment: Direct collaboration with senior consultants in the Canadian real estate market.

title: Real Estate Video/Photograpy Editor
description:
About Us

Bolder Digital is an Australian-based recruitment agency committed to connecting top Filipino talent with leading businesses globally. We are looking for an individual to join our team and work remotely from the Philippines as we are based in Australia (Remote, based in the Philippines, working on Australian Eastern Time Zone 8/9 AM – 5 PM).



Job Type

Full-Time – Long term/Gig



Start Date:

ASAP



Compensation:

Negotiable — based on proven expertise



Overview

We are hiring an elite Video Editor with advanced, professional-level experience in real estate, construction, architecture, and promotional brand content.



This role requires someone who has spent years working in high-pressure commercial environments — someone who understands tight turnarounds, precision editing, narrative flow, and the visual standards required in premium marketing.



You’ll be working across:

High-end real estate property videos

Builder & construction showcases

Architectural features & design storytelling

Promotional brand edits for businesses

If you don’t have industry-proven commercial experience, don’t apply.

If you do — we want you.



Key Responsibilities

Real Estate, Construction & Promo Editing

Edit cinematic, high-impact property videos showcasing interiors, exteriors, lifestyle elements, architecture, and land features

Build fast-turnaround construction progress videos, promo reels, project showcases, and brand storytelling pieces

Craft engaging short-form edits for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts using clean pacing, crisp sound design, and strong narrative structure

Masterfully repurpose long-form shoots into multiple content deliverables

Apply brand identity, graphics, typography, colour grading, and transitions with consistency and precision

Creative Execution & Collaboration

Work from raw media and briefs to produce polished, broadcast-level edits

Take constructive criticism without ego — improve, iterate, and refine

Work efficiently under pressure, meeting tight deadlines and high-volume demands

Communicate clearly with our internal team and clients across review cycles



Optional but Preferred

Photo editing experience in Photoshop & Lightroom

Ability to design static promotional assets (carousels, quotes, graphic posts)

Strong understanding of brand identity and visual strategy



Portfolio Requirements

Submit 10–15 examples of:

Real estate, construction, or architectural video edits

Promotional commercial edits

Short-form vertical content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

(Optional) Static design work

For each item, include your typical editing timeframe (e.g. “average time to edit a 2-minute real estate showcase” or “average time for a 30-second promo reel”).

Applicants who cannot provide a portfolio at this level will not be considered.



Requirements

Expert-level skill in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects. (Final Cut or DaVinci Resolve acceptable for masters only.)

Minimum 3–5+ years professional experience in real estate/construction/promotional editing

Strong understanding of modern pacing, visual hooks, retention strategy, and commercial storytelling

Ability to work fast without compromising quality

Willingness to learn, grow, adapt — no ego

Availability during Australian Eastern Time working hours

Reliable internet + hardware capable of smooth high-res workflows



Additional Preferences

Strong colour grading ability

Understanding of real estate marketing strategy

Familiarity with aerial/drone workflow

Ability to contribute ideas to improve visual strategy



Benefits

Competitive pay based on expertise

Flexible working structure

Long-term, consistent work

High-level creative environment with room to grow



How to Apply

Submit:

Resume

Short cover letter

A portfolio with required samples

Your average editing times per content type

Use the application code VIDDY so we know you’ve read the full role description.



IMPORTANT: This is an expert-only position. You will be skills-tested.

If you’re not proven, not fast, or not world-class — this isn’t for you.

title: Financial Controller| Immediate Hire | Melbourne Hours
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, hands-on Financial Controller who thrives in a fast-paced construction or manufacturing environment and knows how to keep complex project finances under control.



Company: ATOM Modular Group (incl. RhinoSite) 



*** Please send your application only to: 
 submitted through any other channel will be automatically rejected.



Contract Type: Full-time ONLY (REMOTE)



Working Hours: You must be able to work 9:00am–5:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT), Monday–Friday. This is a strict requirement and is not negotiable. Please do not apply if you cannot fully commit to this time zone.



Hourly Rate: 20USD to 25USD



About the Company

ATOM Modular Group is a rapidly growing Australian manufacturing company that designs and delivers functional spaces for hard-working industries. We are seeking an experienced Financial Controller with a strong background in construction or manufacturing and demonstrated expertise in managing and tracking project costs from start to finish across multiple entities (ATOM and RhinoSite).



What you’ll do 



Monthly close & reporting 

-  Run monthly close and consolidated reporting across group entities (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow), including variance analysis and clear commentary. 



Construction/manufacturing cost control 

-  Build and maintain project cost tracking (budget vs actual) including labour, materials, subcontractors, overhead allocation, WIP and margin tracking. 

-  Partner with Ops/Production to improve job costing accuracy, identify leakage, and lift gross margin through better visibility. 



Compliance & governance (AU) 

-  Manage Australian compliance items and calendars (BAS/GST, PAYG/IAS, payroll tax, super) with external accountant/tax agent support as needed. 



Cashflow & working capital 

- Improve cashflow visibility and working capital discipline (AR/AP, approvals, forecasting). 



Process improvement & controls 

-  Build and document SOPs, strengthen internal controls, improve month-end routines and approvals. 



Team leadership (remote) 

-  Lead/coordinate transactional processing and weekly deliverables with a clear remote team rhythm. 



Commercial support 

-  Support budgets, forecasting and scenario modelling; highlight margin improvement opportunities. 



First 4 weeks (what success looks like) 

-  Week 1: Review Balance Sheet & P&L with analytics; begin SOP manuals. 

-  Week 2: Execute finance catch-up; review next month’s Balance Sheet & P&L with analytics. 

-  Week 3: Complete/verify month completion; continue SOP documentation. 

-  Week 4: Implement KPI dashboard, reporting & tax compliance calendar, weekly performance monitoring + issue log. 



Must-have experience 

-  Proven Financial Controller / Senior Accountant experience (remote experience preferred) 

-  Construction and/or manufacturing background with strong job/project costing capability (budget vs actual, WIP, margin tracking) 

-  Strong knowledge of Australian compliance (month-end close, BAS/GST, PAYG/IAS, payroll processes) 

-  Experience with multi-entity reporting/consolidation 

-  Able to work 9:00am–5:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT), Monday–Friday 

-  Excellent English communication and ability to explain numbers to non-finance leaders 



Nice to have 

-  CPA/CA qualification (or equivalent) 

-  Experience with progress claims, retentions, variations, and project-based revenue recognition 

-  Dashboard/KPI reporting experience (Power BI / Excel models)

title: Full-Time Funnel Builder, Automations & CRM Integrations (NOT a General VA Role) GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
Please Read This Entire Post Before Responding



We will know if you did not read this fully. The application instructions are at the bottom and are specific. If your response does not follow them exactly, it will not be reviewed. We appreciate the ones who take the time to do this right.









Important: Read Before Applying



This is not a general virtual assistant role. We are not looking for someone to manage social media, do data entry, or handle basic admin tasks. This is a full-time, specialized technical role for someone who has deep, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel and automation tools.



If your primary experience is as a general VA and you are hoping to learn GoHighLevel on the job, this is not the right fit. If GoHighLevel, webhooks, and automation workflows are your core skill set, keep reading.









Who We Are



We are a U.S.-based done-for-you ads and funnels marketing agency serving financial professionals, currently servicing 30-40 active clients. We build appointment funnels, run paid ads on Meta, and manage CRM automations specifically for the financial services space. We have a proven system in place and need a skilled specialist to own the technical execution side full-time.









What You Will Do



This is a full-time role focused entirely on the technical build and integration side of our client onboarding process. When a new client joins, you will receive their onboarding information and be responsible for getting everything live within 48 hours.



GoHighLevel (GHL) Funnel Builds

Deploy our GHL snapshot into new client sub-accounts, customize all funnel steps (qualified and disqualified booking flows), update copy and calendar links, and ensure the funnel is fully functional before launch.



Webhook & CRM Integrations

Set up webhook-based lead delivery to route leads from the funnel into the client's GHL CRM and a Google Sheet simultaneously. You must be comfortable working inside GHL's Lead Delivery settings and configuring webhook endpoints directly — not just through Zapier.



GHL Automation Workflows

Build pre-call SMS and
 sequences inside GHL, configure triggers and tags, and set up pipeline stages for each client.



Meta Pixel & Conversion API

Install the Meta pixel on funnel pages, configure the Conversion API for server-side event tracking, and verify that all key events (Lead, Schedule) are firing correctly and passing back to the pixel.



Zapier / n8n Workflows

Build and maintain multi-step automation workflows connecting GHL, Google Sheets, Calendly, and other tools in our stack.









Required Skills



You must have real, proven experience with the following:



•

GoHighLevel: Sub-account management, funnel building, snapshot deployment, workflow automations, calendar integrations — this is the core skill and is non-negotiable.



•

Webhooks: Direct webhook setup for lead delivery, not just Zapier.



•

Google Sheets: Connecting live data feeds and structuring lead tracking sheets.



•

Zapier and/or n8n: Multi-step automation workflows.



•

Meta Ads Manager: Pixel installation and Conversion API setup.



•

English communication: Clear, proactive communication in Slack and via
.



Bonus (not required): Experience with Typeform, Calendly, API integrations, and AI tools like Claude or Manus.







Compensation

$1,000-1,600/mo





How to Apply



Read this section carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



Send an
 to 
 with the subject line: "Test Project – [Your Name]"



Your
 must include the following:



1. A Loom video (60 seconds or less) explaining why you are the right fit for this role. Keep it tight, specific, and confident. No rambling. Show us you can communicate clearly and that you actually understand what we do.



2. Proof of relevant work. Include screenshots, a Loom walkthrough, a live link, or any other evidence of a GHL funnel, automation, or integration you have built. We want to see real work, not a list of skills on a resume.



3. Answer this question in writing at the bottom of your
: Walk us through exactly how you would ensure that a survey filled out inside a GoHighLevel funnel gets sent to a Google Sheet AND is properly tagged inside GHL. What is your exact process, step by step?



That is it. No lengthy cover letters. No resumes unless we ask. Just the Loom, the proof, and the answer to the question. The people who do this well are the ones we talk to next.









Start Date: Immediately

Hours: Full-time (40-50 hrs/week)

description:

If you have a strong ear for audio, attention to detail, and experience working with video sound design, we would love to hear from you.

description:

REKT Productions is a Melbourne-based production company specialising in esports broadcasts, corporate livestreams, podcast production, and premium digital content. We work with global brands and publishers to deliver high-quality productions and storytelling across gaming, events, and corporate media.



As we continue to grow, we are expanding our marketing team to improve our online visibility and showcase the work we produce across our productions, events, and studios.

This role focuses on executing marketing initiatives, managing digital content, and maintaining our online platforms. You will work directly under our Marketing Specialist, receiving direction and collaborating on campaigns, while also being trusted with autonomy to develop marketing ideas and strategies that improve our reach.



You will play a key role in showcasing our productions, projects, and capabilities online, ensuring our work is consistently promoted and presented professionally across platforms.

Required Skills & Experience:

title: Sales Representative
description:
We're hiring 2–3 sales reps to grow Trackara Pro, a SaaS platform for mobile mechanics. The base pay is modest ($0.50/hr) — but this role is built around commissions and residual income that compound over time. If you're a closer who wants to build a real income stream, keep reading.



About the Company:

Trackara was founded in 2025 and provides project tracking software to car enthusiasts, mobile mechanics, and automotive schools. Trackara Pro is our SaaS platform built specifically for mobile mechanics — a modern all-in-one business command center for scheduling, invoicing, customer management, and more.



Your job is simple: find mobile mechanics who need better tools and get them on Trackara Pro. How you do it is up to you.

Day-to-day:



Prospect and reach out to mobile mechanics via cold calls,
s, LinkedIn,
 groups, online directories, Craigslist — whatever works.

Demo the product and walk prospects through what Trackara Pro does for their business.

Close deals and track your pipeline in our CRM.

Target U.S. market.

Report results weekly to the CEO directly.



Compensation

Base Pay: $0.50/hour (~$40/month at 20 hrs/week)

Sign-Up Commission: $5 per new subscriber

Paid after the subscriber completes their 2-week free trial and their first payment is received. No trial completion, no payout — this keeps everyone focused on quality leads.

Monthly Residual Income: $1/month per active subscriber for 12 months

This is where the real money is. Every customer you bring in pays you $1/month for an entire year — as long as they stay subscribed. The more customers you bring in, the bigger your residual portfolio grows. After 6 months of consistent work, you could have 100+ accounts generating passive income every single month.

Payout Schedule: All commissions and residuals are paid on the 1st and 15th of each month. Base pay follows the same schedule. Transparent, predictable, no surprises.

Projected Earnings (20 hrs/week):



Month 1: 10 sign-ups ? $50 commission + $0 residual + $40 base = $90

Month 3: 20 sign-ups ? $100 commission + $40 residual + $40 base = $180

Month 6: 25 sign-ups ? $125 commission + $120 residual + $40 base = $285

Month 9: 30 sign-ups ? $150 commission + $200 residual + $40 base = $390

Month 12: 30 sign-ups ? $150 commission + $250 residual + $40 base = $440



There is no earning cap.

What We're Looking For



Sales ability — B2B, SaaS, or cold outreach experience preferred, but we'll take a natural closer with hustle over a resume any day

Strong English — written and spoken; you'll be talking to business owners in the U.S. and abroad

Self-driven — this is not a micromanaged role; we give you the tools and you go hunt

Creative — we want people who find leads in places nobody else is looking

Tech-comfortable — you should be able to confidently walk someone through a SaaS product

Reliable internet and a quiet space for calls



Bonus Points



Experience in automotive, trades, or home services industries

Familiarity with the mobile mechanic market (especially in the Philippines)

Experience with CRM tools, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, or similar

Previous SaaS subscription sales experience

You understand what it's like to build something from the ground up



What You Get



Uncapped earning potential — commissions + compounding residuals

Flexible schedule — work when and where you want

Ground-floor opportunity with a growing product and company

Direct access to the CEO — no corporate layers, fast decisions

Potential path to a full-time salaried role as we scale

Be part of building something real in a brand-new industry niche



How to Apply

Please send your resume and application to Derek Adkins through 
 CC 
 application should include:



A brief intro — who you are and why this role excites you

Your relevant experience (sales, outreach, customer-facing work)

A short voice recording or video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself in English

Your availability (hours per week you can commit)



All applications must be submitted by March 28th, 2026 at 11:59 PM MST.

We appreciate your interest, but please note that we will only be contacting successful applicants.

title: Full-Stack SaaS Developer (Laravel / Supabase / AI Integrations)
description:
About the Company

We're building an AI-powered Google Business Profile (GBP) optimisation platform for Australian local businesses. The platform helps cafes, restaurants, salons, and other walk-in businesses get more customers through smarter Google presence. This is a funded, founder-led SaaS with paying clients already lined up for pilot launch.



About the Role

We're looking for one talented full-stack developer to own the build from the ground up. This is a long-term, part-time remote role. You'll work directly with the founder and have full ownership of the technical architecture and delivery.



This is a build role — we need someone who writes code, ships features, and communicates proactively.



What You'll Build

- Google Business Profile API integration (OAuth 2.0, multi-tenant)

- AI-powered profile optimisation scoring using the Claude API

- Automated review response drafting and publishing

- Scheduled Google Posts generation via AI

- Competitor benchmarking using SerpAPI

- Customer dashboard (WeWeb or React)

- Stripe subscription billing (3 pricing tiers)

- n8n workflow automation for all scheduled and triggered jobs



Tech Stack

- Backend: Laravel (PHP) or Node.js

- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)

- Automation: n8n (cloud)

- AI: Claude API (Anthropic)

- Frontend: WeWeb or React

- Payments: Stripe

- Hosting: Laravel Forge + DigitalOcean

- Version Control: GitHub



You're a Great Fit If You Have

- Built and deployed a multi-tenant SaaS product before (please share a live example)

- Experience with Google OAuth 2.0 or Google APIs

- Integrated an AI/LLM API (Claude, OpenAI, or similar)

- Strong Laravel or Node.js backend skills

- Experience with Supabase or similar database platforms

- Stripe integration experience

- Clean, well-documented code habits

- Reliable communication and ownership mindset



Nice to Have

- n8n or Make/Zapier workflow experience

- WeWeb or similar no-code frontend builder experience

- Experience with SerpAPI or Google Maps data



How to Apply

Please send:

1. A brief introduction and overview of your relevant experience

2. A link to at least one live SaaS product you have built

3. Your answers to these questions:

   - Have you built a multi-tenant SaaS before? How did you handle data isolation?

   - Have you worked with Google OAuth 2.0 to connect user accounts?

   - Have you integrated the Claude API or any LLM API? What was the use case?

   - How would you structure the Supabase schema for one user managing 20 separate GBP profiles?



A detailed product brief with full feature specs, user flows, and technical requirements will be shared with shortlisted candidates.



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a video call before a paid trial task is assigned.

title: AI Automation Developer
description:
NOW HIRING

AI Automation Developer

Build Real Systems  |  Mortgage Industry

Remote  •  Long-Term Role  •  Part-Time to Start





ABOUT THIS ROLE

We run a high-production mortgage team in the United States. Instead of buying dozens of SaaS tools, we are building our own AI-powered automation stack.

If you enjoy building practical automation tools quickly, this role will be a good fit.

If you prefer designing complex systems that take months before shipping, this role probably isn’t for you.

WHAT YOU’LL BUILD

Active and upcoming projects include:

Automated home equity report system (replacing Homebot)

Loan comparison and mortgage report generators

AI-powered marketing and content creation tools

CRM integration and lead routing automation

SMS and
 follow-up automation sequences

Agent-facing AI tools that create referral leverage

You will own projects end-to-end: scoping, building, testing, deploying. Each tool you ship creates measurable value for the business.

MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE

You must have proven experience with ALL of the following to be considered:



Python — you write production scripts, not tutorial code

API integrations — you have connected real systems using REST APIs, webhooks, and authentication flows

OpenAI API or equivalent LLM integration — you have shipped something that uses an LLM in production

Google Sheets API or Google Workspace automation — you have built automations that read/write to Sheets programmatically

Git / GitHub — you use version control on every project



Do Not Apply If:

•  You have not built and deployed at least one automation tool that ran in production•  You have no experience with the OpenAI API or any LLM integration•  You cannot show a GitHub profile with real projects•  You primarily use no-code tools and have limited actual coding ability•  You need detailed step-by-step instructions to complete tasks•  Your English communication is not strong enough for written technical discussions



PREFERRED ADDITIONAL SKILLS

Not required, but candidates with these move to the front:

Zapier, Make, or n8n (workflow orchestration)

Twilio / SMS automation

 delivery systems (SendGrid, Mailgun)

React or lightweight frontend for internal tools

Database experience (PostgreSQL, Supabase, Airtable)

Cloud deployment (Railway, Render, AWS Lambda)

Mortgage or financial services industry experience



Independence Required

This role requires independent problem solving. You should be comfortable reading API documentation, researching solutions, and building without detailed step-by-step instructions. We provide the what and the why. You figure out the how.



OUR HIRING PROCESS

We don’t hire the traditional way. Our process is designed to find builders, not resume writers.



Stage

What Happens

Time

Application

Submit resume + builder question + design question

Day 1

Review

AI + leadership scores your responses

Day 2–3

Paid Project

Top candidates receive a paid micro-project ($100–$200)

Day 4–10

Interview

30-minute call with leadership

Day 11–14

Offer

Long-term contract begins

Day 15+





Strong developers prefer this. Weak candidates disappear. That’s the point.

COMPENSATION

Base Pay (Part-Time)

$1,500 – $2,500 / month depending on experience and capability.



Performance Bonuses

Paid per completed and deployed system:



Project

Completion Bonus

Homebot Replacement Tool

$400

Mortgage Comparison Report Generator

$400

AI Content / Marketing Generator

$300

SMS Automation Expansion

$300

CRM Lead Routing Automation

$300





Developers who ship get paid more. Period.



Growth Path

This role starts part-time. High performers move to full-time and lead the AI automation team as we scale. Future structure includes a VA automation operator and junior developer reporting to this role.



HOW TO APPLY

Your application IS the first filter. Follow these instructions exactly:



Step 1 — Builder Question

Answer this question in your application (6 sentences max):



Builder Question

What is the most useful automation you have built? Explain: (1) what problem it solved, (2) how it worked, and (3) what technologies you used.





Step 2 — System Design Question

Answer this question in your application (5–8 sentences max):



Design Challenge

A mortgage company wants to send 10,000 monthly home equity updates. Data is stored in Google Sheets. The system should: (1) calculate equity, (2) generate a personalized message using OpenAI, and (3) send
s using SendGrid. How would you design this system?





Step 3 — Submission

1.

In the FIRST LINE of your application, write exactly: "AI Builder Applicant."

2.

Attach your updated resume (PDF preferred).

3.

Include your answers to the Builder Question and Design Challenge above.

4.

Link to your GitHub profile (required — applications without GitHub will not be reviewed).

5.

Optional but strongly preferred: Loom walkthrough of something you’ve built.





Important:

Applications that do not begin with "AI Builder Applicant" or that are missing a GitHub link will not be reviewed. Incomplete applications tell us everything we need to know.





We are building a mortgage automation lab — not hiring a freelancer for one-off tasks. If you want to build real systems that create real value, apply now.

• Analyze opportunities using ARV and comparable sales

• Present and negotiate cash offers

• Secure signed purchase agreements

• Manage deal progress inside our CRM



Performance Expectations



Within the first 60 days:



• Speak with 30–40 sellers per week

• Present 15–20 offers per week

• Secure 2–4 signed contracts per month



Required Experience



Applicants must have real experience closing off-market real estate deals.



You should understand:



• ARV analysis

• Offer calculations

• Seller negotiation

• Wholesale or novation deal structures



Minimum requirement:

Applicants must have personally closed at least 15 off-market real estate deals.



Compensation



Base: $1,000 per month + 10% commission



Top performers regularly earn $3,000 – $8,000+ per deal.



This role is best suited for confident closers who are comfortable negotiating directly with sellers and getting contracts signed.



Schedule



This is a full-time role aligned with U.S. business hours.



Example schedule:



Monday – Friday

1 PM – 9 PM Eastern Time



Weekend availability is occasionally required for seller communication.



Hiring Process



Qualified candidates will complete:



• Interview with our acquisitions team

• Sales roleplay scenario



Example roleplay:

A seller wants $500K for a property worth $350K. You will demonstrate how you would negotiate the conversation.



How to Apply



To confirm you read the full job post, begin your application with the word “EagleKey.”



Please submit:



• Resume

• Short voice recording introducing yourself

• Number of deals you have personally closed



Send applications to:







Subject line: Real Estate Deal Closer Application

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Senior Digital Marketing Manager – U.S. Law Firm
description:
Job Title: Senior Digital Marketing Manager – U.S. Law Firm  

Company: Labor Law PC  

Location: Remote (Full-Time)  

Compensation: Competitive salary based on experience



About Us

Labor Law PC is a California-based employment litigation law firm representing employees in matters such as wrongful termination, discrimination, harassment, retaliation, and wage and hour disputes.



We are seeking a highly experienced Digital Marketing Manager to lead and execute our online marketing initiatives. The primary focus of this role will be SEO strategy and organic traffic growth, along with oversight of other digital marketing channels.



This position is not entry-level. We are looking for someone with strong hands-on experience in digital marketing, particularly SEO-driven lead generation, who can also help monitor paid advertising performance and coordinate with outside marketing vendors.



Experience marketing law firms or professional services businesses is strongly preferred, but candidates with demonstrated success in other industries will also be considered.



---



Key Responsibilities



SEO Strategy & Execution (Primary Responsibility)

- Develop and implement SEO strategies to increase organic traffic and qualified leads

- Conduct advanced keyword research and identify high-value search opportunities

- Create and optimize SEO-driven content including landing pages, blog posts, and educational guides

- Implement internal linking strategies and on-page SEO improvements

- Monitor rankings, backlinks, and search performance

- Identify and coordinate technical SEO improvements

- Track and report on SEO performance and growth metrics



---



PPC Monitoring & Vendor Oversight

- Monitor performance of Google Ads and other PPC campaigns

- Track cost-per-click, cost-per-conversion, and lead quality

- Review campaign reports and identify performance trends

- Provide recommendations to improve campaign performance

- Coordinate with and supervise external vendors or agencies managing PPC campaigns

- Ensure advertising vendors are meeting performance expectations and campaign objectives

- Help evaluate new PPC strategies, keywords, and campaign opportunities



---



Website & Content Management

- Manage and publish website content using WordPress

- Ensure all website content is optimized for SEO and user engagement

- Develop educational content explaining employment law topics in clear and accessible language



---



Social Media & Brand Authority

- Develop and publish educational content across platforms such as LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

- Translate legal topics into engaging and informative content

- Monitor engagement and audience interaction



---



 Marketing & Marketing Automation

- Develop and manage
 marketing campaigns using Mailchimp

- Create newsletters and automated
 sequences

- Build and manage marketing automation workflows (lead nurturing, follow-ups, client education, etc.)

- Segment
 audiences and manage subscriber lists

- Monitor
 performance metrics such as open rates and click-through rates

- Implement automation systems that help convert website visitors into leads and consultations



---



Community Monitoring & Engagement

- Monitor online communities where employment law issues are discussed (including forums and Reddit)

- Identify opportunities to provide helpful educational responses

- Help build credibility and authority through thoughtful engagement



---



Analytics & Reporting



- Track marketing KPIs including traffic, conversions, and engagement

- Prepare regular marketing performance reports

- Use data to recommend improvements and new opportunities



---



Required Experience

Applicants should have substantial experience in digital marketing, particularly SEO strategy and execution.

Candidates should demonstrate:

- Proven experience increasing organic search traffic

- Strong understanding of SEO strategy and keyword research

- Experience using SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar

- Familiarity with Google Analytics and Google Search Console

- Experience monitoring or managing Google Ads / PPC campaigns

- Experience supervising or coordinating with marketing vendors or agencies

- Experience publishing content in WordPress

- Experience creating and managing
 campaigns using Mailchimp or similar platforms

- Experience building marketing automation workflows and automated marketing systems

- Strong written English and communication skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities



---



Preferred Experience

- Marketing experience for law firms or professional services

- Experience generating leads for service-based businesses

- Experience creating educational content

- Experience managing social media growth

- Experience with marketing analytics and reporting dashboards

- Experience working with CRM and marketing automation platforms



---



Work Samples Required

To apply, please include examples of your previous work. Applications without work samples will not be considered.

Please include:

1. Links to websites where you helped improve SEO performance  

2. Examples of SEO articles or content you created  

3. Examples of SEO reports, dashboards, or analytics you produced  

4. Examples of digital marketing campaigns you have worked on  

5. Examples of
 marketing campaigns or marketing automation workflows you created



---



Video Introduction (Required)

Please record a short video (3–5 minutes) and include a link to the video in your application.

In the video, please:

1. Introduce yourself and describe your experience in digital marketing  

2. Describe the most successful marketing project you have worked on  

3. Explain your specific role in that project  

4. Explain what results were achieved (traffic, rankings, leads, conversions, etc.)  

5. Explain what strategies contributed most to the success



The video does not need to be professionally produced. A simple recording using your phone or computer camera is sufficient.



---



What We Offer

- Long-term opportunity with a growing U.S. law firm  

- Opportunity to lead digital marketing initiatives  

- Flexible remote work environment  

- Competitive compensation based on experience  

- Health insurance benefit

title: Video Editor & Content Creator — GroupAway Full-Time Remote | Performance-Based Pay | Long-Term
description:
ABOUT GROUPAWAY



We are GroupAway — the #1 platform in the Netherlands for unique travel experiences.

We organize adventurous and sport-focused group trips where people create new connections and unforgettable memories.





Website: 



We are looking for people who can create reels like this:



























WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We want a creative content machine who:



? Truly understands social media — in depth

? Actively researches what goes viral

? Has proven results

? Understands that emotion matters more than perfect edits

? Creates content that is highly shareable

? Understands the tone of voice of people aged 18–30



This is NOT someone who just cuts and edits clips.



We want someone who thinks like a content strategist.



WHAT YOU WILL DO Daily



• Edit and post at least 3 videos per day

• Post across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Pinterest

• Test Instagram Trial Reels to discover what works

• Write hooks and captions that stop the scroll



You will also brainstorm weekly for 30–45 minutes with our Head of Marketing to analyze what works and turn that into new content ideas for GroupAway.



CONTENT MIX



Quick Edits

10–15 seconds

Simple clips with text overlay, fast pacing



Medium Edits

30–45 seconds

More editing work, transitions, trending audio





WEEKLY



• Analyze the most viral videos with our marketing team

• Use those insights as inspiration and create our own versions

• Track performance and adjust strategy



WHO YOU WORK WITH



You will work directly with our Head of Marketing, who:



• Wants to involve you in strategy

• Will help you learn more about growth

• Is open to your ideas



This is an opportunity to grow, not just an editing job.



WHAT WE PROVIDE



• A LOT of raw content from our trips

• Multiple versions of footage per trip

• New content constantly coming in

• You never have to wait for footage



Your job:

Turn this footage into scroll-stopping content that makes people feel like they want to join the trip.



CONTENT PHILOSOPHY

What we DON’T want



? Perfect polished travel commercials

? Boring destination shots

? Content that looks like an advertisement



What we DO want



? Emotion — people should think “I want to experience this”

? FOMO — “I’m missing out if I don’t go”

? Shareable — people send it to friends

? Authentic — real reactions, real people, real 
nts

? Viral potential — content that can explode



Our goal:

Let as many people as possible discover our trips and feel the experience.



Not telling — showing.



COMPENSATION

Base Salary



$200–$300 per month (depending on experience)



Performance Bonuses (capped)

Milestone Bonus

Video hits 10K views +$5

Video hits 50K views +$15

Video hits 100K views +$25

Video hits 500K+ views +$50



Per 1,000 new followers: +$75



Maximum bonus: $300 per month



The better your content performs, the more you earn.



EXPECTED VOLUME



Minimum 3 videos per day

? 90 videos per month



Across all platforms.



You can easily prepare 20–30 videos per week in advance and schedule them.



These do not need to be complex edits, but you must understand what works on social media and turn footage into scroll-stopping, shareable content.



REQUIREMENTS

Must Have



• 2+ years of experience with short-form video

• Proven track record — show accounts you have grown

• Expert in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or InShot



• You actively research trends and viral content

• You understand hooks, watch time, saves, and shares

• You can produce 3+ videos per day



• Minimum 15 hours availability per week



TOOLS YOU SHOULD KNOW



• CapCut (fast edits)

• Trending audio tools (TrendTok, TikTok Creative Center)

• Basic analytics (Instagram Insights, TikTok Analytics)



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience with travel or lifestyle content

• Your own social media with strong engagement



PROVE YOU CAN DO IT



Do NOT apply without proof.



We want to see:



Accounts YOU have grown



• Before / after follower counts

• Your role (editor, manager, owner)



Viral videos YOU created



• Links with visible view counts

• Minimum 3 examples



Screen recordings of your work



Proof that the edits are actually yours



Your research process



How do you discover viral trends?

Which tools do you use?



TEST ASSIGNMENT

Step 1



We send you 5 raw clips from our trips



Step 2



You create:



• 2 quick edits (10–15 sec with text)

• 1 medium edit (30–45 sec with transitions + trending audio)

• Hooks + captions for each video



HOW TO APPLY



Send us:



• A short introduction about yourself (max 5 sentences)

• Links to accounts you have grown + your role

• 3 viral videos you created (with visible views)

• How you research viral trends

• Your availability (hours per day)

• Expected base salary (within our range)



DO NOT APPLY IF



• You cannot prove results

• You have never created viral content

• You just want to “learn” or “practice”

• You cannot produce 3 videos per day

• You only understand basic social media

• You don’t research trends yourself



WHY GROUPAWAY



Grow with us — work directly with our Head of Marketing

Creative freedom — your ideas matter

Performance bonuses

Amazing content — adventurous trips, real emotions

Long-term collaboration — we want a partner, not just a freelancer



Your mission:



Take our content to the next level.

More views. More shares. More people thinking:



“I need to be on that trip.”



Ready to create content that makes people feel something?



Apply now. Show us what you can do.

title: AI-Driven Paid Media Manager Wanted! Scale Meta & LinkedIn Ads for Fast-Growing Brands
description:
We are looking for a Paid Media Manager to oversee advertising strategy and execution across multiple brands.



This role is responsible for the full lifecycle of paid campaigns — strategy, implementation, optimization, reporting, and scaling. You will primarily manage campaigns on Meta 
/Instagram) and LinkedIn, while experience with other platforms such as Google Ads, TikTok, and YouTube is a plus.



A key part of this role is leveraging AI tools to improve advertising performance. This includes using AI for audience research, ad creative development, copy generation, testing strategies, and campaign analysis.



You will collaborate closely with our creative team to develop high-performing ad creatives and with our social media manager to adapt successful organic content into paid advertising campaigns.



You will be managing campaigns across multiple brands, so strong organization and data-driven decision making are essential.



To apply for this role please use 9 apply points.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Develop paid media strategies for multiple brands

• Launch and manage campaigns on Meta and LinkedIn Ads

• Allocate budgets and manage spend across campaigns

• Optimize campaigns for conversions, CPL, ROAS, and other performance metrics

• Analyze campaign performance and generate insights

• Build and maintain clear performance reporting dashboards

• Use AI tools to assist with research, copywriting, creative testing, and optimization

• Work with the creative team to produce high-performing ad creatives

• Collaborate with the social media manager to scale successful organic content into paid campaigns

• Continuously run A/B tests on audiences, messaging, creatives, and landing pages



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



• Proven experience managing Meta Ads campaigns

• Experience running LinkedIn Ads campaigns

• Strong analytical skills and ability to optimize campaigns based on data

• Experience managing campaigns across multiple brands or clients

• Experience using AI tools to improve marketing performance



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



• Google Ads

• TikTok Ads

• YouTube Ads

• Conversion tracking and attribution

• AI tools such as ChatGPT, Midjourney, Claude, or similar tools for marketing workflows



IDEAL CANDIDATE



• Data-driven and analytical

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable managing campaigns across multiple brands

• Experienced with AI tools and modern marketing workflows

• Proactive and able to independently improve campaign performance

title: Outbound Call Centre Operator (Educational Supplies)
description:
Employment Type: Independent Contractor

Location: Remote / Work from Home (Philippines)

Working Hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM (Sydney Time), 3 to 5 days per week

Reports To: Client Administrator (Based in Manila)



About Us & The Role

With over 20 years of success in the industry, we are proud to be the largest and most established operator in our segment, specializing in high-quality school educational supplies.



We are looking for an energetic, confident, and highly motivated Outbound Call Centre Operator to join our team on a contract basis. In this work-from-home role, you will report directly to and be fully supported by our Client Administrator, a Filipino native based in Manila.



Your primary focus will be making outbound cold calls to our target audience: primary school administrators, childcare educators, and science teachers. You will be the first point of contact, responsible for introducing our business, building relationships with educational professionals, and generating interest in our products.



If you have a naturally happy disposition, love talking to people, and want to work with an industry leader while enjoying local support, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

Make high-volume outbound cold calls to primary schools, childcare centers, and educational professionals.



Clearly and confidently communicate the value of our educational supplies to generate leads and interest.



Update and maintain accurate customer records and call logs using our CRM software.



Navigate Shopify to reference product catalogs, pricing, or customer data during calls.



Maintain a positive, upbeat, and resilient attitude, even when faced with rejection or busy school schedules.



Work closely with our Manila-based Client Administrator to ensure targets and quality standards are met.



What You Bring to the Table (Requirements)

Exceptional English Skills: You must possess strong, clear, and highly confident spoken English to effectively communicate with Australian educators.



A "Sunny" Disposition: A happy, enthusiastic, and approachable personality is an absolute must for this role!



Experience: Proven experience in outbound cold calling or a similar B2B telemarketing role.



Software Knowledge: Prior experience working with Shopify and navigating CRM software is required.



Reliability: Ability to consistently work between 8:00 AM and 3:00 PM Sydney time, 3 to 5 days a week.



Work-From-Home Technical Requirements

Primary Internet: A stable, high-speed wired internet connection (Minimum 20 Mbps).



Equipment: A reliable PC or laptop (Minimum 8GB RAM, Core i3/Ryzen 3 or equivalent) and a noise-canceling USB headset.



Backups: A reliable backup internet connection (e.g., pocket Wi-Fi or mobile data) and power backup in case of outages.



What We Provide

A fully funded VOIP telephone line to make your calls.



A flexible contract arrangement allowing you to work comfortably from your home.



Direct support and training from a local manager based in Manila.



The stability and prestige of working for a 20-year-old industry-leading business.



How to Apply

To apply, please reply with the subject line: "Sunny Educational Caller - [Your Name]".



In your
, please include:



Your up-to-date resume highlighting your outbound calling and Shopify/CRM experience.



A link to a brief, 1-minute voice recording (using Vocaroo or Google Drive) introducing yourself and explaining why you would be great at speaking with Australian teachers and school administrators.



A screenshot of your computer specs and your current internet speed test.



Note: Applications that do not follow these exact instructions will not be considered.

title: Shopify Developer — DTC Funnel Specialist
description:
Part-Time | Remote | $800/month depending on experience 



Who we are:

We're a fast-growing DTC skincare brand scaling on Meta and TikTok. We move fast, test constantly, and need someone who can build and iterate quickly without hand-holding.



What you'll be building:



• High-converting landing pages and advertorial pages in Shopify

• Full funnel flows: LP ? product page ? cart ? upsell 1 ? upsell 2 ? upsell 3 ? order confirmation

• Custom Shopify sections using Liquid that are editable from the theme customizer (no hardcoded content)

• A/B test variants of pages on a regular basis

• Integrations with apps like ReConvert, Zipify, or similar for post-purchase upsells



You must have experience with:



• Shopify theme development (Liquid, HTML, CSS, JS)

• Building DTC funnel pages — not just storefronts. You need to understand the difference between a homepage and a sales page.

• Post-purchase upsell flows (ReConvert, Zipify, or similar)

• Page speed optimization

• Mobile-first design



Bonus if you know:



• Replo or Shogun

• Meta Pixel / conversion event setup

• Checkout Champ or similar funnel builders



You're the right person if:



• You've built funnels that actually convert, not just pages that look nice

• You can take a wireframe or reference page and build it fast without 10 rounds of revisions

• You understand why a landing page is different from a product page

• You can work independently and flag problems early



To apply, answer these questions:





1. Share 2-3 Shopify stores or landing pages you've built — include the URL and what your role was

2. Have you built post-purchase upsell flows before? What app did you use and what was the result?

3. What's your availability and timezone?

4. Which AI tools are you currently using to help you speed up the web development process?

title: Web Developer — Travel Booking Platform (Remote, Long-Term)
description:
About the Company

Travel Confirmation Services FZE is a UAE-registered online platform that sells verified travel documents to visa applicants worldwide. We are in pre-launch phase and building the platform now. This is a ground-floor opportunity to be the sole developer on a growing international business.

About the Role

We need a reliable web developer to build and launch our platform within 6 weeks, then stay on for ongoing maintenance and updates. You will work remotely and coordinate day-to-day with our Digital Execution Assistant, with major decisions going directly through the CEO.

What You'll Be Building



A multi-language website covering 7 markets (English, French, German, Spanish, Arabic, Russian, Chinese)

API integrations with flight and hotel booking providers

An automated order and
 delivery system

A CMS for content uploads and blog management



Technical Skills Required



Third-party API integration (travel, booking, or payment APIs preferred)

Multi-language website development (/fr/, /de/, /ru/, /zh/ etc.)

Baidu Tongji analytics for Chinese market pages (no Google assets on /zh/ pages)

Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics setup

XML sitemap generation for multiple language URL paths

Strong attention to page load speed — Chinese market pages must load within 3 seconds



Work Setup



Remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

Full-time preferred

Must have a minimum 4-hour overlap with UAE time (GMT+4)

Stable internet connection required



What We Offer



Competitive salary (please state your expected monthly rate in your application)

Long-term role with a growing international business

Clear specifications provided — no guesswork

Direct CEO access for major decisions



How to Apply

Please send:



Portfolio or examples of similar sites you have built

Your experience with multi-language websites and API integrations

Your availability and expected monthly rate

title: Radiant Protocol | Content and Marketing Operator
description:
Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be reviewed.



Radiant Protocol is a skincare technology company building structured skin treatment protocols using LED light therapy devices and targeted serums.



We are not a traditional beauty brand.



Radiant Protocol develops skin optimization systems built around structured treatment routines.



Our system integrates



LED skincare technology

targeted serum formulas

structured skincare routines



We are currently preparing for product launch and building the marketing infrastructure that will support the brand.



We are hiring a Content and Marketing Operator to help build the marketing engine before launch.



Role Overview



This role focuses on



content creation

content research

 marketing drafts

landing page support

marketing organization

content systems



You will help build the marketing foundation before launch.



This is not a generic VA position. We are looking for someone organized, creative, and capable of producing high quality marketing work.



We are looking for someone interested in a long term role with a growing company, not short term freelance work.



What You Will Do



Content creation



Write captions and educational posts

Create Instagram carousel drafts using Canva

Edit short form videos using CapCut or similar tools

Develop content ideas related to skincare and LED therapy



Marketing support



Draft
 newsletters

Assist with landing page content

Help organize marketing funnels and workflows

Assist with GoHighLevel marketing setup



Research



Research LED skincare technology topics

Analyze competitor content and positioning

Generate new content ideas weekly



Organization



Organize Google Drive marketing folders

Maintain content libraries and templates

Build swipe files and reference folders



Tools We Use



GoHighLevel

Canva

CapCut

Google Drive

AI writing tools



Experience with these tools is helpful but not required if you can learn quickly.



Requirements



Strong written English

Clear professional communication

Basic Canva design ability

Ability to edit short form videos

Highly organized and detail oriented

Able to follow structured instructions carefully



Attention to detail matters in this role. Candidates who carefully read job descriptions tend to perform best in our environment. When applying, include the word blue somewhere naturally in your message so we know you reviewed the description carefully.



Preferred Experience



 marketing

Landing page building

GoHighLevel experience

Skincare or wellness content creation



Application Instructions



Your application must include the following.



The first line of your message must contain the word



PROTOCOL



Include a Loom video introduction.



Record a short 1 to 2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining your experience with



Canva

short form video editing

content writing



Include links or screenshots of at least two examples of work you created.



Acceptable examples include



Instagram carousels

short form video edits

caption writing

blog posts



Writing Prompt



Radiant Protocol believes skin improvement comes from consistent routines rather than random products.



In two or three sentences explain why consistent skincare routines are important.



Please write this answer in your own words. Responses that appear to be copied directly from ChatGPT or other AI tools tend to sound generic and will not be prioritized during review.



Content Thinking Task



Create three content ideas for a skincare brand that sells LED light therapy devices.



For each idea include



topic

hook

one sentence caption



Diagnostic Questions



Describe a situation where you were given a task with limited instructions. What did you do?



How do you stay organized when managing multiple tasks or deadlines?



If you were responsible for creating content for a skincare technology brand, what type of content would you create first and why?



Applications missing any of the following will not be reviewed



PROTOCOL in the first line

Loom video introduction

portfolio examples

writing prompt response

content ideas

diagnostic answers

title: Senior News & Documentary Video Editor (Full-Time Only)
description:
TWT Unleashed is the social and documentary arm of The Washington Times.



We produce serious, non?hysterical, conservative?leaning news content across TikTok, Instagram,
, YouTube, and X – plus high?end documentaries and live shows.



We’re looking for a Senior Video Editor who can own the edit, not just take orders.



APPLY HERE: 



What You’ll Own

- Turn raw news, interviews, and live shows into high?retention short?form clips (Reels, TikTok, Shorts, FB Reels).

- Build story arcs from long?form interviews / commentary into multiple clips that keep people watching to the end.

- Add captions, titles, sound design, motion, and B?roll that fit a serious, credible news brand.

- Help shape formats and visual language for the show (what “our look” is on each platform).

- Give clear direction to junior editors or motion designers when needed.

- Work directly with producers to improve turnaround time, formats, and performance over time.



This is a senior seat: you’re expected to make decisions, bring ideas, and build frameworks and templates – not wait for step?by?step instructions.



Schedule & Communication (Non?Negotiable)

- Full?time, 6 days per week, aligned to U.S. news cycles.

- Fixed daily working window with overlap to U.S. daytime.



During working hours you:

- Reply within 15–30 minutes on Slack

- Proactively update: “Draft uploaded,” “Need clarification on X,” “ETA 2 hours,” etc.

- Flag issues early so producers are never surprised by delays.

***If you want strict Monday–Friday, 9–5 with no urgency and no growth, this is not the role.***



Requirements

- 3–5+ years professional editing experience, including short?form for social (TikTok, Reels, Shorts).

- Strong reel of news / commentary / documentary?style work (not just gaming or 
 edits).

- Deep sense of storytelling, pacing, and hook selection for political / current?events content.

- Expert in Premiere Pro and After Effects



Comfortable with:

- Talking?head commentary

- Live show / panel clips

- Fast?moving news and sensitive topics

- Strong written and spoken English.

- Reliable computer and fast, stable internet (large file transfers daily).



What Success Looks Like

You consistently:

- Deliver edits on or before deadline, even with breaking stories.

- Need 1–2 revision rounds max because you understand the brand and tone.

- Increase retention and watch time on key platforms.

- Communicate early if a deadline is at risk and propose solutions.

- Are trusted to set the bar for other editors.

title: RECRUITER (NON-IT) – REMOTE
description:
Overview



This position requires a recruiter who is comfortable conducting proactive outreach and cold contact with candidates via phone,
, and LinkedIn.



We are a boutique U.S.-based recruiting firm seeking an experienced Recruiter with a strong background particularly in professional and management roles (non-IT recruiting).



This role primarily supports our Construction Worldwide division, which focuses on recruiting construction management professionals and executive-level candidates. From time to time, recruiting may also include general corporate roles (G&A) such as accounting, HR, Sales or administrative professionals.



Remote full-time role with long-term potential for the right person, based on performance.



This role is ideal for a recruiter who is resourceful, proactive, and comfortable actively reaching out to candidates through multiple channels, including phone,
, and LinkedIn.

________________________________________



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Candidate Sourcing

Identify and engage qualified candidates for roles including:

• Construction Management

   (Project Managers, Project Engineers, Superintendents, 

   Estimators, Architects — no labor roles)

• Executive & Management positions

• Accounting & Finance

• Office & Administrative roles

• Human Resources

• Sales & Marketing

________________________________________



Candidate Research



• Identify and verify candidate contact information, including personal and work details

• Use online research and sourcing tools to locate potential candidates

• Maintain organized candidate records in our ATS/CRM system

• Document candidate interactions and recruiting activity

________________________________________



Candidate Outreach



• Conduct proactive outreach via: Phone, LinkedIn,

• Screen candidates to evaluate qualifications and interest

• Maintain clear notes and status updates within the ATS

Important:

This role requires a recruiter who is comfortable proactively contacting candidates both at their personal and professional contact points when appropriate.

________________________________________



Candidate Screening & Process Management



• Conduct initial candidate screening conversations

• Evaluate experience and overall fit for client roles

• Coordinate next steps in the recruiting process

• Assist with reference checks and candidate follow-up when needed

________________________________________



Future Scope



• Research potential companies and hiring managers

• Identify job opportunities for strong candidates

• Support recruiting efforts across additional divisions as needed

________________________________________



REQUIREMENTS



Experience

• Minimum of 5+ years of recruiting experience (agency recruiting preferred)

• Experience recruiting professional or management-level roles

• Experience using ATS/CRM systems (PCRecruiter preferred)

________________________________________



Skills



• Strong sourcing and candidate research abilities

• Advanced Boolean search skills

• Excellent spoken and written English 

• Strong phone presence and communication skills

• Ability to build rapport quickly with candidates

• Excellent organizational and documentation habits

• Ability to follow instructions carefully and consistently

• Self-motivated and able to work independently after training

________________________________________



Technical Skills



• LinkedIn and online sourcing platforms

• Google Docs

• MS Word / Excel

• MS Teams / Zoom or similar tools

• ATS / CRM systems

• Experience using contact finder tools



Preferred but not required:

• LinkedIn Recruiter access

________________________________________



Additional Requirements



• Excellent spoken and written English

• Typing speed 50+ WPM preferred

• Strong internet research skills

• Reliable high-speed internet connection

• Personal computer suitable for remote work



Highly valued:

• Experience recruiting construction management professionals

________________________________________



SCHEDULE



• Remote position

• Work hours aligned with U.S. Pacific Time (PST/PDT)

• Full-time

• 8+ hours per day

• Availability between 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PT

________________________________________

COMPENSATION



• Hourly pay: $3.50 – $7.00 per hour

  (approximately $600 – $1,200 per month, depending on hours and experience)



• Applicants should indicate their desired hourly rate

• Bonus opportunities may be available based on base compensation and performance

________________________________________



HOW TO APPLY



Please submit the following:

1. Resume including your LinkedIn profile

2. Roles you have recruited for in the past

        (industries, titles, locations, compensation ranges)

3. Sourcing methods and platforms you typically use

4. ATS/CRM systems you have worked with

5. Any sourcing tools you subscribe to

6. Your desired hourly rate (minimum and ideal)

7. Your availability (U.S. Pacific Time hours)

8. A short voice recording introducing yourself and sharing one recruiting success story

________________________________________

title: Senior Salesforce Developer (Automation & Flow Specialist)
description:
About the Role

We are seeking an experienced Senior Salesforce Developer to manage, improve, and maintain our Salesforce system used for marketing, sales, and student enrollment operations within an international education company.

This role focuses heavily on Salesforce Flow automation, troubleshooting existing automation, improving system performance, and implementing scalable Salesforce solutions.

You will help maintain and expand a complex Salesforce installation used by internal sales and operations teams.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

Salesforce Automation

• Design, build, and maintain Salesforce Flows

• Troubleshoot and improve existing automation

• Implement lead routing and pipeline automation

• Improve reliability and performance of workflows

Development

• Write and maintain Apex classes and triggers

• Build Lightning Web Components (LWC)

• Improve internal Salesforce tools and user experience

• Follow Salesforce development best practices

System Optimization

• Audit the current Salesforce configuration

• Identify inefficient automation and improve architecture

• Maintain roles, permissions, and security

• Ensure system reliability and performance

Integrations

• Integrate Salesforce with external systems using REST APIs

• Support integrations with marketing platforms and web applications

• Troubleshoot API and integration issues

Reporting

• Build advanced Salesforce reports and dashboards

• Improve data quality and validation rules

• Support sales pipeline and marketing performance reporting

________________________________________

Required Skills

• 3+ years working with Salesforce

• Strong experience with Salesforce Flow

• Experience with Apex development

• Experience with Lightning Web Components

• Knowledge of SOQL

• Experience with Salesforce API integrations

• Strong troubleshooting and debugging ability

• Experience working remotely with international teams

________________________________________

Preferred Qualifications

• Salesforce certifications such as:

o Salesforce Administrator

o Platform Developer I

• Experience with Sales Cloud

• Experience supporting high-volume lead pipelines

• Experience working with U.S. companies

________________________________________

Work Environment

• Fully remote position

• Long-term full-time role

• Work with an international team

• Opportunity for growth within the organization

________________________________________

Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

To apply, please follow all instructions below.

1. Keyword Requirement

At the top of your application message, include the phrase:

Salesforce Automation Expert

Applications that do not include this phrase will not be considered.

________________________________________

2. Technical Questions (Required)

Please answer the following questions in your application:

1. Describe a Salesforce Record-Triggered Flow you built and what problem it solved.

2. What is the difference between a Before-Save Flow and After-Save Flow?

3. When would you use Apex instead of Flow?

________________________________________

3. Architecture Question

If you inherit a Salesforce system with many slow or failing Flows, what steps would you take to diagnose and fix the problem?

________________________________________

4. Short Video Introduction

Please include a 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and describing your Salesforce experience.

________________________________________

Application Materials

Please include:

• Resume

• Answers to the technical questions above

• Link to your Loom video

________________________________________

This position is for a serious Salesforce developer who can help improve and maintain a complex Salesforce system.



Senior Salesforce Developer (Automation & Flow Specialist)



Salary: $1,800 – $2,000 per month

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Schedule: Monday – Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST

Employment Type: Full-Time

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)

This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.

This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify quickly, handle objections, and close.

We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs including:

• CompTIA certification

• Project Management Professional (PMP) certification

We provide warm leads.

You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)

• Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students

• Run structured consultative enrollment calls

o Needs analysis ? recommendation ? close

• Control the conversation and ask directly for the enrollment

• Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency

• Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies

• Log activity and outcomes accurately in the CRM

• Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals

• Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews

If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.

________________________________________

Who This Role Is For

• Proven outbound / inside sales closers

• Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone

• Strong command of English with U.S. cultural fluency

• Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions

• Competitive, coachable, and metrics-driven

• Organized and accountable without supervision

Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus.

Familiarity with CompTIA or PMP programs helps—but closing ability matters more.

Bachelor’s degree required.

________________________________________

Who Should NOT Apply

Do not apply if you:

• Only want inbound leads

• Are uncomfortable asking for money

• Avoid objection handling

• Want a “soft” admissions role

• Struggle with activity targets

• Disappear when pressure increases

This is a performance environment.

________________________________________

Schedule

Monday – Friday

10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST

________________________________________

Compensation

Base pay: $1,200 – $1,600 USD per month

Performance-based advancement and leadership path.

Long-term role with stability and growth for performers.

Top performers move quickly.

Average performers do not last.

________________________________________

What You Get

• Warm leads with real intent

• Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching

• Legitimate career certification programs

• A sales culture that rewards results

• Real opportunity for long-term growth

________________________________________

Application Instructions (Important)

To apply:

1. Submit your resume

2. Include a short paragraph describing your best closing experience

3. Record a 1-minute Loom video explaining how you handle price objections

At the top of your application message, include the phrase:

“I close.”

Applications without this phrase will not be considered.

________________________________________

Bottom Line

If you can:

• Control a sales conversation

• Build urgency without lying

• Close consistently

• Take coaching and improve

You will win here.

If not—this role will expose you quickly.
