title: Remote RN (Philippines) – Compliance & Operations Coordinator
description:
Remote RN (Philippines) – Overnight Shift – Compliance & Operations Coordinator

Company: Ecolux Senior Living

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time Remote

Compensation: $800–$1,200/month depending on experience



About Ecolux Senior Living:

Ecolux Senior Living is a boutique assisted living company based in California, USA. We operate small residential care homes that provide personalized care for seniors in a comfortable home-like environment. Our focus is compassionate care, excellent compliance, and high operational standards. As we expand to multiple homes, we are building a remote operations and clinical support team to help oversee documentation, compliance, and daily operations across our facilities. This is a remote administrative role (non-clinical).



Role Overview:

We are seeking a licensed Registered Nurse (RN) based in the Philippines to work remotely as a Clinical Compliance & Operations Coordinator. In this role you will support our care homes by monitoring care documentation, maintaining compliance checklists, organizing resident records, reviewing caregiver documentation, assisting with operations oversight, and helping maintain high standards of care. You will act as a remote support hub helping ensure smooth operations across multiple facilities.



Work Schedule:

This role supports daytime operations in California and therefore requires overnight hours in the Philippines.

Coverage window: 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM California time

Shift structure: 12-hour window with 10 working hours and up to 2 hours flexible breaks

Typical schedule (Philippines time): approximately 10:00 PM – 10:00 AM depending on daylight savings.

Days: Monday – Friday preferred. Some flexibility may be possible.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Medication Documentation Review: Review medication administration records (MAR), identify missing signatures, flag missed medications, ensure medications are properly documented, and maintain organized medication records.



2. Resident Care Documentation Monitoring: Review ADL documentation, hydration logs, bowel movement logs, caregiver shift notes, fall reports, and i
 reports to ensure all required documentation is completed properly.



3. RCFE Compliance & Licensing Checklists: Maintain compliance checklists related to California Residential Care Facility for the Elderly (RCFE) regulations including resident files, medication records, staff training documentation, physician orders, i
 reports, safety documentation, and emergency preparedness records. Help prepare documentation for licensing inspections.



4. Facility Operations Checklists: Track daily caregiver tasks, facility cleaning checklists, medication inventory, resident activity logs, safety checks, and operational tasks. Maintain a daily or weekly operations dashboard to help ensure everything is completed.



5. Remote Caregiver Oversight Support: Review caregiver shift notes, monitor completion of daily checklists, identify missing tasks or documentation, send reminders when documentation is incomplete, and help ensure consistent care standards.



6. Camera Monitoring for Quality Control: When requested, monitor camera feeds to help ensure resident safety, caregiver attentiveness, and completion of operational tasks. Report any concerns to management.



7. Resident Communication Support: Occasionally communicate with residents, caregivers, or family members via phone or video to check on residents, assist with communication, and help ensure a positive resident experience.



8. Resident Chart & File Management: Maintain organized digital resident records including admission documents, care plans, medication lists, physician orders, hospice documentation, i
 reports, and progress notes so all records remain inspection-ready.



9. Testimonials & Marketing Support: Organize video testimonials from families, upload testimonial videos to YouTube, help post updates to social media, and maintain organized media files in Google Drive.



10. Administrative Support: Assist with organizing documents, preparing resident files, maintaining checklists, generating reports, updating dashboards, and supporting general administrative tasks as needed.



Technology Used:

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

Airtable or similar database systems

Care management or documentation systems

Camera monitoring systems

YouTube and social media platforms

Training will be provided.



Required Qualifications:

Licensed Registered Nurse (RN) in the Philippines.

Strong English communication skills (written and spoken).

Highly organized and detail-oriented.

Comfortable working remotely with digital tools and systems.

Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently.



Preferred Experience:

Experience with senior care, assisted living, healthcare documentation review, compliance monitoring, EMR/eMAR systems, or remote healthcare support roles is helpful but not required.



What We Offer:

Stable long-term remote position with a growing healthcare company.

Opportunity for career growth as the company expands to multiple facilities.

Supportive team environment and competitive compensation for remote healthcare roles.



How to Apply:

Please send your resume, a short 1–2 minute video introduction explaining your nursing background and why you are interested in remote healthcare work, and your expected monthly salary.



Important: To confirm you read this job post carefully, please begin your application message with the words “Ecolux Care.”

title: Junior Digital Artist / Vector Graphics Assistant
description:
Remote | Contract | Philippines Applicants Preferred



About Us

We are a woman-owned creative studio based in Los Angeles, California working with VTubers, streamers, content creators, and digital brands.

Our focus is building internet-native media such as motion graphics, intro videos, creator branding, thumbnails, announcement videos, website visuals, and social media content.

We are a small but growing creative studio that values collaboration, creativity, and initiative. We are looking for artists who understand online culture and want to grow with a team from the ground up.

This role will start as contract work while we build a workflow together, with the potential for long-term collaboration as the studio grows.



The Role

You will work under the Creative Director helping prepare artwork and graphics used for motion graphics, branding, and video content.

This role focuses on digital design production and preparing assets for animation, not frame-by-frame animation.



What You Will Be Creating

Projects may include:



• Vectorizing artwork using Adobe Illustrator

• Preparing layered PSD or Illustrator files for animation

• Creating simple logos and branding assets

• Stream graphics such as icons, badges, and overlays

• Thumbnail artwork for YouTube and social media

• Visual assets used in creator branding

• Website graphics and marketing visuals

• Preparing design files for the motion graphics editor



Responsibilities

• Convert raster artwork into clean vector graphics

• Organize layered PSD or AI files for animation workflows

• Create simple logos, icons, and graphic assets

• Assist with thumbnails and digital marketing visuals

• Follow creative direction while contributing ideas

• Deliver organized files with proper layer structure

• Work collaboratively with the motion graphics editor and creative lead



What We Are Looking For

• Digital art or graphic design experience

• Familiarity with Photoshop, Illustrator, or Clip Studio

• Ability to organize layered artwork for production

• Understanding of composition and design basics

• Reliable communication in a remote work environment

• Interest in internet culture, streaming, gaming, or online creators



Formal education is not required, but a strong portfolio is important.



Bonus Skills

• Experience with Adobe Illustrator vector workflows

• Familiarity with motion graphics pipelines

• YouTube thumbnail design experience

• Understanding of anime-style art or digital illustration

• Experience creating branding assets for creators or streamers



Work Setup

• Remote work

• Contract position

• Up to 20 hours per week depending on workload

• Flexible schedule



You will work directly under the Creative Director and collaborate with a motion graphics editor as part of a small creative team.



Compensation

Junior Digital Artist (Entry Level)

• $3 – $5 USD per hour depending on portfolio and experience

• Up to 20 hours per week depending on project workload

• Estimated monthly pay $240 – $400



The first 30 days will serve as a trial period to establish workflow and expectations.



Pay increases may be considered later based on performance and long-term collaboration.



How to Apply



Please include:



• A link to your portfolio or artwork samples

• Examples of logos, digital art, or graphic design work

• Any examples of vector or Illustrator work if available

• A short answer to this question:



Which streamer, VTuber, or YouTube creator do you think has great visual branding and why?

title: Motion Graphics Designer / Video Editor

Our focus is building internet native media such as motion graphics, intro videos, creator branding, thumbnails, announcement videos, website visuals, and social media content.

title: Video Editors! Turn Raw Podcasts & Interviews into Long-Form Episodes + Social Clips
description:
Love editing podcasts, interviews, and social clips? Want to own the full editing process from raw footage to polished long-form content to short-form clips? This job is for you.



This is a full-funnel editing role. You will take raw recordings and interviews, edit them into polished long-form episodes, and then turn that content into engaging short-form clips for social media.



You’ll be working on:



- Long-form podcast and interview editing

- Short-form video clips for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and LinkedIn

- Raw interview footage edited from start to finish

- Branded content that needs strong pacing, storytelling, and polish



How We Work: 



Our workflow primarily uses Final Cut Pro and Motion, not Premier/After Effects. We use AI tools like Riverside for podcast recording and AI-assisted editing, and OpusClip for clipping long-form content into short-form pieces. These tools help speed up the workflow, but they do not replace great editing. We still need someone who can take that final 20% and make every piece feel polished, intentional, and on-brand.



Soft Skills We Love:



- Attention to detail – Your edits are polished and professional

- Creativity – You know how to make content feel dynamic and engaging

- Strong judgment – You know when AI gets you 80% there and when manual editing is needed

- Time management – You meet deadlines consistently

- Proactive & self-motivated – You take ownership and keep projects moving



Desired (But Not Required) Skills:



- Ability to animate graphics or bring static designs to life

- Experience supporting a design team with simple motion graphics

- Basic knowledge of audio editing and mixing



To apply to this position please use 9 apply appoints. 



Work Schedule & Benefits:



- Monday–Friday (flexible schedule, results-based work)

- 13th-month pay + performance bonuses

- Paid Philippine holidays + PTO after 6 months

- Additional benefits and opportunities for training & career grow

title: Spanish-Speaking Maintenance Coordinator
description:
Job Overview

-Implement and monitor preventive and corrective maintenance programs

-Prepare and manage monthly maintenance budgets by city, and support planning for repairs and upgrades

-Review maintenance logs, identify recurring issues, and ensure long-term solutions are implemented

-Coordinate emergency responses remotely, including leaks, power outages, and lockouts

-Schedule inspections and follow up on payments, permits, and licenses

-Manage vendor relationships, including obtaining at least 3 quotes per project, handling contracts, monitoring service quality, and following up on payments

-Coordinate repairs, installations, and property setup needs

-Follow up on
s, quotes, requests, work orders, and payments



Requirements



-Fluent Spanish speaker required

-Good English communication skills

-Minimum 1–2 years of experience in hotel maintenance, property maintenance, or facilities coordination

-Proven experience coordinating remote teams and external contractors

-Strong organizational and follow-up skills

-Experience using digital project management tools such as Asana, Trello, or similar platforms

-Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities across different locations

-Preferred Qualifications

-Experience working with hotels or hospitality properties

-Experience handling vendor coordination, repairs, and maintenance scheduling in the U.S.

-Familiarity with maintenance logs, budgets, and emergency coordination



Key Competencies



-Strong remote leadership skills

-Results-oriented mindset with a focus on operational efficiency

-Ability to solve problems quickly and proactively

-Remote position

-Work involves coordinating maintenance teams and vendors supporting hotel properties in the United States

title: Urgent Hiring: Onboarding Specialist for a US-based Law Firm
description:
Important Notice to Applicants:



Any applications or direct contact including
s, social media messages, direct messages to our CEO will not be considered and will be automatically declined.



About the Company

Ethen Ostroff Law (EOL) is a passionate law firm led by Ethen Ostroff, a licensed attorney in Pennsylvania. Our firm is dedicated to advocating for the injured and vulnerable, with a mission to make a meaningful impact by fighting for justice and ensuring that our clients’ rights are protected.

About the Role:

The Onboarding Specialist is responsible for initiating and completing the onboarding process for clients seeking case representation and document retrieval services. This role focuses on outbound outreach and follow-up with individuals who have not completed required onboarding steps, are non-compliant with document requests, or have missed scheduled appointments.

When contact is established, the Onboarding Specialist will guide the client through the onboarding process, explain service requirements, and collect or request necessary information and documentation to move the case forward.



Key Responsibilities

Conduct outbound calls to individuals who have not completed onboarding requirements or have missed scheduled calls/appointments.

Follow up with non-compliant or no-show clients to re-engage them in the onboarding process.

When contact is made, complete the onboarding process over the phone, including explaining services, requirements, and next steps.

Collect, verify, and document client information and required documentation for case representation and document retrieval.

Educate clients on the importance of compliance with documentation and process timelines.

Accurately update case notes, call attempts, and onboarding status in the system.

Coordinate with internal teams to ensure all required documentation and information are submitted and processed.

Track and manage assigned cases to ensure timely onboarding completion.

Maintain professionalism, confidentiality, and compliance with company policies when handling client information.

Why Work with Us:

Permanent work-from-home arrangement

Paid time off (PTO) available

Health card/Health insurance coverage

Opportunities for professional growth and development

Supportive and inclusive team culture

Work-life balance initiatives

How to Apply: Please send your application ONLY to 
 your subject line begins with "Your Next Admin Legal Filer  is Here!" to help us correctly identify your application for this position. This also confirms that you've thoroughly read and understood the job description before applying.

title: Customer Service Specialist – Strong Attention to Detail
description:
We are seeking a highly dependable and detail-oriented Customer Service & Supply Chain Specialist with solid experience in fashion dropshipping. This is a long-term position for someone who can work independently, communicate effectively, and consistently deliver accurate, high-quality results. A major part of the role involves coordinating with suppliers, monitoring order fulfillment, and ensuring smooth end-to-end operations. Many customer replies will be supported by AI tools.



Key Responsibilities:

Use internal spreadsheets and documents to manage daily workflows and maintain accurate operational records.

Respond to HelpScout tickets promptly (expected output: 30–40 tickets per hour).

Follow return policy procedures, including offering discounts, issuing refunds, and providing return instructions.

Report damaged or incorrect items to suppliers (via 
 or CJ) and secure replacements or refunds.

Coordinate closely with suppliers regarding shipment updates, replacements, cancellations, and all fulfillment-related concerns.

Oversee order fulfillment, ensuring all unfulfilled Shopify orders are followed up, and resolve issues regarding size, color, inventory availability, and address verification.

Proven experience with CJ Dropshipping is mandatory.

Collaborate with both Customer Service and Supply Chain teams to keep operations running smoothly.



Qualifications



Required: Proven experience in fashion dropshipping and supply chain/order fulfillment (applications without this will not be reviewed).

Proven knowledge on the ins and outs in CJ Dropshipping in terms of order fulfillment.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Experience with Zendesk, Gorgias, HelpScout, Shopify, and other customer service or fulfillment tools.

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple responsibilities independently.

Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Comfortable giving feedback and proposing improvements to operational processes.

Add the word “sky” in the subject line when applying, followed by your years of experience.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary + KPI-based bonuses

Long-term, work-from-home setup

Flexible schedule within agreed hours

Strong opportunities for career growth as the company expands



How to Apply:

Your resume

A cover letter detailing your fashion dropshipping, supplier coordination, and order fulfillment experience, and explaining why you are an ideal fit for this role.

title: Short-Term Rental Virtual Assistant (Guest Communication & Operations)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant to support the daily operations of a growing short-term rental property management business.



This role focuses on guest communication, coordinating cleaning and maintenance, and ensuring smooth check-in and check-out experiences for guests. The ideal candidate has experience supporting Airbnb or short-term rental operations, is highly responsive, and can manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced hospitality environment.



Key Responsibilities

Guest Communication

- Respond promptly to guest inquiries, booking questions, and support requests across booking platforms

- Send check-in instructions, check-out reminders, and property information

- Monitor guest messages and escalate urgent issues when necessary



Cleaning & Turnover Coordination

- Coordinate cleaning schedules between guest check-outs and new arrivals

- Ensure cleaning teams are assigned and confirm turnovers are completed

- Resolve last-minute cleaning issues to ensure properties are guest-ready



Maintenance Coordination

- Monitor maintenance requests from guests or cleaners

- Coordinate repairs with vendors and track issue resolution

- Escalate urgent issues that may affect guest stays



Platform & System Management

- Manage daily operations through short-term rental software platforms

- Update reservations, notes, and guest information

- Assist with automation setup for guest messaging and workflows



Pricing & Listing Support

- Monitor dynamic pricing tools and update listings when needed

- Assist with property listing updates and ensure listing details remain accurate



Operational Support

- Track daily check-ins and check-outs

- Document recurring issues and suggest workflow improvements

- Provide general administrative support for property management operations



Qualifications

- Experienced in short-term rental or property management support

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Comfortable managing multiple properties and tasks

- Excellent at written English communication

- Able to handle time-sensitive guest concerns professionally

- Reliable and able to work independently



Preferred Qualifications



- Airbnb, VRBO, or other short-term rental platforms

- Hospitable or similar property management systems

- Turno (cleaning coordination)

- PriceLabs or dynamic pricing tools

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail)

- Slack or similar communication tools



If interested, please send your Whatsapp number and a short video intro highlighting your experience.

title: Web Builder and Automation Specialist
description:
Role Summary

You build and maintain websites, landing pages, funnels, and basic automations for multiple brands. Your core tools are GoHighLevel and WordPress. You also set up and troubleshoot integrations using 
, Zapier, and related tools.

You work fast, keep builds tidy, document what you do, and communicate clearly.



Work Arrangement

•Contractor role, not employment

•20-30 hours per week, flexible schedule

•Remote, Philippines only

•Paid hourly or on a weekly retainer, based on experience and capability



Key Responsibilities

GoHighLevel

•Build landing pages, funnels, forms, surveys, calendars, and basic membership pages

•Set up domains, DNS records, and SSL where required

•Apply mobile responsive design and consistent styling

•Create and maintain reusable page templates and section blocks

•Troubleshoot page, form, tracking, and publishing issues

WordPress

•Build and maintain WordPress sites using modern page builders and themes

•Implement basic on-page SEO and performance improvements

•Install, configure, and maintain plugins with a security-first approach

•Troubleshoot site issues including layout breaks, caching, and plugin conflicts

•Manage backups, updates, and staging where required

Automations and Integrations

•Build workflows in GoHighLevel including triggers, campaigns, pipelines, tasks, and notifications

•Create integrations using 
 and Zapier

•Connect forms, calendars, payment links, CRM fields, Google Sheets, Slack,
 providers, and webhooks

•Debug automation failures using logs, test data, and structured checks

•Document automations so they're easy to maintain and hand over

Quality and Delivery

•Work from briefs and checklists, then fill gaps without being chased

•Maintain clean naming conventions and folder structure

•Provide handover notes, short Loom videos, or step-by-step documentation

•Track time and tasks accurately

•Flag risks early and propose practical fixes



Skills and Experience

Must Have

•Strong GoHighLevel experience with pages and core CRM features

•Strong WordPress experience building and maintaining client sites

•Comfortable with 
 or Zapier, including multi-step scenarios

•Solid understanding of domains, DNS, SSL, and basic hosting concepts

•Good design judgement and attention to detail

•Clear written English and reliable communication

•Able to work independently and hit deadlines

Nice to Have

•Basic HTML and CSS for quick fixes and styling control

•Experience with tracking and analytics: GA4, Meta Pixel, UTM structure

??
 deliverability basics: SPF, DKIM, DMARC

•Experience building SOPs or internal documentation



Tools You'll Use

GoHighLevel, WordPress, 
, Zapier, Google Workspace, Loom or similar screen recording tool, and a project management tool such as Airtable, ClickUp, Trello, or Asana.



What Good Looks Like

•Pages and sites launched on time with minimal revisions

•Automations run reliably with clear logs and documentation

•Reduced rework through consistent naming, structure, and templates

•Fast turnaround on fixes and improvements

•Clean handovers so others can maintain the work



What to Include in Your Application

•Links to 3-5 relevant GHL and WordPress builds

•A short summary of your GoHighLevel experience and what you build most

•A short summary of your automation experience, including 
 or Zapier examples

•Your weekly availability and usual working hours

•Your internet speed and backup connection details



Contract Notes

This is a contractor role. You manage your own taxes and government contributions. You supply your own equipment and a stable internet connection. Work is assigned and paid based on agreed scope and tracked hours.

title: E-mail marketing + Whatsapp marketing specialist
description:

What You'll Do

- Monitor & report critical metrics to optimize performance continuously

- Collaborate with the team on seasonal changes and special promotions

- Identify trends & opportunities in customer behavior to inform strategy



Tools You'll Use

-
 Marketing: Klayvio (primary platform)

- WhatsApp Marketing: Klayvio (integrated WhatsApp Business API)

- Analytics & Reporting: Klayvio dashboards + native platfor
trics



What We're Looking For

Must-Have Experience

- 2+ years in
 marketing for fashion/ecommerce dropshipping or similar non-branded retail

- Proven WhatsApp marketing experience – campaigns, flow setup, customer engagement sequences

- Deep familiarity with Klayvio

- Data-driven mindset – you live by metrics and use them to make your own decisions

Nice-to-Have

 platforms (Substack, ConvertKit)

About You

etup in Cebu)



How to Apply

 & WhatsApp campaign experience)

title: Operations & Chinese Document Agent
description:
Company: MetaOne



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $2.00 - $3.00 USD per hour



Job Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)



Schedule: Philippine daytime hours



About Us:

We are MetaOne, a fast-growing, multi-national startup operating as a "Digital Assembly Line." We manage B2B client pipelines, e-commerce stores, and digital media production across Canada, the Philippines, and China. We are an AI-first company that heavily utilizes tools like ChatGPT and automation to work faster and smarter.



The Role:

We are looking for a highly organized, tech-savvy Operations & Document Specialist to support our Philippines Regional Manager (Kristine) and our China Hub Manager (Wang).



This role is the operational engine of our daily workflow. You will act as the central text-based communication bridge between our English and Chinese teams on WeChat, oversee day-to-day task tracking, and take the lead on drafting and formatting professional business documents, SOPs, and contracts in Chinese using AI.



Important Note: This is a STRICTLY NO VOICE role. You do not need to speak Mandarin on calls. However, you will heavily use AI tools to draft, translate, and format Chinese business documents. You must have the critical thinking and QA skills to verify that AI-generated text sounds professional, culturally accurate, and perfectly fluent.



Main Responsibilities:



Day-to-Day Operations & Tracking: Act as the operational right-hand to management. Keep our ClickUp boards updated, track daily deliverables between the Philippines and China teams, and ensure no tasks fall through the cracks.



Chinese Business Documentation: Use AI tools (ChatGPT, DeepL, etc.) to draft, localize, and refine formal business documents, Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), contracts, and proposals into highly professional Chinese.



Document Formatting & Design: Take raw text and format it into clean, corporate Microsoft Word documents and polished PowerPoint (PPT) or Google Slides presentations.



WeChat Coordination (Text Only): Act as the fast, reliable text-bridge between the China Hub and the Philippines Regional Manager, ensuring instructions are clearly translated and understood by both sides.



Quality Control: Perform rigorous QA on all AI-generated Chinese documents to ensure correct business terminology and formatting before they are sent to B2B partners or the China Hub.



Who You Are (Requirements):



Operational Mindset: You love organization, trackers, spreadsheets, and ensuring day-to-day workflows run smoothly. Experience with ClickUp (or similar tools like Asana/Trello) is highly preferred.



Document Master: You are highly skilled in formatting professional Word documents and designing clean, corporate presentations.



Tech & AI Savvy: You are a power-user of AI text generators and translation tools, knowing exactly how to prompt them for natural, localized business language.



Excellent Written English & QC: Your written English is flawless. Even when using AI for Chinese, you have a strong enough workflow to verify that the final text is highly professional and accurate.



Fast & Reliable: You are proactive, quick to respond on WeChat, and thrive in a fast-paced, remote environment.



How to Apply:

If you are an operational powerhouse who excels at managing tasks and formatting documents, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume and a brief message explaining your experience with task trackers (like ClickUp) and using AI for document creation. Please make sure to leave us your WhatsApp number so we can contact you directly.



Please note: This position begins with a 2-week trial period to ensure it is a great fit for both sides. The trial period is compensated at $2.00 USD per hour, and you will be paid weekly via Wise.

title: Experienced Canadian P&C Quoting Specialist (CompuQuote/ARS) - 100% Non-Voice
description:
Compensation: $5.60 – $7.50 USD per hour (Approx. $900 – $1,200 USD / 50,000 – 66,000 PHP per month) based on proven experience.

Schedule: Full-Time, Night Shift (Working Eastern Standard Time / EST)

Location: Remote (Work From Home - Philippines)



About the Role:

We are hiring a Tenured Canadian P&C Quoting Specialist. This is NOT an entry-level position. We are looking for an experienced professional who can hit the ground running on day one with minimal training.



This is a 100% NON-VOICE, behind-the-scenes administrative role. Your primary job is to take raw client data from our Canadian brokers and rapidly input it into Canadian rating engines (CompuQuote/ARS) to generate highly accurate pricing spreadsheets.



Key Responsibilities:



Receive raw client data (Canadian Driver's License numbers, VINs, Postal Codes, Autoplus claims history) from local brokers.



Perform rapid, highly accurate data entry strictly into Canadian P&C rating software (CompuQuote or Applied Rating Services / ARS).



Run quotes across 10+ different Canadian insurance carriers (e.g., Intact, Aviva, Wawanesa) to find the most competitive rates.



Perform Quality Assurance (QA) checks to ensure all province-specific discounts are applied (e.g., Winter Tires, Retiree discounts).



What We Are Looking For (Strict Requirements):



Proven Experience: Minimum 2+ years working specifically as a Rater or Quoting Assistant for a Canadian P&C insurance brokerage. (Please do not apply if your only experience is with US insurance).



Software Mastery: You must be highly proficient in CompuQuote or Applied Rating Services. We will test your knowledge of this software during the interview process.



Speed & Accuracy: 50+ WPM typing speed with near 100% accuracy. You know how to input a 17-digit VIN flawlessly.



Tech Requirements: A secure, quiet home workspace, highly reliable high-speed internet (minimum 25 Mbps), and a backup power supply.

Content must be well-researched, vivid, and written for an audience that loves discovering the best of Texas. Completed articles are submitted daily through our content system.



What We're Looking For:

- Strong research skills — ability to write convincingly about places you haven't visited

- Natural, engaging voice with a feel for travel and lifestyle content

- Ability to meet daily submission deadlines consistently

- Prior experience writing for websites or online publications



Do Not Apply If:

- You are not based in the Philippines

- You have no prior writing or publishing experience

- You cannot commit to daily article submissions



Compensation

24,000 pesos/month, paid 12,000 every 2 weeks



How to Apply

Send the following to 
 with subject line "Texas Writer":

- A short intro about yourself and your writing background

- 2–3 writing samples (travel, lifestyle, or local interest preferred)

- Links to any previously published articles online

title: Fire & Security Growth Blueprint Design (Figma)
description:
Hi,



I'm looking for a designer who can take an already written report and turn it into a high quality industry report style PDF.



This will be the first of many documents so I'm ideally looking for someone I can work with long term if the first project goes well.



The goal is to make the report feel premium, authoritative and visually strong, not like a generic ebook.



Reference style



I already have an existing document that contains the exact branding and design style I want used.



Please use this document as the design reference:



Typography style



Colours



Layout



Highlight blocks



Image treatment



Overall visual feel



The new report should match this design system so everything feels consistent across our materials.



Example elements from the reference document include:



Dark backgrounds



Large bold headlines



Highlighted words in colour blocks



Strong image overlays



Minimal but impactful layouts



This existing document shows the style direction very clearly.



What you will be designing



A report called:



Fire & Security Growth Blueprint



Industry Benchmarks, Lead Generation Strategies and Growth Models for UK Fire & Security Contractors



The report is already written.



Your job is to turn the content into a visually strong report using the same style as the reference document.



The final output should be:



Figma file



Exported PDF



Fully editable layouts



Document size



Approximately:



15 pages total



This includes:



Cover page

Section pages

Charts / visualised data

Callout boxes



Key design goals



The report should feel like:



Industry research

Consultancy insight

Executive briefing



Not like a sales brochure.



Think:



Clean

Bold

Professional

Authority driven



Design elements to include



Please include visual elements where appropriate.



Examples:



Charts



Lead source distribution pie chart



Revenue comparison chart



Before vs after growth chart



Scorecard bar chart



Process diagrams



Lead funnel



Growth system



Callout blocks



Key insights



Important statistics



Benchmark numbers



Icons where appropriate.



Images



Use imagery related to:



Fire alarm systems

CCTV installations

Commercial security systems

Technicians installing equipment

Commercial buildings



Images should match the dark, cinematic style used in the reference PDF.



Page structure overview



The report contains roughly these sections:



Introduction

Industry growth reality

Lead sources in the security industry

Lead cost benchmarks

Lead cost by platform

Conversion benchmarks

Installation values

Revenue growth model

Maintenance contract opportunity

Common growth leaks

Growth scorecard

Industry benchmark scores

Predictable growth systems

Growth diagnostic explanation

Next steps



You will receive the full text content for each page.



Deliverables



Please provide:



Figma file



Organised pages



Editable text



Reusable components



Exported PDF



Fonts and colour styles defined in Figma.



Future work



If this project goes well I will need ongoing help with designing:



Industry reports

Sales documents

Lead magnets

Strategy documents

Workshop decks

Diagnostic reports



So this could turn into regular work.



What I'm looking for



Someone who:



Has strong layout design skills

Can work with data visualisation

Understands modern report design

Can follow an existing design system



Bonus if you have experience with:



Consultancy reports

Strategy documents

B2B marketing materials



To apply



Please send:



Examples of reports or PDFs you have designed



Your hourly or project rate



Your availability



If you have questions just ask. Please include the word SECURITY at the start of your application so I know you read the brief.



Mike

title: Marketing & Brand Strategist
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a creative, strategic, and "design-first" Marketing Coordinator to lead the digital presence of two social care organisations: a boutique residential care home group and a specialist complex homecare provider based in the UK.



You will be the "Brand Guardian," responsible for ensuring our services look premium, feel trustworthy, and generate consistent private-pay enquiries. This is a hands-on role where you will design brochures, manage websites, rank us on Google, and tell the stories of our residents and staff.



Key Responsibilities

1. Brand & Creative Design

Visual Identity: Manage and evolve the visual branding for both companies across all touchpoints (brochures, signage, digital assets).



Graphic Design: Use Canva (or Adobe Suite) to create high-end marketing collateral that appeals to self-funding families and clinical case managers.



Content Production: Transform raw photos/videos from our UK teams into engaging social media content and high-quality video clips.



2. Digital Growth & SEO

Search Dominance: Manage and optimize Google Business Profiles for multiple locations to ensure we rank #1 in local searches.



SEO & Website: Maintain and update our WordPress websites. Write SEO-optimized blogs that position us as thought leaders in complex care and dementia.



Paid Ads: Execute and monitor Meta and Google Ad campaigns when required to boost occupancy.



3. Reputation & Trust

Review Management: Monitor and respond professionally to reviews on Google and 
 to build "Social Proof."



Persuasive Copywriting: Write "Life Story" features, newsletters, and website copy that balances clinical excellence with emotional warmth.



4. Lead Generation

Inbound Strategy: Implement organic strategies to turn website visitors into phone enquiries.



Market Positioning: Ensure our "Boutique" status is reflected in every digital post, differentiating us from large corporate competitors.



Requirements & Skills

Experience: 3+ years in a multi-channel marketing role (Healthcare or Real Estate experience is a huge plus).



Exceptional taste in design and a portfolio that proves you can create premium, clean, and modern layouts.



Tech Stack: Proficiency in Canva, Meta Business Suite, Google Ads, WordPress, and Video Editing (CapCut/Premiere).



Language: Good written English with a talent for persuasive, empathetic storytelling.



SEO Savvy: A solid understanding of local SEO and how to rank a service-based business.



AI Proficiency: Ability to use AI tools (Gemini, Nanobanana ) to accelerate content creation without losing the "human touch."



Ability to work during UK business hours (GMT 09:00 - 17:00) Mon - Friday, Location - Remote



How to Apply *****Important if you do not do all the parts below we will not accept your application*****

To be considered for this role, you must complete the following three steps:



1. Your CV: Attach your latest CV highlighting relevant service-based marketing experience.



2. Introduction Video: Record a short 2-minute video introducing yourself. We want to see your personality, your communication style, and why you think you’re a great fit.



3. The Proposal: Find us online (JT Carehomes). Review our current website and social media presence. Provide a short PDF or slide deck (max 3-5 pages) showing:



What you would change immediately to make us look more "Premium/Boutique."



A mood board or mockup of what our Instagram/Facebook grid should look like.



One SEO or ranking "quick win" you would implement for our Google Business Profile.



Please send the above to

title: Crypto Bookkeeper
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a Crypto Bookkeeper with experience managing financial records for businesses dealing with stablecoins and cryptocurrency transactions. The ideal candidate has experience using crypto subledger platforms such as Bitwave, Integral, Cryptoworth, Cointracking, Koinly, as well as traditional accounting software like QuickBooks and Xero. This role requires strong attention to detail, the ability to reconcile high-volume transactions, and a solid understanding of crypto accounting principles.



Key Responsibilities



Reconcile crypto transactions, including stablecoins, across multiple wallets and exchanges



Use subledger software (Bitwave, Integral, Cryptoworth, Cointracking, Koinly) to track crypto balances and cost basis



Maintain accurate financial records in QuickBooks and Xero



Ensure all transactions are properly classified and compliant with accounting standards



Work with tax and finance teams to prepare reports for tax filings and audits



Communicate with clients to gather necessary financial information



Stay updated on crypto accounting best practices and software updates



Qualifications



3+ years of bookkeeping experience, with a focus on crypto transactions



Proficiency in crypto subledger platforms (Bitwave, Integral, Cryptoworth, Cointracking, Koinly)



Experience using QuickBooks and Xero



Strong understanding of stablecoins, DeFi transactions, and crypto accounting methods



Ability to manage high-volume transaction reconciliation



Strong organizational and english communication skills



Familiarity with U.S. accounting and tax compliance for digital assets

title: Ecommerce Financial Controller / Accounting Manager
description:
ABOUT US

SWOOC Games is one of the fastest-growing game companies in the US since 2015 doing seven figures in sales annually, being featured on the INC 5000 twice. We are seeking a dedicated and committed candidate that is looking for a long-term position with room to grow with our company.



For a candidate with the drive to learn and grow, this truly is an amazing opportunity. We are recruiting, training & building a team for long and successful careers with our company. Our ideal candidate is committed to growing together with us, and in turn, we will give you all the tools and support to succeed and grow in your career.



Are you passionate about:

• Think Big

• Learn & Grow

• Focus on the Future

• Be Fueled by Innovation

• Take Ownership

• Be Respectful



Then, you've found the right place! Our team values these qualities and seeks individuals who are enthusiastic about making an impact.



This opportunity may not be the perfect match if:

• You're just looking for any gig to try

• Adapting to USA working hours doesn't fit your schedule

• Providing exceptional customer service isn't your strong suit



For more information, visit us at 



ABOUT THE ROLE

As part of the SWOOC Games Team, your mission is to ensure accurate and timely financial reporting, effective budget management, compliance with accounting standards, and support for strategic financial planning. This role involves leading the accounting team, optimizing financial processes, and contributing to the overall financial health and growth of the organization.



• Oversee all accounting operations, including Payroll, Billing, A/R, A/P, GL, Cost Accounting, Inventory Accounting, and Revenue Recognition.

• Coordinate and direct the preparation of the budget and financial forecasts and report variances.

• Track projected costs and actual costs, determine underlying causes of differences, solve issues, and continuously improve • projections.

• Prepare and publish timely monthly financial statements.

• Manage and report the P&L on a product level (50+ products).

• Support and oversee month-end and year-end close processes to meet deadlines.

• Ensure quality control over financial transactions and financial reporting.

• Manage and comply with local, state, and federal government reporting requirements and tax filings.

• Develop and document business processes and accounting policies to maintain and strengthen internal controls.

• Manage financial aspects of eCommerce platforms, including payment gateways and sales tax compliance.

• Additional controller duties as necessary.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal candidate must have the following knowledge, skills, and work experience.



• Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (Master's or CPA preferred).

• 5+ years of experience in accounting or financial management roles.

• Proven experience in financial reporting and budgeting.

• Experience managing a team and leading accounting operations.

• Familiarity with compliance and regulatory requirements.

• Experience in the eCommerce industry and understanding of its financial dynamics (Amazon experience is a plus).

• Key Competencies: Organization & Planning, Strategic Thinking/Visioning, Business Acumen, Results-Oriented, Leadership & Management Skills, Detail-Oriented, High Standards, Honesty & Integrity

• Master level of QuickBooks Online

• Advanced proficiency in MS Excel & Google Sheets, including Pivot Tables, Macros, and advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, SUMIFS)

• Proficiency in Google Workspace, MS Word, and PowerPoint.

• Experience with project management and collaboration tools such as Asana and Slack.

• Familiarity with eCommerce platforms and financial tools (e.g., Amazon, Shopify).

• Strong internet & Tech Savvy.



HOURS OF WORK PER WEEK

• 40 hours per week. Monday - Friday, 08:00am to 01:00pm EST.

• The remainder of the hours can be completed on a flexible schedule.



SALARY & BENEFITS

• Salary is $15-20/hour (DOE)

• 13th-Month Pay

• Paid Time Off

• 11 Paid Public Holidays

• Quarterly Bonus

• Annual Salary Increment

• Annual Christmas Bonus

• Patent Bonus

• HMO after 3 months (for Full-time Tea
mbers only)

• Education Assistance Program

• SWOOC Tea
mber Discounts

• Referral Bonus Program

• Work/Life Balance

• Salary depends on experience. Paid biweekly via Wise.



If you are a great fit for this position, please reply to this job post with your updated resume. Applications without an updated resume will not be considered.



SWOOC Games team is looking forward to meeting you!

title: Amazon PPC Consultant (Project-based)
description:
ABOUT US

SWOOC Games is one of the fastest-growing game companies in the US since 2015,  doing 8 figures in sales annually and being featured on the INC 5000 twice. We are seeking a dedicated and committed candidate that is looking for a long-term position with room to grow with our company.



For a candidate with the drive to learn and grow, this truly is an amazing opportunity. We are recruiting, training & building a team for long and successful careers with our company. Our ideal candidate is committed to growing together with us, and in turn, we will give you all the tools and support to succeed and grow in your career.

•  Providing exceptional customer service isn't your strong suit



For more information, visit us at 





ABOUT THE ROLE

We are searching for an experienced Amazon PPC Consultant to work with us on an ongoing project basis. As part of the SWOOC Games Team, your mission is to reduce and maintain target TACOS while driving continued growth on Amazon through expert-level PPC strategies. Own all advertising initiatives to maximize ROAS, protect margins, rank key SKUs, and increase total revenue while minimizing wasted ad spend.



•  Develop and execute a full-funnel Amazon PPC strategy (Sponsored Products, Brands, Display, Video).

•  Build, optimize, and scale PPC campaigns based on ACOS/TACoS targets and profitability.

•  Create Updated Strategies for daily, weekly, and monthly optimizations: bid changes, search term harvesting, negative keywords, campaign structure improvements, etc.

•  Analyze PPC performance and prepare weekly reporting with actionable insights and recommendations.

•  Collaborate with the Listing Team, Supply Chain, Finance, and CEO for pricing, inventory, and launch plans.

•  Maintain clean campaign architecture and naming conventions for easy tracking.

•  Stay updated on Amazon Ads algorithm changes, best practices, and competitive landscape.



This position will work directly under our CEO. We are looking for someone who can plug into our workflow and offer their expertise to execute and suggest improvements.



ABOUT YOU

The ideal candidate must have the following knowledge, skills, and work experience. 



•  Bachelor’s Degree, or equivalent experience

•  Amazon Advertising certifications preferred

•  5+ years proven experience managing Amazon PPC at scale

•  Deep expertise with Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display

•  Experience managing 50+ SKUs and 8 figures in sales.

•  Proven track record in achieving and maintaining low TACOS.

•  Key Competencies: Analytical Thinking & Data Interpretation, Strategic Decision-Making, Detail-Oriented, Problem-Solving, Teamwork, Communication

•  Expert-level Amazon PPC Console and Bulk Files (required)

•  Advanced MS Excel & Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, SUMIFS, pivot tables, data dashboards)

•  Proficiency in Helium 10, Data Dive

•  Strong analytical and reporting skills

•  Excellent written and verbal communication.

•  Ability to drive sales, product ranking, impressions, and conversions.

•  Knowledgeable in all aspects of advertising on Amazon.

•  Internet & tech savvy.



SALARY 

•  Salary is negotiable and depends on experience.



If you feel you are a great fit for this position, please reply to this job post with your updated resume and a sample work/portfolio of successful past projects. 



SWOOC Games team is looking forward to meeting you!
